title: Learning from the Unseen: Generative Data Augmentation for Geometric-Semantic Accident Anticipation
summary: Anticipating traffic accidents is a critical yet unresolved problem for autonomous driving, hindered by the inherent complexity of modeling interactions between road users and the limited availability of diverse, large-scale datasets. To address these issues, we propose a dual-path framework. On the one hand, we employ a video synthesis pipeline that, guided by structured prompts, derives feature distributions from existing corpora and produces high-fidelity synthetic driving scenes consistent with the statistical patterns of real data. On the other hand, we design a graph neural network enriched with semantic cues, enabling dynamic reasoning over both spatial and semantic relations among participants. To validate the effectiveness of our approach, we release a new benchmark dataset containing standardized, finely annotated video sequences that cover a broad spectrum of regions, weather, and traffic conditions. Evaluations across existing datasets and our new benchmark confirm notable gains in both accuracy and anticipation lead time, highlighting the capacity of the proposed framework to mitigate current data bottlenecks and enhance the reliability of autonomous driving systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个双路径框架来解决自动驾驶中的交通事故预测问题，通过视频合成技术生成高质量合成驾驶场景，并采用融合语义的图神经网络进行动态关系推理，同时发布了一个大规模基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中的事故预测是一个关键但未解决的问题，主要受限于道路使用者间交互建模的复杂性和多样化大规模数据集的缺乏。
AI.method: 双路径方法：1）基于结构化提示的视频合成管道，从现有语料库提取特征分布并生成符合真实数据统计模式的高保真合成驾驶场景；2）融合语义线索的图神经网络，可对参与者的空间和语义关系进行动态推理。
AI.result: 在现有数据集和新的基准数据集上的评估表明，该方法在预测准确性和预测提前时间上都有显著提升，有效缓解了数据瓶颈问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架通过合成数据和改进的关系推理模型，显著增强了自动驾驶系统的可靠性，为解决交通事故预测这一难题提供了有效方案。

title: Two-View Accumulation as the Primary Training Lever for Hybrid-Capture Gaussian Splatting: A Variance-Decomposition View of When Gradient Surgery Helps
summary:
Hybrid-capture novel view synthesis combines images at substantially different camera distances (e.g., aerial drone and ground-level views). Standard 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), trained for 30K iterations with one rendered view per optimizer step, under-fits the minority regime by 1-3 dB on five hybrid-capture benchmarks. We isolate the lever that closes this gap.
  Among compute-matched alternatives -- vanilla 60K iterations, magnitude corrections (GradNorm), direction-aware near/far gradient surgery, projective preconditioning, confidence-gated sample-level surgery, and a random two-view-per-step control -- the simplest structural change wins: rendering two views per optimizer step. The pairing rule (geometry-defined near/far, random, or active loss-disparity) does not change PSNR beyond seed variance on any of the five scenes; the structural change of having two views per step does.
  We propose a variance-decomposition framework that predicts and explains this finding: under bimodal camera regimes, between-regime gradient variance turns out to be small relative to within-regime variance in 3DGS, so structured and random pairings are variance-equivalent in expectation, and the variance halving from two-view accumulation itself is the dominant effect. We verify the framework on five scenes whose camera-altitude bimodality coefficients span [0.55, 1.00], and we report the negative result that direction-aware projection, magnitude correction, confidence gating, and an active loss-disparity pairing all fall within seed variance of random two-view pairing. The two-view structural lever transfers cleanly to the Scaffold-GS and Pixel-GS backbones.
  We position this work as an honest characterization of which training-side axes do and do not move PSNR for hybrid-capture 3DGS, together with the framework that explains why.

AI.tldr: 混合捕获新视角合成中，通过将每次优化步骤渲染两个视图而不是一个，可以显著缩小不同距离视角间的性能差距，而不需要复杂的配对规则或其他技术手段。
AI.motivation: 标准3D高斯散射(3DGS)在混合捕获场景（如无人机和地面视角）中训练时，存在少数视角欠拟合1-3dB的问题，需要找到简单有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 系统比较了多种计算匹配的改进方案，包括增加迭代次数、梯度修正、方向感知梯度手术、投影预处理、置信门控采样以及随机双视图控制，发现最简单的结构改变——每步渲染两个视图——效果最好。
AI.result: 在五个混合捕获基准测试上，双视图方案显著缩小了性能差距。方差分解框架解释了这一现象：在双峰相机制度下，制度间梯度方差相对较小，因此结构化和随机配对在期望上是方差等价的，而双视图累积的方差减半是主导效应。
AI.conclusion: 为混合捕获3DGS提供了诚实的结果分析，明确了哪些训练方法能或不能提升PSNR，并通过理论框架解释了原因。双视图方法在Scaffold-GS和Pixel-GS骨干网络上同样有效。

title: AIDA-ReID: Adaptive Intermediate Domain Adaptation for Generalizable and Source-Free Person Re-Identification
summary: Person re-identification (Re-ID) aims to match images of the same individual across non-overlapping camera views and remains challenging due to domain shifts caused by variations in illumination, background, camera characteristics, and population distributions. Although supervised models perform well under matched training and testing conditions, their performance degrades significantly when deployed in unseen environments. Existing intermediate domain approaches such as IDM and IDM++ alleviate this gap by constructing bridge feature distributions between domains; however, they rely on fixed mixing strategies and joint source-target access, limiting their applicability to multi-source and source-free settings. To address these limitations, this paper proposes Adaptive Intermediate Domain Adaptation (AIDA), also referred to as Source-Free Multi-Source Intermediate Domain Adaptation (SF-MIDA). The proposed framework treats intermediate-domain learning as a dynamically regulated process, where feature mixing and regularization strength are adaptively controlled using feedback signals derived from model uncertainty and training stability. A multi-source intermediate domain generator synthesizes diverse intermediate representations, while a pseudo-mirror regularization strategy preserves identity consistency under domain perturbations. Extensive experiments across domain generalization and source-free settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: AIDA/SF-MIDA是一种自适应中间域适应方法，通过动态调节特征混合和正则化强度来处理无监督跨域行人重识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有中间域方法存在混合策略固定、需要联合访问源域和目标域等限制，无法适应多源和免源设置，且在遇到未见环境时性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出自适应中间域学习框架，利用模型不确定性和训练稳定性的反馈信号动态控制特征混合和正则化强度；设计多源中间域生成器合成多样化中间表示；采用伪镜正则化策略保持域扰动下的身份一致性。
AI.result: 在域泛化和免源设置下的广泛实验证明了所提框架的有效性，能够更好地处理跨域行人重识别任务。
AI.conclusion: AIDA/SF-MIDA通过自适应调节机制突破了传统方法的局限，为跨域行人重识别提供了更灵活和鲁棒的解决方案。

title: GAFSV-Net: A Vision Framework for Online Signature Verification
summary: Online signature verification (OSV) requires distinguishing skilled forgeries from genuine samples under high intra-class variability and with very few enrollment samples. Existing deep learning methods operate directly on raw temporal sequences, restricting them to 1D architectures and preventing the use of pretrained 2D vision backbones. We bridge this gap with GAFSV-Net, which represents each signature as a six-channel asymmetric Gramian Angular Field image: three kinematic channels (pen speed, pressure derivative, direction angle) are each encoded into complementary GASF and GADF matrices that capture pairwise temporal co-occurrence and directional transition structure respectively. A dual-branch ConvNeXt-Tiny encoder processes GASF and GADF independently, with bidirectional cross-attention enabling each branch to query discriminative patterns from the other before metric-space projection. Training uses semi-hard triplet loss with skilled-forgery hard-negative injection; verification is performed via cosine similarity against a small enrollment prototype. We evaluate on DeepSignDB and BiosecurID, outperforming all sequence-based baselines trained under identical objectives, demonstrating that the representational gain of 2D temporal encoding is consistent and independent of training procedure, with ablations characterising each design choice's contribution.

AI.tldr: GAFSV-Net将在线签名转换为六通道Gramian角场图像，利用双分支ConvNeXt-Tiny编码器和交叉注意力机制，显著提升了在线签名验证的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有在线签名验证方法直接处理原始时间序列，限制了1D架构使用且无法利用预训练的2D视觉模型，难以有效区分高类内变异下熟练伪造签名。
AI.method: 提出GAFSV-Net：将签名运动学特征编码为GASF/GADF图像构建六通道不对称表示；双分支ConvNeXt-Tiny独立处理GASF和GADF；双向交叉注意力让分支间查询判别模式；采用半难三元组损失加熟练伪造负样本训练。
AI.result: 在DeepSignDB和BiosecurID数据集上超越所有相同训练目标的序列基线方法，证明了2D时间编码的表示增益具有一致性和独立性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将动态签名转换为结构化2D表示并利用先进视觉架构，GAFSV-Net为在线签名验证提供了一种新的有效范式，其性能提升源于多个设计选择的协同作用。

title: Putting HUMANS first: Efficient LAM Evaluation with Human Preference Alignment
comment: Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
summary: The rapid proliferation of large audio models (LAMs) demands efficient approaches for model comparison, yet comprehensive benchmarks are costly. To fill this gap, we investigate whether minimal subsets can reliably evaluate LAMs while reducing costs and data redundancy. Analyzing 10 subset selection methods with 18 audio models across 40 tasks covering major LAM evaluation dimensions, we show that subsets of just 50 examples (0.3% of data) can achieve over 0.93 Pearson correlation with full benchmark scores. To understand how well these scores align with what practitioners ultimately care about, user satisfaction, we collect 776 human preference ratings from realistic voice assistant conversations, finding that both subsets and full benchmark achieve only 0.85 correlation with human. To better predict preferences, we trained regression models on these selected subsets, achieving 0.98 correlation -- outperforming regression models trained on both random subsets and the full benchmark. This demonstrates that in regression modeling, well-curated subsets outpredict the full benchmark, showing quality over quantity. We open-source these regression-weighted subsets as the HUMANS benchmark, an efficient proxy for LAM evaluation that captures both benchmark performance and user preferences.

AI.tldr: 研究发现仅占数据量0.3%的50个样本子集就能高效评估大音频模型，相比完整基准测试可大幅降低成本，且通过回归模型训练后的子集甚至能超越完整基准的性能预测能力。
AI.motivation: 大音频模型(LAMs)快速发展需要有效的模型评估方法，但全面基准测试成本高昂，亟需寻找既能保证评估可靠性又能降低成本的解决方案。
AI.method: 分析了10种子集选择方法，在18个音频模型的40个任务上进行评估，收集776个人类偏好评分，训练回归模型预测用户满意度，开发HUMANS基准测试。
AI.result: 50个样本的子集与完整基准测试达到0.93皮尔逊相关性，两者的用户满意度预测均为0.85相关性，而基于精选子集训练的回归模型达到0.98相关性，优于完整基准。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的子集在回归建模中能够超越完整基准的预测能力，证明了质量胜于数量，开源的HUMANS基准可作为高效的LAM评估代理。

authors: Udayanga G. W. K. N. Gamage
title: Real-Time Frame- and Event-based Object Detection with Spiking Neural Networks on Edge Neuromorphic Hardware: Design, Deployment and Benchmark
summary: Real-time object detection on energy-constrained platforms is critical for applications such as UAV-based inspection, autonomous navigation, and mobile robotics. Spiking neural networks (SNNs) on neuromorphic hardware are believed to be significantly more energy-efficient than conventional artificial neural networks (ANNs). In this work, we present a comprehensive methodology for designing general SNN detection architectures targeting neuromorphic platforms, along with the engineering adaptations required to deploy them on the state-of-the-art Neuromorphic processor, Intel Loihi 2. We benchmark SNN-based object detection on Loihi 2 using both frame-based and event-based datasets, comparing performance with ANN-based detection on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, NVIDIA Jetson Nano B01, and the Apple M2 CPU. Our results show that SNNs on Loihi 2 can perform real-time detection while achieving the lowest per-inference dynamic energy among all platforms. Also, Loihi 2 outperforms the other platforms in terms of power consumption, though ANNs on Jetson Orin Nano achieve higher inference rates. Furthermore, our ANN-to-SNN distillation-aware training enables SNNs to recover 87-100% of the detection accuracy of their ANN counterparts while maintaining lower inference latency; without distillation, SNNs exhibit an 11-27% accuracy drop. These results highlight the potential of neuromorphic systems for energy-efficient, real-time object detection at the edge.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一套基于神经形态 Loihi 2 处理器的脉冲神经网络目标检测设计方法，实现超低能耗实时检测，通过知识蒸馏使SNN检测精度恢复至ANN的87-100%。
AI.motivation: 在能量受限平台（如无人机、移动机器人）上进行实时目标检测至关重要。传统神经网络能耗高，而脉冲神经网络在神经形态硬件上具有显著能效优势，但需解决部署和技术适配问题。
AI.method: 设计面向神经形态平台的通用SNN检测架构，开发Loihi 2部署适配方案，采用ANN-to-SNN知识蒸馏训练技术，在基于帧和基于事件的两种数据集上进行benchmark测试。
AI.result: Loihi 2上SNN实现实时检测，单次推理动态能耗最低，功耗优于其他平台；使用蒸馏训练后SNN检测精度达到ANN的87-100%，否则精度下降11-27%；Jetson Orin Nano的ANN推理速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明神经形态系统在边缘设备能量高效实时目标检测方面具有巨大潜力，SNN通过适当训练能在保持低延迟的同时接近ANN的检测精度。

title: NorBERTo: A ModernBERT Model Trained for Portuguese with 331 Billion Tokens Corpus
comment: This article has already undergone formal submission, review, acceptance, and publication in the proceedings of PROPOR 2026: Proceedings of the 17th International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese, Vol. 1. The published version is available in the ACL Anthology at https://aclanthology.org/2026.propor-1.18/ 11 pages, 9 tables, 2 figures
summary: High-quality corpora are essential for advancing Natural Language Processing (NLP) in Portuguese. Building on previous encoder-only models such as BERTimbau and Albertina PT-BR, we introduce NorBERTo, a modern encoder based on the ModernBERT architecture, featuring long-context support and efficient attention mechanisms. NorBERTo is trained on Aurora-PT, a newly curated Brazilian Portuguese corpus comprising 331 billion GPT-2 tokens collected from diverse web sources and existing multilingual datasets. We systematically benchmark NorBERTo against Strong baselines on semantic similarity, textual entailment and classification tasks using standardized datasets such as ASSIN 2 and PLUE. On PLUE, NorBERTo-large achieves the best results among the encoder models we evaluated, notably reaching 0.9191 F1 on MRPC and 0.7689 accuracy on RTE. On ASSIN 2, NorBERTo-large attains the highest entailment F1 (~0.904) among all encoders considered, although Albertina-900M and BERTimbau-large still hold an advantage. To the best of our knowledge, Aurora-PT is currently the largest openly available monolingual Portuguese corpus, surpassing previous resources. NorBERTo provides a modern, mid-sized encoder designed for realistic deployment scenarios: it is straight-forward to fine-tune, efficient to serve, and well suited as a backbone for retrieval-augmented generation and other downstream Portuguese NLP systems.

AI.tldr: NorBERTo是基于ModernBERT架构的现代葡萄牙语编码器模型，使用3310亿Tokens的新语料库Aurora-PT训练，在多项葡萄牙语NLP任务上达到业界领先水平。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语NLP发展缺乏高质量大规模语料库和现代编码器模型，现有的BERTimbau和Albertina等模型在架构和性能上需要更新升级。
AI.method: 构建Aurora-PT语料库（3310亿GPT-2 Tokens），基于ModernBERT架构训练NorBERTo模型，采用长上下文支持和高效注意力机制，在ASSIN 2和PLUE等标准数据集上进行系统性评估。
AI.result: NorBERTo-large在PLUE数据集上表现最佳（MRPC F1=0.9191，RTE准确率=0.7689），在ASSIN 2上获得最高的文本蕴含F1(~0.904)。Aurora-PT是当前最大的开源葡萄牙语单语语料库。
AI.conclusion: NorBERTo提供了一个适合实际部署的现代中等规模编码器，易于微调、服务高效，可作为检索增强生成等下游葡萄牙语NLP系统的骨干模型，显著推进了葡萄牙语NLP技术的发展。

title: From Images2Mesh: A 3D Surface Reconstruction Pipeline for Non-Cooperative Space Objects
summary: On-orbit inspection imagery is crucial as it enables characterization of non-cooperative resident space objects, providing the geometry and structural condition essential for active debris removal and on-orbit servicing mission planning. However, most existing neural implicit surface reconstruction methods have been confined to synthetic or hardware-in-the-loop data with known camera poses and controlled illumination. In this work, we present a pipeline for neural implicit surface reconstruction of non-cooperative space objects from monocular inspection imagery. We demonstrate it on publicly released ISS inspection footage from the STS-119 mission and publicly released on-orbit inspection footage of an H-IIA rocket upper stage. We find that segmentation-based background removal is essential for successful camera pose estimation from real on-orbit footage, where background variation between frames caused direct processing to fail entirely. We further incorporate photometric correction of per-frame exposure variations and analyze its behavior across datasets, finding that performance in shadowed regions varies with the illumination characteristics of the input footage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经隐式表面重建的管道，用于从单目在轨检查图像中重建非合作空间目标，解决了真实在轨环境中的背景干扰和光照变化问题。
AI.motivation: 在轨检查图像对于非合作空间目标的特征描述和主动碎片清除、在轨服务任务规划至关重要，但现有神经隐式表面重建方法局限于已知相机位姿和受控光照的合成或硬件在环数据。
AI.method: 开发了一个处理流程，包含基于分割的背景移除技术（用于成功估计真实在轨画面的相机位姿）、逐帧曝光变化的光度校正，并在ISS和H-IIA火箭上阶段的公开在轨检查数据上进行验证。
AI.result: 发现基于分割的背景移除是成功处理真实在轨画面的关键技术，光度校正能处理曝光变化，但阴影区域的重建性能随输入画面的光照特性而变化。
AI.conclusion: 该管道首次实现了从真实在轨单目检查图像进行神经隐式表面重建，背景移除和光度校正是关键步骤，为空间目标在轨检测和维护提供了实用的技术方案。

title: How Frontier LLMs Adapt to Neurodivergence Context: A Measurement Framework for Surface vs. Structural Change in System-Prompted Responses
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Benchmark, code, and data available at https://github.com/ishansgupta/ndbench
summary:
We examine if frontier chat-based large language models (LLMs) adjust their outputs based on neurodivergence (ND) context in system prompts and describe the nature of these adjustments. Specifically, we propose NDBench, a 576-output benchmark involving two frontier models, three system prompt types (baseline, ND-profile assertion, and ND-profile assertion with explicit instructions for adjustments), four canonical ND profiles, and 24 prompts across four categories, one of which involves an adversarial masking strategy.
  Four trends emerge consistently from our findings. First, LLMs show significant adaptation under ND context, where fully instructed conditions yield lengthier and more structured outputs, characterized by higher token counts, more headings, and more granular steps (p < 10^-8, Holm-corrected). Second, such adaptation is largely structural in nature: although list density does not change much, there is a marked rise in the frequency of headings and per-step detail. Third, ND persona assertion alone fails to suppress potentially harmful tendencies, as masking-reinforcement decreases only in explicitly instructed cases (36-44% reduction); the reduction rate barely changes in persona assertion conditions.
  Moreover, reliability analysis of LLM-based harm assessment reveals that only two out of the six dimensions (masking and reinforcement, validation quality) exceed the pre-defined inter-judge agreement criterion (alpha >= 0.67) and thus can be considered primary results.
  NDBench is made publicly available along with its prompts, outputs, code, and other resources, forming a reproducible framework for auditing future LLMs' adaptation to ND awareness.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型在神经多样化(ND)语境下会调整输出结构，但仅凭身份声明无法减少有害倾向，需要明确指令才能有效改善。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在评估前沿对话式大型语言模型是否能够根据神经多样化(Neurodivergent, ND)的系统提示上下文调整其输出，并描述这种调整的性质，以促进LLM对神经多样群体的包容性和适应性。
AI.method: 提出NDBench基准测试框架，包含576个输出样本，涉及2个前沿模型、3种系统提示类型（基线、ND身份声明、带明确调整指令的ND身份声明）、4个典型ND档案、24个涵盖4类主题的提示（其中包含对抗性掩饰策略）。
AI.result: LLM在ND语境下表现出显著适应性：输出更长更结构化（令牌数更多、标题更多、步骤更详尽）；调整主要体现在结构层面；仅身份声明无法抑制有害倾向（掩饰强化仅减少4-6%），明确指令可减少36-44%；可靠性分析显示6个维度中仅2个（掩饰强化、验证质量）满足评分者间一致性标准。
AI.conclusion: NDBench为审核未来LLM对神经多样意识的适应性提供了可复现框架；研究表明需要明确的系统性指令而非仅身份认知来改善LLM对神经多样群体的输出质量。

title: VkSplat: High-Performance 3DGS Training in Vulkan Compute
summary: We present VkSplat, a high-performance, cross-vendor 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) training pipeline implemented fully in Vulkan compute, addressing performance and compatibility limitation of existing training pipelines. With various optimizations, we achieve $3.3\times$ speed and $33\%$ VRAM reduction over CUDA+PyTorch baseline, maintaining quality, and demonstrating compatibility across GPU vendors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully-Vulkan-based 3DGS training pipeline that achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code: \href{https://github.com/harry7557558/vksplat}{https://github.com/harry7557558/vksplat}

AI.tldr: VkSplat是一个完全基于Vulkan计算实现的跨GPU厂商3D高斯散布(3DGS)训练管线，相比CUDA+PyTorch基线实现3.3倍速度提升和33%显存节省，同时保持质量不变。
AI.motivation: 现有的3DGS训练管线存在性能限制和GPU厂商兼容性问题，需要一种高性能且跨平台的解决方案来实现更高效的训练。
AI.method: 通过完全基于Vulkan计算实现3DGS训练管线，采用多种优化技术，包括高效的内存管理和并行计算策略，实现在不同GPU厂商硬件上的统一运行。
AI.result: 相比CUDA+PyTorch基线实现3.3倍速度提升和33%显存减少，同时保持相同的质量水平，并在多个GPU厂商平台上展现出良好的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个完全基于Vulkan的3DGS训练管线，在实现跨厂商兼容性的同时达到了最先进的性能表现，为3DGS训练提供了新的高性能解决方案。

title: ViLegalNLI: Natural Language Inference for Vietnamese Legal Texts
summary: In this article, we introduce ViLegalNLI, the first large-scale Vietnamese Natural Language Inference (NLI) dataset specifically constructed for the legal domain. The dataset consists of 42,012 premise-hypothesis pairs derived from official statutory documents and annotated with binary inference labels (Entailment and Non-entailment). It covers multiple legal domains and reflects realistic legal reasoning scenarios characterized by structured logic, conditional clauses, and domain-specific terminology. To construct ViLegalNLI, we propose a semi-automatic data generation framework that integrates large language models for controlled hypothesis generation and systematic quality validation procedures. The framework incorporates artifact mitigation strategies and cross-model validation to improve annotation reliability and ensure legal consistency. The resulting dataset captures diverse reasoning patterns, including paraphrasing, logical implication, and legally invalid inferences, thereby providing a comprehensive benchmark for Vietnamese legal inference tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on the ViLegalNLI using multilingual models, Vietnamese-specific pretrained language models, and instruction-tuned large language models. The results show that few-shot LLM configurations consistently achieve superior performance, while performance is significantly influenced by hypothesis length, lexical overlap, and reasoning complexity. Cross-domain evaluations further reveal the challenges of generalizing legal inference across distinct legal fields. Overall, ViLegalNLI establishes a foundational benchmark for Vietnamese legal NLI and supports future research in legal reasoning, statutory text understanding, and the development of reliable AI systems for legal analysis and decision support. The dataset is publicly available for research purposes.

AI.tldr: 本文推出了首个越南法律领域的大规模自然语言推理数据集ViLegalNLI，包含42,012条标注对，并提出半自动生成框架，为越南法律推理建立了基础基准。
AI.motivation: 缺乏专门针对越南法律领域的自然语言推理数据集，限制了法律AI系统的发展。法律文本具有结构化逻辑、条件从句和领域术语等特征，需要专门的推理基准。
AI.method: 提出半自动数据生成框架，结合大语言模型进行受控假设生成和系统质量验证，包含artifact缓解策略和跨模型验证，确保法律一致性和标注可靠性。
AI.result: 构建了包含42,012条前提-假设对的数据集，涵盖多个法律领域。实验表明少样本LLM配置表现最佳，假设长度、词汇重叠和推理复杂度显著影响性能，跨域评估揭示了法律推理泛化的挑战。
AI.conclusion: ViLegalNLI为越南法律NLP研究建立了基础基准，支持法律推理、法规文本理解和可靠AI法律分析系统的开发，数据集已公开发布。

title: Adaptive Geodesic Conformal Prediction for Egocentric Camera Pose Estimation
summary: Egocentric pose estimation for Augmented Reality (AR) and assistive devices requires not just accurate predictions but guaranteed uncertainty regions. Conformal prediction (CP) provides such guarantees without retraining, but we show that standard CP with a single fixed threshold achieves nominal 90% overall coverage while covering only ~60% of the hardest 25% of frames (Q4) -- a ~30 percentage-point conditional coverage gap consistent across 12 participants, 3 predictors, and 3 horizons (108 evaluations) on EPIC-Fields. We further show that a geodesic SE(3) nonconformity score identifies physically harder frames than Euclidean scoring, with only 15-26% Q4 overlap and 2-3x higher ground-truth camera displacement for geodesic Q4 frames. To close the coverage gap, we propose DINOv2-Bridge adaptive CP: a two-stage difficulty estimator trained on a single source participant that transfers cross-participant without any images at test time, improving Q4 coverage from ~0.75 to ~0.93 while maintaining overall coverage at the 90% target.

AI.tldr: 该研究针对AR中的姿态估计，发现标准保形预测在最困难帧上的覆盖率存在巨大缺口，并提出基于DINOv2的自适应保形预测方法，成功解决了条件覆盖率不均的问题。
AI.motivation: 增强现实和辅助设备中的第一人称姿态估计需要准确的预测和保证的不确定性区域。标准保形预测虽然能提供覆盖保证，但在最困难的帧上存在严重的覆盖率不足问题，这会影响设备在关键时刻的可靠性。
AI.method: 1）发现标准保形预测在最困难25%帧上仅60%覆盖率的问题；2）提出使用测地线SE(3)非一致性分数来识别物理上更困难的帧；3）设计DINOv2-Bridge自适应保形预测框架，通过两阶段难度估计器实现跨参与者迁移。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Fields数据集上，新方法将最困难帧(Q4)的覆盖率从0.75提升到0.93，同时保持整体90%的目标覆盖率，有效解决了30个百分点的条件覆盖率缺口问题。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功解决了保形预测在困难帧上覆盖率不足的关键问题，提出的自适应方法无需测试时图像即可跨参与者迁移，为AR和辅助设备的可靠姿态估计提供了重要保障。

title: Cultural Benchmarking of LLMs in Standard and Dialectal Arabic Dialogues
summary: There is a significant gap in evaluating cultural reasoning in LLMs using conversational datasets that capture culturally rich and dialectal contexts. Most Arabic benchmarks focus on short text snippets in Modern Standard Arabic (MSA), overlooking the cultural nuances that naturally arise in dialogues. To address this gap, we introduce ArabCulture-Dialogue, a culturally grounded conversational dataset covering 13 Arabic-speaking countries, in both MSA and each country's respective dialect, spanning 12 daily-life topics and 54 fine-grained subtopics. We utilize the dataset to form three benchmarking tasks: (i) multiple-choice cultural reasoning, (ii) machine translation between MSA and dialects, and (iii) dialect-steering generation. Our experiments indicate that the performance gap between MSA and Arabic dialects still exists, whereby the models perform worse on all three tasks in the dialectal setup, compared to the MSA one.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了ArabCulture-Dialogue数据集，涵盖13个阿拉伯国家的现代标准语和方言对话，用于评估大语言模型在阿拉伯文化推理方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有阿拉伯语基准测试主要关注现代标准阿拉伯语的短文本，忽略了对话中自然产生的文化细微差异和方言语境，导致评估LLM文化推理能力存在显著空白。
AI.method: 构建了包含13个阿拉伯国家的ArabCulture-Dialogue数据集，涵盖现代标准语和各国方言，涉及12个日常生活话题和54个细分子话题。基于该数据集设计了三个基准任务：多项选择文化推理、现代标准语与方言间的机器翻译、方言引导生成。
AI.result: 实验表明，现代标准语和阿拉伯方言之间 still存在性能差距，模型在所有三个任务的方言设置中都表现较差，相比现代标准语设置。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了阿拉伯语文化对话数据集的空白，揭示了LLM在处理阿拉伯方言时的不足，为改进模型的文化推理能力提供了重要的评估基准。

title: MAEPose: Self-Supervised Spatiotemporal Learning for Human Pose Estimation on mmWave Video
summary: Millimetre-wave (mmWave) radar offers a more privacy-preserving alternative to RGB-based human pose estimation. However, existing methods typically rely on pre-extracted intermediate representations such as sparse point clouds or spectrogram images, where the rich spatiotemporal information naturally present in radar video streams is discarded for model learning, while such signal processing adds system complexity. In addition, existing solutions are mainly conducted in an end-to-end supervised manner without leveraging unlabelled raw video streams to learn generalized representations. In this study, we present MAEPose, a masked autoencoding-based human pose estimation approach that operates directly on mmWave spectrogram videos. MAEPose learns spatiotemporal motion-aware generalized representations from unlabelled radar video, and leverages its heatmap decoder for multi-frame pose estimation predictions. We evaluate it across three datasets based on leave-one-person-out cross-validation with rigorous statistical testing. MAEPose consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 22.1% in MPJPE p<0.05, and maintains robust accuracy under zero-shot bystander interference with only a 6.5% error increase. Ablation studies confirm that both the pre-training and the heatmap decoder contribute substantially, while modality analysis indicates that leveraging Range-Doppler video as input achieves better pose estimation performance than Range-Azimuth or their fusion, with lower computational cost.

AI.tldr: MAEPose是一种基于掩码自编码的毫米波雷达人体姿态估计方法，直接处理原始雷达视频，无需中间表示，在多个数据集上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达姿态估计方法依赖预提取的中间表示（如稀疏点云或频谱图），丢弃了雷达视频流中丰富的时空信息，且未利用未标注数据学习通用表示。
AI.method: 提出MAEPose方法，使用掩码自编码技术直接对毫米波频谱视频进行自监督预训练，学习时空运动感知的通用表示，并利用热图解码器进行多帧姿态估计预测。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的留一法交叉验证中，MAEPose持续优于最先进基线方法（MPJPE提升高达22.1%，p<0.05），在零射击干扰情况下仅增加6.5%错误率。
AI.conclusion: 掩码自编码预训练和热图解码器都是重要贡献项，Range-Doppler视频作为输入比Range-Azimuth或融合方法表现更好且计算成本更低。

title: Timing is Everything: Temporal Scaffolding of Semantic Surprise in Humor
summary: Humor is a fundamental cognitive phenomenon in which humans derive pleasure from the expectation violations and their resolution, exemplifying the brain's dynamic capacity for predictive processing. Classical humor theories emphasize semantic incongruity as the primary driver of amusement, yet overlook temporal dynamics despite comedians' intuition that "timing is everything." The extent to which temporal structure contributes to humor appreciation and how it interacts with semantic content remains poorly understood. Here, we propose the Dual Prediction Violation (DPV) framework to capture the interplay between content and timing. By analyzing 828 professional Chinese stand-up performances, we show that temporal features substantially outweigh semantic incongruity in predicting audience appreciation. Specifically, we find that peak semantic violations matter more than average incongruity levels, and pauses systematically lengthen before high-surprise punchlines--a strategic coupling that distinguishes successful from unsuccessful performances. These findings reframe humor as temporally scaffolded, where timing and semantic content operate in strategic coordination rather than independently. Our DPV framework bridges humor theory with predictive processing, demonstrating that temporal structure plays a central role in naturalistic humor appreciation with implications for understanding multi-scale prediction integration in linguistic processing.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在单口喜剧表演中，时间结构比语义内容更影响观众的快乐感受，高峰语义违反前的停顿长度是成功表演的关键。
AI.motivation: 传统幽默理论强调语义不一致性，但忽视了时间动态因素，尽管喜剧演员认为'时机就是一切'。时间结构对幽默欣赏的贡献程度及其与语义内容的相互作用尚不清楚。
AI.method: 提出双重预测违反(DPV)框架，通过分析828场专业中文单口喜剧表演，研究时间特征与语义不一致性对观众欣赏的预测作用。
AI.result: 时间特征在预测观众欣赏方面显著优于语义不一致性；高峰语义违反比平均不一致更重要；高惊讶笑点前停顿系统性地延长，这是区分成功与失败表演的策略性耦合。
AI.conclusion: 幽默应被重新定义为时间脚手架式的，时机与语义内容进行策略性协调而非独立运作。DPV框架连接了幽默理论与预测处理，证明了时间结构在自然幽默欣赏中的核心作用。

title: Remote SAMsing: From Segment Anything to Segment Everything
summary: SAM2 produces high-quality zero-shot segmentation on natural images, but applying it to large remote sensing scenes exposes two problems: (1) its mask generator faces an inherent quality-coverage trade-off: strict thresholds yield precise masks but leave most of the image unsegmented, while relaxed thresholds increase coverage at the cost of mask quality; and (2) large images must be tiled, fragmenting objects across tile boundaries. We propose Remote SAMsing, an open-source pipeline that solves both problems without modifying SAM2 or requiring training data. For coverage, a multi-pass algorithm runs SAM2 repeatedly on each tile, painting accepted masks black between passes to simplify the scene for the next iteration, and relaxing quality thresholds only when coverage gains stagnate, ensuring that the most precise masks are always captured first. For spatial consistency, contextual padding and a parameter-free best-match merge reconstruct objects fragmented across tile boundaries. Evaluated on seven scenes (5~cm to 4.78~m GSD), the pipeline raises coverage from 30--68\% (single-pass SAM2) to 91--98\%. Ablation experiments quantify the contribution of each component to coverage and detection quality. Per-class evaluation shows that SAM2 transfers well to discrete RS objects (buildings 95\%, cars 82--93\% Det@0.5) with segment boundaries 3--8$\times$ more precise than SLIC and Felzenszwalb baselines. Tile size functions as an implicit scale parameter: reducing it from $1{,}000$ to 250 raises Det@0.5 from 56\% to 85\%, outperforming SAM2's built-in multi-scale mechanism. The pipeline generalizes to MNF false-color imagery without retraining (99.5\% ASA) and scales to production-sized images: a 1.94 billion pixel Potsdam mosaic achieved 97\% coverage without quality degradation.

AI.tldr: Remote SAM是一种开源处理流程，在无需修改SAM2或训练数据的情况下，通过多遍算法和边界合并技术，将大尺寸遥感图像的分割覆盖率从30-68%提升至91-98%。
AI.motivation: SAM2在自然图像上表现优异，但应用于大尺度遥感场景时存在两个问题：掩码生成器面临质量-覆盖率的固有权衡；大图像必须分块处理导致物体在边界处被分割。
AI.method: 提出Remote SAMsing方法，采用多遍算法在每个图块上重复运行SAM2，遍历间将接受的掩码涂黑以简化场景；当覆盖率增益停滞时才放宽质量阈值；使用上下文填充和参数无关的最佳匹配合并重建跨边界物体。
AI.result: 在七个场景中将覆盖率提升至91-98%；建筑检测精度95%，汽车82-93%；通过调整图块大小可隐式控制尺度参数；在19.4亿像素的波茨坦图像上达到97%覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了SAM2在遥感图像应用中的质量和覆盖问题，具有良好的泛化能力和可扩展性，为大规模遥感图像分割提供了实用解决方案。

title: RSAT: Structured Attribution Makes Small Language Models Faithful Table Reasoners
comment: 8 pages, 8 tables, 9 figures, and a 3-page Appendix. Accepted at the SURGeLLM Workshop at ACL 2026 and will be included in the proceedings
summary: When a language model answers a table question, users have no way to verify which cells informed which reasoning steps. We introduce RSAT, a method that trains small language models (SLMs, 1-8B) to produce step-by-step reasoning with cell-level citations grounded in table evidence. Phase 1 (SFT) teaches a structured JSON output format from verified reasoning traces. Phase 2 (GRPO) optimizes a composite reward centered on NLI-based faithfulness, alongside citation validity and parsimony. Across six models from two families-Qwen 2.5 (1.5B/3B/7B) and Llama 3 (1B/3B/8B)-RSAT improves faithfulness 3.7$\times$ over SFT alone (0.224$\rightarrow$0.826), with near-perfect citation validity (0.992). Post-hoc attribution collapses below 13% format success, confirming that attribution must be integrated into reasoning, not retrofitted. Ablations show the faithfulness reward is essential: removing it drops faithfulness from 0.97 to 0.03.

AI.tldr: RSAT方法通过逐步推理训练小型语言模型生成带单元格级引用的表格问题回答，显著提升了回答的忠实度。
AI.motivation: 用户在语言模型回答表格问题时无法验证哪些单元格支撑了推理过程，缺乏可解释性和可信度。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练：Phase 1通过监督微调学习结构化JSON输出格式；Phase 2使用GRPO优化组合奖励函数，重点优化基于NLI的忠实度，并结合引用有效性和简洁性。
AI.result: 在Qwen 2.5和Llama 3两个系列的六种模型上，RSAT使忠实度提升3.7倍，引用有效性达到0.992；后期归因方法格式成功率低于13%，证明归因必须集成到推理中；消融实验表明忠实度奖励至关重要。
AI.conclusion: RSAT成功实现了表格问答的细粒度可解释性，证明将引用机制直接集成到训练过程中的必要性，为小型语言模型的可信推理提供了有效解决方案。

title: REALM: An RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold for Cross-Modal Perception
summary: Event cameras provide several unique advantages over standard frame-based sensors, including high temporal resolution, low latency, and robustness to extreme lighting. However, existing learning-based approaches for event processing are typically confined to narrow, task-specific silos and lack the ability to generalize across modalities. We address this gap with REALM, a cross-modal framework that learns an RGB and Event Aligned Latent Manifold by projecting event representations into the pretrained latent space of RGB foundation models. Instead of task-specific training, we leverage low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to bridge the modality gap, effectively unlocking the geometric and semantic priors of frozen RGB backbones for asynchronous event streams. We demonstrate that REALM effectively maps events into the ViT-based foundation latent space. Our method allows us to perform downstream tasks like depth estimation and semantic segmentation by simply transferring linear heads trained on the RGB teacher. Most significantly, REALM enables the direct, zero-shot application of complex, frozen image-trained decoders, such as MASt3R, to raw event data. We demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in wide-baseline feature matching, significantly outperforming specialized architectures. Code and models are available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: REALM是一个跨模态框架，通过将事件流表示对齐到预训练RGB基础模型的潜在空间，使事件数据能够直接利用现成的RGB图像模型，实现了零样本应用和跨模态泛化。
AI.motivation: 现有的事件相机学习方法受限于特定任务，缺乏跨模态泛化能力；事件相机具有高时间分辨率、低延迟和强光照鲁棒性等优势，但无法充分利用成熟的RGB基础模型的强大先验知识。
AI.method: REALM框架通过低秩适应(LoRA)将事件表示投影到预训练的ViT-based RGB模型潜在空间中，从而桥接模态差异，解锁冻结RGB骨干网络对异步事件流的几何和语义先验。
AI.result: REALM成功将事件映射到ViT基础潜在空间，可直接迁移RGB训练的线性头执行深度估计和语义分割；最重要的是实现了直接将MASt3R等复杂冻结解码器零样本应用于原始事件数据，在宽基线特征匹配任务上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: REALM为事件处理提供了一种通用的跨模态学习范式，打破了任务特定训练的限制，使事件数据能够直接利用强大的RGB基础模型生态，为事件视觉应用开辟了新的可能性。

title: Confidence Estimation in Automatic Short Answer Grading with LLMs
summary: Automatic Short Answer Grading (ASAG) with generative large language models (LLMs) has recently demonstrated strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning, while also enabling the generation of synthetic feedback for educational assessment. Despite these advances, LLM-based grading remains imperfect, making reliable confidence estimates essential for safe and effective human-AI collaboration in educational decision-making. In this work, we investigate confidence estimation for ASAG with LLMs by jointly considering model-based confidence signals and dataset-derived uncertainty. We systematically compare three model-based confidence estimation strategies, namely verbalizing, latent, and consistency-based confidence estimation, and show that model-based confidence alone is insufficient to reliably capture uncertainty in ASAG. To address this limitation, we propose a hybrid confidence framework that integrates model-based confidence signals with an explicit estimate of dataset-derived aleatoric uncertainty. Aleatoric uncertainty is operationalized by clustering semantically embedded student responses and quantifying within-cluster heterogeneity. Our results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid confidence measure yields more reliable confidence estimates and improves selective grading performance compared to single-source approaches. Overall, this work advances confidence-aware LLM-based grading for human-in-the-loop assessment, supporting more trustworthy AI-assisted educational assessment systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合置信度框架，结合LLM模型置信度信号和数据集衍生的不确定性估计，用于提高自动简答题评分的置信度估计可靠性。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于LLM的自动简答题评分表现出色，但其评分仍不完美，需要可靠的置信度估计来支持安全有效的人机协作教育决策。
AI.method: 比较三种模型置信度估计策略（口头化、潜在特征、一致性），并提出了混合框架，将模型置信度与通过聚类学生响应量化的数据集衍生偶然不确定性相结合。
AI.result: 混合置信度措施相比单源方法能产生更可靠的置信度估计，并提高了选择性评分性能。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作推进了基于置信度的LLM评分技术，为人在回路评估系统提供了更可信的AI辅助教育评估支持。

title: When Do Diffusion Models learn to Generate Multiple Objects?
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models achieve impressive visual fidelity, yet they remain unreliable in multi-object generation. Despite extensive empirical evidence of these failures, the underlying causes remain unclear. We begin by asking how much of this limitation arises from the data itself. To disentangle data effects, we consider two regimes across different dataset sizes: (1) concept generalization, where each individual concept is observed during training under potentially imbalanced data distributions, and (2) compositional generalization, where specific combinations of concepts are systematically held out. To study these regimes, we introduce mosaic (Multi-Object Spatial relations, AttrIbution, Counting), a controlled framework for dataset generation. By training diffusion models on mosaic, we find that scene complexity plays a dominant role rather than concept imbalance, and that counting is uniquely difficult to learn in low-data regimes. Moreover, compositional generalization collapses as more concept combinations are held out during training. These findings highlight fundamental limitations of diffusion models and motivate stronger inductive biases and data design for robust multi-object compositional generation.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现文本到图像扩散模型在多对象生成中的不可靠性主要源于场景复杂性和组合泛化能力的缺乏，而非数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在多对象生成中表现不可靠，尽管有大量实证证据，但根本原因尚不明确，需要探究数据本身在多大程度上造成了这些限制。
AI.method: 提出mosaic框架来生成控制性数据集，通过不同训练集规模下的概念泛化和组合泛化实验来分析模型性能，训练扩散模型并评估其在多对象场景中的表现。
AI.result: 研究发现场景复杂性是主导因素而非概念不平衡，计数在低数据环境下特别难学习；当训练时排除更多概念组合时，组合泛化能力会崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现揭示了扩散模型的基本局限，强调了需要更强的归纳偏置和更好的数据设计来实现鲁棒的多对象组合生成。

title: Why Do LLMs Struggle in Strategic Play? Broken Links Between Observations, Beliefs, and Actions
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly tasked with strategic decision-making under incomplete information, such as in negotiation and policymaking. While LLMs can excel at many such tasks, they also fail in ways that are poorly understood. We shed light on these failures by uncovering two fundamental gaps in the internal mechanisms underlying the decision-making of LLMs in incomplete-information games, supported by experiments with open-weight models Llama 3.1, Qwen3, and gpt-oss. First, an observation-belief gap: LLMs encode internal beliefs about latent game states that are substantially more accurate than their own verbal reports, yet these beliefs are brittle. In particular, the belief accuracy degrades with multi-hop reasoning, exhibits primacy and recency biases, and drifts away from Bayesian coherence over extended interactions. Second, a belief-action gap: The implicit conversion of internal beliefs into actions is weaker than that of the beliefs externalized in the prompt, yet neither belief-conditioning consistently achieves higher game payoffs. These results show how analyzing LLMs' internal processes can expose systematic vulnerabilities that warrant caution before deploying LLMs in strategic domains without robust guardrails.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型在不完全信息游戏决策中存在两个关键缺陷：观察-信念差距（内部信念比口头报告更准确但易碎）和信念-行动差距（内部信念到行动的转换效果较差）。
AI.motivation: LLM被越来越多地用于谈判和政策制定等不完全信息下的战略决策，但它们在这些任务中会以难以理解的方式失败，需要深入理解其失败机制。
AI.method: 通过对Llama 3.1、Qwen3和gpt-oss等开源模型进行实验，分析LLM在不完全信息游戏中的内部决策机制。
AI.result: 发现了观察-信念差距（内部信念更准确但脆弱，存在多步推理退化、首尾近因效应偏差和贝叶斯一致性漂移）和信念-行动差距（内部信念比外部化信念对行动影响更弱，且都不能稳定获得更高收益）。
AI.conclusion: LLM的内部过程分析揭示了其系统性漏洞，在战略领域部署LLM前需要强大的防护措施，需要谨慎对待。

title: An End-to-End Decision-Aware Multi-Scale Attention-Based Model for Explainable Autonomous Driving
summary: The application of computer vision is gradually increasing across various domains. They employ deep learning models with a black-box nature. Without the ability to explain the behavior of neural networks, especially their decision-making processes, it is not possible to recognize their efficiency, predict system failures, or effectively implement them in real-world applications. Due to the inevitable use of deep learning in fully automated driving systems, many methods have been proposed to explain their behavior; however, they suffer from flawed reasoning and unreliable metrics, which have prevented a comprehensive understanding of complex models in autonomous vehicles and hindered the development of truly reliable systems. In this study, we propose a multi-scale attention-based model in which driving decisions are fed into the reasoning component to provide case-specific explanations for each decision simultaneously. For quantitative evaluation of our model's performance, we employ the F1-score metric, and also proposed a new metric called the Joint F1 score to demonstrate the accurate and reliable performance of the model in terms of Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI). In addition to the BDD-OIA dataset, the nu-AR dataset is utilized to further validate the generalization capability and robustness of the proposed network. The results demonstrate the superiority of our reasoning network over the classic and state-of-the-art models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度注意力的驾驶决策可解释模型，能够为每个驾驶决策提供针对性解释，并通过新的联合F1分数指标验证了其在自动驾驶可解释性方面的优越性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统深度学习模型的黑盒特性阻碍了对其决策过程的理解，现有可解释方法存在推理缺陷和指标不可靠问题，阻碍了真正可靠自动驾驶系统的发展。
AI.method: 设计了多尺度注意力模型，将驾驶决策输入推理组件，为每个决策同步生成案例特定解释；提出联合F1分数新指标进行定量评估；在BDD-OIA和nu-AR数据集上验证模型性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明所提出的推理网络在经典和最先进模型中表现出优越性能，验证了模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为自动驾驶系统的决策可解释性提供了有效解决方案，通过独特网络架构和新评估指标推动了可解释AI在自动驾驶领域的实际应用。

title: Persona-Grounded Safety Evaluation of AI Companions in Multi-Turn Conversations
summary: There are growing concerns about the risks posed by AI companion applications designed for emotional engagement. Existing safety evaluations often rely on self-reported user data or interviews, offering limited insights into real-time dynamics. We present the first end-to-end scalable framework for controlled simulation and safety evaluation of multi-turn interactions with AI companion applications. Our framework integrates four key components: persona construction with clinical and psychometric validation, persona-specific scenario generation, scenario-driven multi-turn simulation with a dialogue refinement module that preserves persona fidelity, and harm evaluation. We apply this framework to evaluate how Replika, a widely used AI companion app, responds to high-risk user groups. We construct 9 personas representing individuals with depression, anxiety, PTSD, eating disorders, and incel identity, and collect 1,674 dialogue pairs across 25 high-risk scenarios. We combine emotion modeling and LLM-assisted utterance-and harm-level classification to analyze these exchanges. Results show that Replika exhibits a narrow emotional range dominated by curiosity and care, while frequently mirroring or normalizing unsafe content such as self-harm, disordered eating, and violent-fantasy narratives. These findings highlight how controlled persona simulations can serve as a scalable testbed for evaluating safety risks in AI companions.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个评估AI伴侣应用安全性的端到端框架，通过构建高风险人群画像进行模拟对话，发现Replika应用存在情感表达狭隘和传播有害内容的安全隐患。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伴侣应用的安全性评估主要依赖用户自述数据或访谈，无法深入分析实时交互动态，亟需建立一个可控的模拟评估框架来系统识别安全风险。
AI.method: 开发了包含四个核心组件的框架：经过临床和心理学验证的画像构建、画像特定的场景生成、带对话保真度优化模块的多轮模拟交互、以及伤害评估。针对Replika应用构建了9个高风险人群（抑郁、焦虑、PTSD、饮食失调、incel等）画像，收集25个高风险场景下的1,674组对话。
AI.result: Replika表现出狭隘的情感范围（以好奇和关怀为主），频繁反映或正常化自残、饮食失调、暴力幻想等不安全内容，存在安全隐患。
AI.conclusion: 受控的画像模拟可作为评估AI伴侣安全风险的可扩展测试平台，为AI安全性研究提供了新的评估方法。

title: Efficient Spatio-Temporal Vegetation Pixel Classification with Vision Transformers
summary: Plant phenology-the study of recurrent life cycle events-is essential for understanding ecosystem dynamics and their responses to climate change impacts. While Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and near-surface cameras enable high-resolution monitoring, identifying plant species across time remains computationally challenging. State-of-the-art approaches, specifically Multi-Temporal Convolutional Networks (CNNs), rely on rigid multi-branch architectures that scale poorly with longer time series and require large spatial context windows. In this paper, we present an extensive study on optimizing Vision Transformers (ViTs) for efficient spatio-temporal vegetation pixel classification. We conducted a comprehensive ablation study analyzing seven key design dimensions, including: (i) data normalization; (ii) spectral arrangement; (iii) boundary handling; (iv) spatial context window shape and size; (v) tokenization strategies; (vi) positional encoding; and (vii) feature aggregation strategies. Our method was evaluated on two datasets from the Brazilian Cerrado biome, Serra do Cipó (aerial imagery) and Itirapina (near-surface imagery). Experimental results demonstrate that our ViT approach offers a substantial improvement in computational efficiency while maintaining competitive classification performance. Notably, our ViT reduces Floating Point Operations (FLOPs) by an order of magnitude and maintains constant parameter complexity regardless of the time series length, whereas the CNN baseline scales linearly. Our findings confirm that ViTs are a robust, scalable solution for resource-constrained phenological monitoring systems.

AI.tldr: 研究优化视觉变换器(ViTs)用于高效时空植被像素分类，相比传统CNN方法大幅提升计算效率
AI.motivation: 植物物候学对理解生态系统和气候变化响应至关重要，但现有UAV和近地面相机监测方法中的物种识别计算复杂，传统多时间卷积网络架构僵化，随时间序列扩展性能差
AI.method: 对ViT进行全面的消融研究，分析7个关键设计维度：数据归一化、光谱排列、边界处理、空间上下文窗口形状和大小、标记化策略、位置编码和特征聚合策略
AI.result: 在巴西Cerrado生物群落数据集上验证，ViT方法将浮点运算量降低一个数量级，且参数复杂度保持恒定，而CNN基线随时间序列长度线性增长
AI.conclusion: ViTs是资源受限物候监测系统的稳健、可扩展解决方案，在保持竞争性分类性能的同时显著提升计算效率

title: Estimating LLM Grading Ability and Response Difficulty in Automatic Short Answer Grading via Item Response Theory
summary: Automated short answer grading (ASAG) with large language models (LLMs) is commonly evaluated with aggregate metrics such as macro-F1 and Cohen's kappa. However, these metrics provide limited insight into how grading performance varies across student responses of differing grading difficulty. We introduce an evaluation framework for LLM-based ASAG based on item response theory (IRT), which models grading correctness as a function of latent grader ability and response grading difficulty. This formulation enables response-level analysis of where LLM graders succeed or fail and reveals robustness differences that are not visible from aggregate scores alone. We apply the framework to 17 open-weight LLMs on the SciEntsBank and Beetle benchmarks. The results show that even models with similar overall performance differ substantially in how sharply their grading accuracy declines as response difficulty increases. In addition, confusion patterns show that errors on difficult responses concentrate disproportionately on the \texttt{partially\_correct\_incomplete} label, indicating a tendency toward intermediate-label collapse under ambiguity. To characterize difficult responses, we further analyze semantic and linguistic correlates of estimated difficulty. Across both datasets, higher difficulty is associated with weaker semantic alignment to the reference answer, stronger contradiction signals, and greater semantic isolation in embedding space. Overall, these results show that item response theory offers a useful framework for evaluating LLM-based ASAG beyond aggregate performance measures.

AI.tldr: 研究提出基于项目反应理论(IRT)的评估框架，用于分析大语言模型在自动简答题评分中不同难度学生回答的表现差异，揭示了传统聚合指标无法发现的评估鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的LLM自动简答题评分主要使用宏F1和Cohen's kappa等聚合指标，但不能充分展示评分性能在不同难度学生回答上的变化情况，缺乏对评分器能力和回答难度的深入分析。
AI.method: 引入基于项目反应理论的评估框架，将评分正确性建模为潜在评分器能力和回答评分难度的函数，进行响应级别分析，应用于17个开源LLM在SciEntsBank和Beetle基准测试上。
AI.result: 研究发现即使整体性能相似的模型，在回答难度增加时评分准确率下降幅度存在显著差异；困难回答的错误过度集中在'partially_correct_incomplete'标签上；较高难度与参考答案语义对齐较弱、矛盾信号更强、嵌入空间语义隔离度更大相关。
AI.conclusion: 项目反应理论为评估基于LLM的自动简答题评分提供了超越聚合性能指标的有用框架，能够揭示评分器在不同难度条件下的行为模式。

title: Beyond Visual Fidelity: Benchmarking Super-Resolution Models for Large-Scale Remote Sensing Imagery via Downstream Task Integration
summary: Super-resolution (SR) techniques have made major advances in reconstructing high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs. The increased resolution provides visual enhancement and utility for monitoring tasks. In particular, SR has been increasingly developed for satellite-based Earth observation, with applications in urban planning, agriculture, ecology, and disaster response. However, existing SR studies and benchmarks typically use fidelity metrics such as PSNR or SSIM, whereas the true utility of super-resolved images lies in supporting downstream tasks such as land cover classification, biomass estimation, and change detection. To bridge this gap, we introduce GeoSR-Bench, a downstream task-integrated SR benchmark dataset to evaluate SR models beyond fidelity metrics. GeoSR-Bench comprises spatially co-located, temporally aligned, and quality-controlled image pairs from about 36,000 locations across diverse land covers, spanning resolutions from 500m to 0.6m. To the best of our knowledge, GeoSR-Bench is the first SR benchmark that directly connects improved image resolution from SR models with downstream Earth monitoring tasks, including land cover segmentation, infrastructure mapping, and biophysical variable estimation. Using GeoSR-Bench, we benchmark GAN, transformer, neural operator, and diffusion-based SR models on perceptual quality and downstream task performance. We conduct experiments with 270 settings, covering 2 cross-platform SR tasks, 9 SR models, 3 downstream task models, and 5 downstream tasks for each SR task. The results show that improvements in traditional SR metrics often do not correlate with gains in task performance, and the correlations can be negative, indicating that these metrics provide limited guidance for selecting superior models for downstream tasks. This reveals the need to integrate downstream tasks into SR model development and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GeoSR-Bench基准数据集，首次将下游任务评估整合到超分辨率(SR)模型评测中，通过大量实验证明传统SR指标与下游任务性能不相关。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率研究主要使用PSNR、SSIM等保真度指标评估，但SR图像的真正价值在于支撑下游地球监测任务，需要建立更贴近实际应用的评估体系。
AI.method: 构建GeoSR-Bench数据集，包含36,000个空间配准、时间对齐的图像对，分辨率从500m到0.6m；在270种设置下对GAN、transformer、神经算子和扩散模型进行多维度评测。
AI.result: 传统SR指标的改进与下游任务性能无正相关关系，甚至可能负相关，说明现有指标无法有效指导面向下游应用的SR模型选择。
AI.conclusion: 需要在SR模型开发和评估中整合下游任务，建立任务导向的评估体系对实际应用具有重要意义。

title: Lost in State Space: Probing Frozen Mamba Representations
summary: Mamba's recurrent state h_t is, by construction, a compressed summary of every token seen so far. This raises a tempting hypothesis: if we extract token-level outputs y_t at fixed patch boundaries, we obtain semantic sentence summaries for free, with no pooling head, no fine-tuning, and no [CLS] token. We test this hypothesis carefully. Across five benchmarks (SST-2, CoLA, MRPC, STS-B, IMDb), we compare four strategies for extracting frozen sentence representations from a pretrained Mamba-130M backbone under a strict frozen-feature probing protocol, using three random seeds where computationally feasible. The results do not support the hypothesis: patch boundary readouts do not consistently outperform simple mean pooling. We identify and quantify two structural pathologies: severe anisotropy (mean pairwise cosine similarity 0.9999, std 0.000044) and representational collapse in the raw final SSM state (MCC = 0.000 on CoLA across all three seeds, confirmed via confusion matrix). We further propose orthogonal injection, a modified recurrence that constrains new information per

AI.tldr: 研究发现Mamba模型的循环状态无法直接提取出有效的句子表示，存在严重的各向异性和表示坍塌问题。
AI.motivation: 基于Mamba模型的循环状态h_t本质上是所有已见token的压缩摘要，研究者假设可以通过固定补丁边界提取token级输出获得免费的语义句子摘要，无需池化头、微调或[CLS]标记。
AI.method: 在严格的冻结特征探查协议下，使用预训练的Mamba-130M作为骨干网络，在五个基准数据集(SST-2, CoLA, MRPC, STS-B, IMDb)上比较四种提取冻结句子表示的策略，使用多个随机种子进行验证。
AI.result: 结果不支持原始假设：补丁边界读取不如简单的平均池化性能稳定。发现了两个结构性问题：严重各向异性(平均余弦相似度0.9999)和原始最终SSM状态的表示坍塌(CoLA数据集MCC=0.000)。
AI.conclusion: Mamba模型的循环状态无法直接生成高质量的句子表示，需要改进方法。研究者提出了正交注入约束新信息的修改循环机制来解决问题。

title: Online Self-Calibration Against Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) often suffer from hallucinations, generating descriptions that include visual details absent from the input image. Recent preference alignment methods typically rely on supervision distilled from stronger models such as GPT. However, this offline paradigm introduces a Supervision-Perception Mismatch: the student model is forced to align with fine-grained details beyond its perceptual capacity, learning to guess rather than to see. To obtain reliable self-supervision for online learning, we identify a Generative-Discriminative Gap within LVLMs, where models exhibit higher accuracy on discriminative verification than open-ended generation. Leveraging this capability, we propose \textbf{O}nline \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{CA}lib\textbf{R}ation (OSCAR), a framework that integrates Monte Carlo Tree Search with a Dual-Granularity Reward Mechanism to construct preference data and iteratively refines the model via Direct Preference Optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OSCAR achieves state-of-the-art performance on hallucination benchmarks while improving general multimodal capabilities.

AI.tldr: OSCAR是一个通过在线自校准框架来减少大型视觉语言模型幻觉问题的方法，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索和双重粒度奖励机制构建偏好数据进行直接偏好优化。
AI.motivation: 现有的偏好对齐方法依赖于更强模型(如GPT)的离线监督，导致了监督-感知不匹配问题：学生模型被迫学习超出其感知能力的细节，学会了猜测而非真正观察。
AI.method: 发现LVLMs中存在生成-判别差距，模型在判别验证任务上比开放式生成任务表现更好。基于此，提出OSCAR框架，集成蒙特卡洛树搜索与双重粒度奖励机制，构建偏好数据并通过直接偏好优化迭代改进模型。
AI.result: 实验表明OSCAR在幻觉基准测试中达到最优性能，同时提升了通用的多模态能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用模型自身的判别能力和在线学习机制，OSCAR有效地解决了LVLMs的幻觉问题，避免了传统方法中依赖外部监督的局限性。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Chartered Accountancy
summary: The inception of Large Language Models (LLMs) has catalyzed AI adoption in the finance sector, yet their reliability in complex, jurisdiction-specific tasks like Indian Chartered Accountancy (CA) remains limited. The models display difficulty in executing numerical tasks which require multiple steps while also needing advanced knowledge about legal regulations and the method of scaling their operations is not feasible in settings which have limited access to resources. We present CA-ThinkFlow as a parameter-efficient Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework which operates with a 14B, 4-bit-quantized reasoning model, 14B-DeepSeek-R1, and a layout-aware Docling extraction system which maintains document structure during extraction. CA-ThinkFlow uses a basic RAG method which automatically adds retrieved information into the prompt, while it depends on the model's built-in Chain-of-Thought (CoT) functions to create context and produce correct answers. The system we developed system operates at performance levels which match large proprietary models when we tested it on the multi-level CA-Ben benchmark, achieving Scholastic Reliability Coefficient (SRC) results which equal 68.75\% of GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. The framework shows high efficiency and strength in handling parameters, but essential reasoning abilities fail to process complex regulatory texts which exist in fields such as Taxation.

AI.tldr: CA-ThinkFlow是一个参数高效的RAG框架，专门针对印度特许会计任务，使用14B量化模型，性能达到GPT-4o等大模型的68.75%
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在复杂的、特定司法管辖区的任务（如印度特许会计）中可靠性有限，难以处理多步数值计算，需要法律法规知识，且在资源受限环境中扩展成本高昂
AI.method: 采用参数高效的检索增强生成框架，结合14B位4比特量化的DeepSeek-R1推理模型和布局感知的Docling提取系统，使用基础RAG方法自动添加检索信息，依赖模型内置的CoT功能
AI.result: 在多级CA-Ben基准测试中，其Scholastic Reliability Coefficient达到GPT-4o和Claude 3.5 Sonnet的68.75%，展现了高效率和参数处理能力
AI.conclusion: 框架在效率和参数处理方面表现优异，但在处理税务等复杂法规文本的推理能力仍存在不足

title: Pose-Aware Diffusion for 3D Generation
summary: Generating pose-aligned 3D objects is challenging due to the spatial mismatches and transformation ambiguities inherent in decoupled canonical-then-rotate paradigms. To this end, we introduce Pose-Aware Diffusion (PAD), a novel end-to-end diffusion framework that synthesizes 3D geometry directly within the observation space. By unprojecting monocular depth into a partial point cloud and explicitly injecting it as a 3D geometric anchor, PAD abandons canonical assumptions to enforce rigorous spatial supervision. This native generation intrinsically resolves pose ambiguity, producing high-fidelity pose-aligned assets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PAD achieves superior geometric alignment and image-to-3D correspondence compared to state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, PAD naturally extends to compositional 3D scene reconstruction via a simple union of independently generated objects, highlighting its robust ability to preserve precise spatial layouts.

AI.tldr: PAD是一种端到端扩散框架，直接在观测空间中合成姿态对齐的3D物体，通过将单目深度反投影为部分点云作为几何锚点，解决了传统方法的姿态模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 传统的解耦式规范空间然后旋转的生成范式存在空间不匹配和变换模糊性问题，难以生成姿态对齐的高质量3D物体。
AI.method: 提出Pose-Aware Diffusion框架，将单目深度反投影为部分点云并作为3D几何锚点显式注入，在观测空间中直接进行端到端的3D几何合成。
AI.result: PAD在几何对齐和图像到3D对应关系方面优于现有方法，能够生成高保真度的姿态对齐资产，并可通过简单组合独立生成的物体扩展到组合式3D场景重建。
AI.conclusion: PAD通过在观测空间中直接生成3D几何并利用深度锚点，有效解决了姿态模糊性问题，实现了精确的空间布局保持和高质量的3D物体合成。

title: How Language Models Process Out-of-Distribution Inputs: A Two-Pathway Framework
comment: 30 pages, 3 figures, 30+ tables. Submitted to COLM 2026
summary: Recent white-box OOD detection methods for LLMs -- including CED, RAUQ, and WildGuard confidence scores -- appear effective, but we show they are structurally confounded by sequence length (|r| >= 0.61) and collapse to near-chance under length-matched evaluation. Even raw attention entropy (mean H(alpha) across heads and layers), a natural baseline we include for completeness, shows the same confound. The confound stems from attention's Theta(log T) dependence on input length. To identify genuine OOD signals after deconfounding, we propose a two-pathway framework: embeddings capture what text is about (effective for topic shifts), while the processing trajectory -- hidden-state evolution across layers -- captures how the model processes input. The relative power of each pathway varies along a vocabulary-transparency spectrum: embedding methods excel on vocabulary-distinctive OOD, while trajectory features detect covert-intent inputs that share vocabulary with normal text (0.721 avg AUROC; Jailbreak: 0.850). Three evidence lines support this framework: (1) a crossover between k-NN and trajectory scoring across 6 tasks, where each pathway wins on different OOD types; (2) a per-layer analysis showing that layer-0 k-NN signal is almost entirely a length artifact (Jailbreak: 0.759 raw -> 0.389 matched) -- processing constructs genuine OOD signal from near-chance embeddings; and (3) circuit attribution showing adversarial tasks engage attention circuits more than semantic tasks (p = 0.022; Jailbreak patching p < 0.001), with partial cross-model replication. Code release upon publication.

AI.tldr: 现有LLM白盒OOD检测方法被序列长度混淆，作者提出双路径框架解混淆：嵌入路径检测主题偏移，处理轨迹路径检测隐蔽意图，性能达0.721 AUROC。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM的OOD检测方法在长度匹配评估下效果接近随机猜测，存在严重的序列长度混淆问题，需要寻找真正有效的OOD信号。
AI.method: 提出双路径框架：1)嵌入路径捕获文本主题信息；2)处理轨迹路径分析隐藏状态跨层演化。通过k-NN和轨迹评分的组合，分别处理不同类型的OOD输入。
AI.result: 在长度匹配评估下，传统方法性能从0.759降至0.389，而新方法达到0.721平均AUROC，越狱检测达0.850。电路归因分析证实对抗任务更多依赖注意力电路。
AI.conclusion: OOD检测需要区分词汇透明性：嵌入方法适合词汇显性偏移，轨迹方法适合隐蔽意图。处理轨迹能从接近随机的嵌入中构建真正的OOD信号。

title: CURE-OOD: Benchmarking Out-of-Distribution Detection for Survival Prediction
summary: ``How long can I live and remain free of cancer?'' is often the first question a patient asks after receiving a cancer diagnosis and treatment. Accurate survival prediction helps alleviate psychological distress and supports risk stratification and personalized treatment planning. Recent survival prediction frameworks have shown strong performance using computed tomography (CT) images. However, variations in imaging acquisition introduce out-of-distribution (OOD) samples caused by covariate shifts that undermine model reliability. Despite this challenge, to our knowledge, no existing benchmark systematically studies OOD detection in cancer survival prediction. To address this gap, we introduce the Cancer sURvival bEnchmark for OOD Detection (CURE-OOD), the first benchmark for systematically evaluating OOD detection in survival prediction under controlled acquisition-induced distribution shifts. CURE-OOD defines scanner-parameter-based training, in-distribution (ID), and OOD test splits across four survival prediction tasks. Our experiments show that covariate shifts notably reduce survival prediction performance. It also shows that mainstream classification-oriented OOD detectors can fail in survival prediction. Finally, we include HazardDev as a simple survival-aware reference baseline for OOD detection. CURE-OOD enables systematic analysis of how distribution shifts affect both downstream survival performance and OOD detectability.

AI.tldr: CURE-OOD是首个癌症生存预测中离群值检测(OOD)的系统基准，用于评估由成像采集变化导致的分布偏移对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 癌症患者在诊断后最关心生存预期，现有基于CT图像的生存预测框架虽然表现良好，但成像采集的变异性导致的分布偏移会降低模型可靠性，而目前缺乏系统性研究OOD检测的基准。
AI.method: 构建CURE-OOD基准，定义基于扫描仪参数的训练、同分布和OOD测试集，涵盖四个生存预测任务，并提出HazardDev作为生存感知的OOD检测基线方法。
AI.result: 实验表明协变量偏移显著降低生存预测性能，主流面向分类的OOD检测器在生存预测任务中表现不佳，同时验证了CURE-OOD基准的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CURE-OOD基准能够系统分析分布偏移对下游生存性能和OOD可检测性的影响，为提高癌症生存预测模型的可靠性提供了重要工具。

title: Are You the A-hole? A Fair, Multi-Perspective Ethical Reasoning Framework
summary: Standard methods for aggregating natural language judgments, such as majority voting, often fail to produce logically consistent results when applied to high-conflict domains, treating differing opinions as noise. We propose a neuro-symbolic aggregation framework that formalizes conflict resolution through Weighted Maximum Satisfiability (MaxSAT). Our pipeline utilizes a language model to map unstructured natural language explanations into interpretable logical predicates and confidence weights. These components are then encoded as soft constraints within the Z3 solver, transforming the aggregation problem into an optimization task that seeks the maximum consistency across conflicting testimony. Using the Reddit r/AmItheAsshole forum as a case study in large-scale moral disagreement, our system generates logically coherent verdicts that diverge from popularity-based labels 62% of the time, corroborated by an 86% agreement rate with independent human evaluators. This study demonstrates the efficacy of coupling neural semantic extraction with formal solvers to enforce logical soundness and explainability in the aggregation of noisy human reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经符号聚合框架，通过MaxSAT解决自然语言判断聚合的逻辑一致性问题，在Reddit道德争议数据上取得86%人工评估一致率。
AI.motivation: 传统聚合方法(如多数投票)在高冲突领域无法产生逻辑一致的结果，将不同意见视为噪声，无法有效处理大规模道德争议。
AI.method: 构建神经符号聚合管道：使用语言模型将非结构化解释映射为可解释逻辑谓词和置信度权重，然后将这些组件编码为Z3求解器中的软约束，将聚合问题转化为寻求最大一致性的优化任务。
AI.result: 在Reddit r/AmItheAsshole论坛的道德争议案例中，系统生成逻辑一致的判决，62%的时间与基于流行度的标签不同，获得86%的独立人工评估者一致率。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了将神经语义提取与形式求解器相结合的有效性，能够在噪声人类推理的聚合中强制执行逻辑合理性和可解释性。

title: Time-series Meets Complex Motion Modeling: Robust and Computational-effective Motion Predictor for Multi-object Tracking
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is critical in numerous real-world applications, including surveillance, autonomous driving, and robotics. Accurately predicting object motion is fundamental to MOT, but current methods struggle with the complexities of real-world, non-linear motion (e.g., sudden stops, sharp turns). While recent research has gravitated towards increasingly complex and computationally expensive generative models to tackle this problem, their practical utility is often constrained. This paper challenges that paradigm, arguing that such complexity is not only unnecessary but can be outperformed by a more efficient, purpose-built approach. We introduce the Temporal Convolutional Motion Predictor (TCMP), a novel framework for MOT that leverages a modified Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) featuring dilated convolutions and a regression head. This design allows for effective motion prediction across arbitrary temporal context lengths. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, specifically improves upon the previous best method in several key metrics: HOTA (a measure of overall tracking accuracy) increases from 62.3% to 63.4%, IDF1 (a measure of identity preservation) rises from 63.0% to 65.0%, and AssA (a measure of association accuracy) improves from 47.2% to 49.1%. Significantly, TCMP achieves this performance while being highly efficient; it has only 0.014 times the parameters and requires only 0.05 times the computational cost (FLOPs) compared to the SOTA method. while is only 0.014 times the size (in terms of parameters) and requires only 0.05 times the computational cost (in terms of FLOPs). These findings highlight the robustness of our method to advance MOT systems by ensuring adaptability, accuracy, and efficiency in complex tracking environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时序卷积网络(TCN)的运动预测框架TCMP，在多目标跟踪任务中以极低计算成本(参数量仅为SOTA的1.4%，计算量仅为5%)实现了更高的跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 当前多目标跟踪方法在处理复杂非线性运动时存在挑战，而现有的解决方案往往采用复杂且计算昂贵的生成模型，实用性受限。
AI.method: 提出了时序卷积运动预测器(TCMP)，采用包含扩张卷积和回归头的改进型时序卷积网络，能够在任意时间长度上下文中有效预测物体运动。
AI.result: 在多个关键指标上超越了之前的最佳方法：HOTA从62.3%提升到63.4%，IDF1从63.0%提升到65.0%，AssA从47.2%提升到49.1%，同时仅需1.4%的参数量和5%的计算代价。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果证明了TCMP方法在复杂跟踪环境中具有强大的适应性和效率，为推进多目标跟踪系统提供了一种既准确又高效的解决方案，挑战了需要复杂模型才能获得高性能的现有范式。

title: What Don't You Understand? Using Large Language Models to Identify and Characterize Student Misconceptions About Challenging Topics
summary: This study presents a systematic approach to identifying and characterizing student misconceptions in online learning environments through a novel combination of quantitative performance analysis and large language model (LLM) assessment. We analyzed data from 9 course periods across 5 online biomedical science courses, encompassing 3,802 medical student enrollments. Using data from 40-50 topic-focused quizzes per course, we developed a two-stage methodology. First, we identified challenging central topics using quiz-level performance metrics. Second, we employed LLMs to characterize the underlying misconceptions in these high-priority areas. By examining student performance on first attempts across primarily multiple-choice questions (MCQs), we identified consistently challenging topics that were also central to course objectives. We then leveraged recent advances in generative AI to analyze three distinct data sources in combination: quiz question content, student response patterns, and lecture transcripts. This approach revealed actionable insights about student misconceptions that were not apparent from performance data alone. The quality of the LLM-identified misconceptions was rated as excellent by subject matter experts. We also conducted teacher interviews to assess the perceived utility of our topic identification method. Faculty found that data-driven identification of challenging topics was valuable and corroborated their own classroom observations. This methodology provides a scalable approach to characterizing student difficulties in learning environments where quizzes are used. Our findings demonstrate the potential for targeted and potentially personalized interventions in future course iterations, with clear pathways for measuring intervention effectiveness through follow-up quiz performance.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合定量性能分析和LLM评估的系统方法，用于识别和描述在线学习环境中学生的错误概念，通过分析9个课程周期的3802名学生数据，证实了该方法的可行性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 在在线学习环境中，如何系统性地识别和理解学生的错误概念是一个重要挑战。传统的性能分析只能发现学生表现不佳的领域，但无法深入理解背后的具体错误认知。随着大规模在线课程的普及，需要一种可扩展的方法来深入了解学生的困难，以便提供更有针对性的教学干预。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法论：第一阶段通过测验级别的性能指标识别具有挑战性的核心主题；第二阶段利用大语言模型(LLM)分析三个数据源（测验题目内容、学生答题模式、讲座转录文本）来描述高优先级领域中的潜在错误概念。研究者分析了40-50个主题导向测验中学生的首次尝试表现。
AI.result: 研究发现了一些始终具有挑战性的主题，这些主题也是课程目标的核心。LLM识别的错误概念质量被学科专家评为优秀。教师访谈显示，数据驱动的主题识别方法具有价值性，并验证了他们的课堂观察。该方法揭示了仅从性能数据本身无法获得的关于学生错误概念的可行见解。
AI.conclusion: 这种结合定量分析和LLM评估的方法论为在使用测验的学习环境中描述学生困难提供了可扩展的解决方案。研究结果展示了在未来课程迭代中进行有针对性且潜在个性化干预的潜力，为通过后续测验表现衡量干预效果提供了明确的路径。

title: Flow matching for Sentinel-2 super-resolution: implementation, application, and implications
comment: 41 pages, 16 figures, 7 tables. Submitted in ISPRS Open Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing
summary: Developing robust techniques for super-resolution of satellite imagery involves navigating commonly observed trade-offs between spectral fidelity and perceptual quality. In this work, we introduce a flow matching model for 4x super-resolution of 10-m Sentinel-2 visible and near-infrared bands over the conterminous United States (CONUS) using a dataset of 120,851 10-m Sentinel-2 and 2.5-m resampled NAIP imagery pairs acquired on the same day. Our results showed that the flow matching model outperformed diffusion and Real-ESRGAN models in pixel-wise accuracy in a single sampling step using the Euler method. When evaluated with a second-order Midpoint solver, our model generated perceptually realistic super-resolved imagery in only 20 sampling steps, effectively navigating the perception-distortion trade-off at inference time without retraining. We used this model to produce a super-resolved 2.5-m 4-band CONUS imagery product derived from 2025 10-m Sentinel-2 annual composites, consisting of over 1.58 trillion pixels. We further evaluated the use of super-resolved data on a land cover classification task using semantic segmentation models. Finally, we generated a yearly 2.5-m land cover product for the Chesapeake Bay watershed for 2020-2025. An accuracy assessment against 25,000 ground truth points revealed an overall accuracy of 89.11% for the annual land cover product. We conclude that flow matching is an effective generative modeling approach for super-resolution of Sentinel-2 imagery compared to diffusion and Generative Adversarial Network-based methods, and has strong implications for expanding access to high-resolution imagery for geospatial applications that demand fine spatial detail.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于流匹配的卫星图像超分辨率方法，在10米分辨率的Sentinel-2图像上实现4倍超分辨率，优于扩散模型和GAN方法。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像超分辨率技术面临光谱保真度与感知质量之间的权衡问题，需要开发能够有效平衡这一矛盾的新方法。
AI.method: 使用120,851对Sentinel-2和NAIP图像训练流匹配模型，采用Euler方法和Midpoint求解器进行推理，生成超分辨率图像。
AI.result: 流匹配模型在单步采样中像素级准确率优于扩散和Real-ESRGAN模型，20步采样即可生成感知真实的超分辨率图像；生产了包含1.58万亿像素的CONUS区域超分辨率产品；土地覆盖分类总体准确率达89.11%。
AI.conclusion: 流匹配是Sentinel-2图像超分辨率的有效生成建模方法，在无需重新训练的情况下解决了感知-失真权衡，为需要精细空间细节的地理空间应用提供了高分辨率图像获取途径。

title: Structure-Aware Chunking for Tabular Data in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
comment: 5 Pages, 1 figure, 4 Tables, 1 Algorithm, Work In Progress
summary: Tabular documents such as CSV and Excel files are widely used in enterprise data pipelines, yet existing chunking strategies for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) are primarily designed for unstructured text and do not account for tabular structure. We propose a structure-aware tabular chunking (STC) framework that operates on row-level units by constructing a hierarchical Row Tree representation, where each row is encoded as a key-value block. STC performs token-constrained splitting aligned with structural boundaries and applies overlap-free greedy merging to produce dense, non-overlapping chunks. This design preserves semantic relationships between fields within a row while improving token utilization and reducing fragmentation. Across evaluations on the MAUD dataset, STC reduces chunk count by up to 40% and 56% compared to standard recursive and key-value based baselines, respectively, while improving token utilization and processing efficiency. In retrieval benchmarks, STC improves MRR from 0.3576 to 0.5945 in a hybrid setting and increases Recall@1 from 0.366 to 0.754 in BM25-only retrieval. These results demonstrate that preserving structure during chunking improves retrieval performance, highlighting the importance of structure-aware chunking for RAG over tabular data.

AI.tldr: 提出结构感知表格分块框架STC，通过构建行树表示和键值块编码，在保留表格结构的同时显著提升检索性能和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的RAG分块策略主要针对非结构化文本设计，无法有效处理CSV、Excel等表格数据的结构特征，导致检索性能低下和资源浪费。
AI.method: STC框架构建分层行树表示，将每行编码为键值块，执行受令牌限制的结构边界对齐分割，并应用无重叠贪婪合并生成密集非重叠块。
AI.result: 在MAUD数据集上，STC相比递归基线减少40%块数，相比键值基线减少56%；混合检索MRR从0.3576提升至0.5945，BM25检索的Recall@1从0.366提升至0.754。
AI.conclusion: 保持表格结构的分块方法能显著改善检索性能，证明了结构感知分块对于表格数据RAG的重要性。

title: RTPrune: Reading-Twice Inspired Token Pruning for Efficient DeepSeek-OCR Inference
summary: DeepSeek-OCR leverages visual-text compression to reduce long-text processing costs and accelerate inference, yet visual tokens remain prone to redundant textual and structural information. Moreover, current token pruning methods for conventional vision-language models (VLMs) fail to preserve textual fidelity due to improper compression mechanisms. By analyzing the decoding process of DeepSeek-OCR, we find that a distinct two-stage reading trajectory: the model initially prioritizes the majority of high-norm tokens, then subsequently redistributes its attention to the remaining ones. Motivated by this insight, we propose RTPrune, a two-stage token pruning method tailored for DeepSeek-OCR. In the first stage, we prioritize high-norm visual tokens that capture salient textual and structural information. In the second stage, the remaining tokens are paired and merged based on optimal transport theory to achieve efficient feature aggregation. We further introduce a dynamic pruning ratio that adapts to token similarity and textual density for OCR tasks, enabling a better efficiency-accuracy trade-off. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, as evidenced by 99.47% accuracy and 1.23$\times$ faster prefill on OmniDocBench, achieved with 84.25% token retention when applied to DeepSeek-OCR-Large.

AI.tldr: RTPrune是一种针对DeepSeek-OCR的双阶段视觉token剪枝方法，通过优先处理高范数token并基于最优传输理论合并剩余token，在保持99.47%准确率的同时实现1.23倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: DeepSeek-OCR虽然通过视觉-文本压缩降低了长文本处理成本，但视觉token仍存在冗余的文本和结构信息。现有VLM的token剪枝方法因压缩机制不当无法保持文本保真度。
AI.method: 提出双阶段剪枝方法：第一阶段优先处理捕捉显著文本和结构信息的高范数视觉token；第二阶段基于最优传输理论对剩余token进行配对合并实现高效特征聚合；引入动态剪枝比例适应token相似性和文本密度。
AI.result: 在OmniDocBench数据集上，应用于DeepSeek-OCR-Large时实现99.47%准确率和1.23倍预填充加速，token保留率为84.25%，达到业界领先性能。
AI.conclusion: RTPrune通过分析DeepSeek-OCR的两阶段阅读轨迹特征，提供了针对OCR任务定制的高效token剪枝解决方案，在效率-精度权衡上表现优异。

title: Prompt-Induced Score Variance in Zero-Shot Binary Vision-Language Safety Classification
summary: Single-prompt first-token probabilities from zero-shot vision-language model (VLM) safety classifiers are treated as decision scores, but we show they are unreliable under semantically equivalent prompt reformulation: even when the binary label is constrained to a fixed output position, equivalent prompts can induce materially different unsafe probabilities for the same sample. Across multimodal safety benchmarks and multiple VLM families, cross-prompt variance is strongly associated with prompt-level disagreement and higher error, making it a useful fragility diagnostic. A training-free mean ensemble improves NLL on all 14 dataset-model evaluation pairs and ECE on 12/14 relative to a train-selected single-prompt baseline, and wins more head-to-head NLL comparisons than labeled temperature scaling, Platt scaling, and isotonic regression applied to the same prompt. Ranking gains are consistent against the train-selected baseline on both AUROC and AUPRC, and against the full 15-prompt distribution remain consistent on AUPRC while softening on AUROC. Labeled calibration on top of the mean provides further gains when labels are available, identifying prompt averaging as a strong label-free first stage rather than a replacement for calibration. We frame this as a reliability stress test for zero-shot VLM first-token safety scores and recommend prompt-family evaluation with mean aggregation as a standard label-free reliability baseline.

AI.tldr: 研究发现零样本视觉语言模型的安全分类器在语义等价的提示词下会产生不可靠的安全概率，而通过无训练的提示词平均集成方法可以显著提升模型的可靠性和校准性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本VLM安全分类器使用单提示词的首词概率作为决策分数，但发现即使在二分类标签固定的情况下，语义等价的提示词重构仍会导致同一样本产生明显不同的不安全概率，这种提示词敏感性影响模型可靠性。
AI.method: 提出无训练的均值集成方法，将多个语义等价提示词的首词概率进行平均；对比了温度缩放、Platt缩放和等温回归等传统校准方法；在14个数据集-模型对上评估NLL、ECE、AUROC和AUPRC指标。
AI.result: 均值集成在所有14个评估对上改善了NLL，在12/14对上改善了ECE；在排序性能上，AUROC和AUPRC相对训练选择的单提示词基线都有提升；有标签校准可进一步带来增益。
AI.conclusion: 提示词平均是一个强大的无标签预处理步骤，而非校准的替代品；建议将提示词族评估与均值聚合作为标准的无标签可靠性基线，用于零样本VLM安全分数的可靠性压力测试。

title: SIMON: Saliency-aware Integrative Multi-view Object-centric Neural Decoding
summary: Recent EEG-to-image retrieval methods leverage pretrained vision encoders and foveation-inspired priors, but typically assume a fixed, center-focused view. This center bias conflicts with content-driven human attention, creating a geometric-semantic dissociation between visual features and EEG responses. We propose SIMON, a saliency-aware multi-view framework for zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval. SIMON combines foreground segmentation and saliency prediction to select fixation centers via Saliency-Aware Sampling (SAS), then generates foveated views that emphasize informative object regions while suppressing background clutter. On THINGS-EEG, SIMON achieves state-of-the-art performance in both intra-subject and inter-subject settings, reaching an average Top-1 accuracy of 69.7% and 19.6%, respectively, consistently outperforming recent competitive baselines. Analyses across sampling granularity, EEG channel topology, and visual/brain encoder backbones further support the robustness of saliency-aware multi-view integration. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/simonlink666/SIMON.

AI.tldr: SIMON是一个新颖的显著感知多视图框架，通过结合前景分割和显著性预测选择注视中心，生成强调目标的中心凹视图，显著提升了EEG到图像检索的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG到图像检索方法存在中心偏置问题，固定中心视角与内容驱动的人类注意力冲突，导致视觉特征与EEG响应之间存在几何-语义脱节。
AI.method: 提出显著感知采样(SAS)方法，结合前景分割和显著性预测选择注视中心，生成强调信息物体区域并抑制背景杂波的中心凹视图，构建多视图集成框架。
AI.result: 在THINGS-EEG数据集上达到SOTA性能，受试者内和跨受试者设置的Top-1准确率分别为69.7%和19.6%，在各分析维度下均展现出强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 显著感知的多视图集成能有效解决几何-语义脱节问题，为EEG到图像检索提供了新思路，代码和模型已开源。

title: Budget-Aware Routing for Long Clinical Text
summary:
A key challenge for large language models is token cost per query and overall deployment cost. Clinical inputs are long, heterogeneous, and often redundant, while downstream tasks are short and high stakes. We study budgeted context selection, where a subset of document units is chosen under a strict token budget so an off-the-shelf generator can meet fixed cost and latency constraints. We cast this as a knapsack-constrained subset selection problem with two design choices, unitization that defines document segmentation and selection that determines which units are kept.
  We propose \textbf{RCD}, a monotone submodular objective that balances relevance, coverage, and diversity. We compare sentence, section, window, and cluster-based unitization, and introduce a routing heuristic that adapts to the budget regime.
