Experiments on MIMIC discharge notes, Cochrane abstracts, and L-Eval show that optimal strategies depend on the evaluation setting. Positional heuristics perform best at low budgets in extractive tasks, while diversity-aware methods such as MMR improve LLM generation. Selector choice matters more than unitization, with cluster-based grouping reducing performance and other schemes behaving similarly. ROUGE saturates for LLM summaries, while BERTScore better reflects quality differences. We release our code at https://github.com/stone-technologies/ACL_budget_paper.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在严格token预算下选择临床文档子集的方法RCD，通过平衡相关性、覆盖率和多样性的子模优化目标，有效降低大语言模型在临床任务上的部署成本。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在临床应用中面临高昂的token成本和部署成本，临床输入文档通常冗长且冗余，而下游任务简短且重要，需要在固定成本和延迟约束下选择最相关的文档子集。
AI.method: 将问题建模为背包约束的子集选择问题，提出RCD单调子模目标函数平衡相关性、覆盖率和多样性，比较了句子、章节、窗口和聚类等单元化方案，并引入适应预算范围的路由启发式算法。
AI.result: 实验表明最优策略取决于评估设置：低预算时位置启发式在抽取任务中表现最佳，而基于多样性的MMR等方法在LLM生成中效果更好；选择器选择比单元化更重要，聚类分组会降低性能；ROUGE在LLM摘要中趋于饱和，BERTScore能更好反映质量差异。
AI.conclusion: 预算化上下文选择是一个具有挑战性的优化问题，RCD方法为临床文档的token成本控制提供了有效解决方案，选择器策略和评估指标的选择对结果影响显著。

title: BOLT: Online Lightweight Adaptation for Preparation-Free Heterogeneous Cooperative Perception
summary: Most existing heterogeneous cooperative perception methods depend on prior preparation like offline joint training or tailored collaborator-model adaptation. Such preprocessing is, however, generally impractical in real scenarios, as agents are usually independently trained by different developers and meet occasionally online. This work investigates \emph{preparation-free heterogeneous cooperative perception}, where agents use independently trained single-agent detectors without any pre-deployment coordination. We find direct cross-agent fusion under this setting greatly underperforms ego-only perception. We present BOLT, a lightweight plug-and-play module that adapts neighboring features online via ego-as-teacher distillation, requiring only ego predictions without ground-truth labels. BOLT leverages high-confidence ego perception features to guide cross-agent feature-domain alignment, while enabling neighbors to contribute features in the ego's low-confidence regions. With only 0.9M trainable parameters, BOLT improves AP@50 by up to 32.3 points over vanilla unadapted fusion in the preparation-free setting. It consistently outperforms ego-only results on DAIR-V2X and OPV2V, across different encoder pairs and fusion strategies. Code: https://github.com/sidiangongyuan/BOLT.

AI.tldr: BOLT是一种轻量级模块，通过在线知识蒸馏实现无需预先协调的异构多智能体协同感知，显著提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的异构协同感知方法需要离线联合训练或定制化适配，这在实际场景中不可行，因为不同开发者训练的智能体是独立且偶尔在线相遇的。
AI.method: 提出BOLT模块，利用自智能体预测作为教师信号进行在线知识蒸馏，通过高置信度自感知特征指导跨智能体特征域对齐，让邻近智能体在自智能体低置信度区域贡献有用特征。
AI.result: 在无需准备的设定下，BOLT仅用0.9M可训练参数就在AP@50指标上比原始未适配融合提升32.3点，且在不同编码器对和融合策略下始终超越仅自感知结果。
AI.conclusion: BOLT实现了真正的即插即用式异构协同感知，无需预部署协调即可有效融合独立训练的智能体特征，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Making Every Verified Token Count: Adaptive Verification for MoE Speculative Decoding
summary: Tree-based speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive generation by verifying multiple draft candidates in parallel, but this advantage weakens for sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. As the draft tree grows, different branches activate different experts, expanding the union of activated experts and substantially increasing target-side verification cost. We propose EVICT, a training-free, hyperparameter-free, and lossless adaptive verification method for MoE speculative decoding. EVICT makes every verified token count by truncating the draft tree before target verification and retaining only the cost-effective prefix. It leverages fine-grained drafter signals to estimate candidate benefit, combines them with offline-profiled verification cost, and remains highly compatible with the high-performance graph-based serving framework SGLang. Extensive experiments on diverse MoE backbones and benchmarks show that EVICT achieves up to 2.35x speedup over autoregressive decoding and an average 1.21x speedup over the state-of-the-art baseline EAGLE-3, while significantly reducing unnecessary expert activations during verification.

AI.tldr: EVICT是一种训练自由、超参数自由且无损的自适应验证方法，专门用于加速MoE模型的推测解码，通过在验证前截断草稿树并保留性价比高的前缀，实现显著加速并减少不必要的专家激活。
AI.motivation: 基于树的推测解码虽然能并行验证多个草稿候选来加速自回归生成，但这一优势在稀疏MoE模型中会明显减弱。当草稿树增长时，不同分支会激活不同的专家，导致激活专家的并集扩大，从而显著增加目标端验证成本。
AI.method: EVICT方法通过在目标验证前截断草稿树，仅保留性价比高的前缀；利用细粒度的草稿信号来估计候选效益，结合离线分析的验证成本；与高性能基于图的服务框架SGLang高度兼容，实现训练自由、超参数自由的自适应验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，EVICT在各种MoE主干网络和基准测试上相比自回归解码实现最高2.35倍加速，相比最先进基线EAGLE-3平均实现1.21倍加速，同时在验证过程中显著减少不必要的专家激活。
AI.conclusion: EVICT成功解决了MoE模型中推测解码的效率瓶颈问题，通过智能的草稿树截断策略在不损失生成质量的前提下显著提升推理速度，为MoE模型的高效部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: Beyond Heuristics: Learnable Density Control for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary:
While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has demonstrated impressive real-time rendering performance, its efficacy remains constrained by a reliance on heuristic density control. Despite numerous refinements to these handcrafted rules, such methods inherently lack the flexibility to adapt to diverse scenes with complex geometries.
  In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift for density control from rigid heuristics to fully learnable policies. Specifically, we introduce \textbf{LeGS}, a framework that reformulates density control as a parameterized policy network optimized via Reinforcement Learning (RL). Central to our approach is the tailored effective reward function grounded in sensitivity analysis, which precisely quantifies the marginal contribution of individual Gaussians to reconstruction quality. To maintain computational tractability, we derive a closed-form solution that reduces the complexity of reward calculation from $O(N^2)$ to $O(N)$. Extensive experiments on the Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks \& Temples, and Deep Blending datasets demonstrate that \textbf{LeGS} significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, striking a superior balance between reconstruction quality and efficiency. The code will be released at https://github.com/AaronNZH/LeGS

AI.tldr: LeGS通过强化学习的可学习策略替代3D高斯溅射中的手工密度控制规则，实现了更好的重建质量和效率平衡。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射依赖启发式密度控制，这些手工规则缺乏适应复杂几何场景的灵活性，限制了其性能表现。
AI.method: 提出LeGS框架，将密度控制重构为参数化策略网络，通过强化学习优化。基于敏感性分析设计特定的奖励函数，并推导出闭式解将奖励计算复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N)。
AI.result: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks & Temples和Deep Blending数据集上，LeGS显著优于现有方法，在重建质量和效率之间实现了更好的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 从刚性启发式到可学习策略的范式转变证明了强化学习在3D高斯溅射密度控制中的有效性，为适应多样化复杂场景提供了更灵活的解决方案。

title: MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents
summary: Long-term conversational agents must decide which turns to store in external memory, yet recent systems rely on autoregressive LLM generation at every turn to make that decision. We present MemRouter, a write-side memory router that decouples memory admission from the downstream answer backbone and replaces per-turn memory-management decoding with an embedding-based routing policy. MemRouter encodes each turn together with recent context, projects the resulting embeddings through a frozen LLM backbone, and predicts whether the turn should be stored using lightweight classification heads while training only 12M parameters. Under a controlled matched-harness comparison on LoCoMo, where the retrieval pipeline, answer prompts, and QA backbone (Qwen2.5-7B) are held identical, MemRouter outperforms an LLM-based memory manager on every question category (overall F1 52.0 vs 45.6, non-overlapping 95% CIs) while reducing memory-management p50 latency from 970ms to 58ms. Descriptive factorial averaging further shows that learned admission improves mean F1 by +10.3 over random storage, category-specific prompting adds +5.2 over a generic prompt, and retrieval contributes +0.7. These results suggest that write-side memory admission can be learned by a small supervised router, while answer generation remains a separate downstream component in long-horizon conversational QA.

AI.tldr: MemRouter是一种基于嵌入的内存路由器，用轻量级分类头替代LLM的每轮内存管理解码，显著降低延迟并提升性能
AI.motivation: 长期对话代理需要决定哪些对话轮次存储到外部内存中，但现有系统每轮都依赖自回归LLM生成来做决策，效率低下
AI.method: MemRouter将每个轮次与最近上下文一起编码，通过冻结的LLM主干投影嵌入，使用仅需训练12M参数的轻量级分类头预测是否存储
AI.result: 在LoCoMo数据集上，MemRouter在所有问题类别上均优于基于LLM的内存管理器（F1：52.0 vs 45.6），内存管理延迟从970ms降至58ms
AI.conclusion: 写端内存准入机制可通过小型监督路由器学习，答案生成长期对话QA中仍保持为独立的下游组件

title: LIMSSR: LLM-Driven Sequence-to-Score Reasoning under Training-Time Incomplete Multimodal Observations
summary: Real-world multimodal learning is often hindered by missing modalities. While Incomplete Multimodal Learning (IML) has gained traction, existing methods typically rely on the unrealistic assumption of full-modal availability during training to provide reconstruction supervision or cross-modal priors. This paper tackles the more challenging setting of IML under training-time incomplete observations, which precludes reliance on a ``God's eye view'' of complete data. We propose LIMSSR (LLM-Driven Incomplete Multimodal Sequence-to-Score Reasoning), a framework that reformulates this challenge as a conditional sequence reasoning task. LIMSSR leverages the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models via Prompt-Guided Context-Aware Modality Imputation and Multidimensional Representation Fusion to infer latent semantics from available contexts without direct reconstruction. To mitigate hallucinations, we introduce a Mask-Aware Dual-Path Aggregation to dynamically calibrate inference uncertainty. Extensive experiments on three Action Quality Assessment datasets demonstrate that LIMSSR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines without relying on complete training data, establishing a new paradigm for data-efficient multimodal learning. Code is available at https://github.com/XuHuangbiao/LIMSSR.

AI.tldr: LIMSSR是一个基于LLM的不完整多模态学习框架，通过序列推理替代传统重建方法，在缺少完整训练数据的情况下实现高效的多模态融合。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态学习方法假设训练时所有模态都可用（'上帝视角'），但现实场景中训练数据也常常不完整，需要新的范式解决这个问题。
AI.method: 将不完整多模态学习重新表述为条件序列推理任务，采用提示引导的上下文感知模态填充和多维表示融合推理潜在语义，并引入掩码感知双路径聚合机制来动态校准推理不确定性。
AI.result: 在三个动作质量评估数据集上的实验表明，LIMSSR无需依赖完整训练数据就显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: LIMSSR为数据高效的多模态学习建立了新的范式，证明了在不完整训练数据的现实约束下仍能实现高性能多模态学习。

title: From Backward Spreading to Forward Replay: Revisiting Target Construction in LLM Parameter Editing
summary: LLM parameter editing methods commonly rely on computing an ideal target hidden-state at a target layer (referred as anchor point) and distributing the target vector to multiple preceding layers (commonly known as backward spreading) for cooperative editing. Although widely used for a long time, its underlying basis have not been systematically investigated. In this paper, we first conduct a systematic study of its foundations, which helps clarify its capability boundaries, practical considerations, and potential failure modes. Then, we propose a simple and elegant alternative that replaces backward spreading with forward-propagation. Instead of optimizing the target at the last editing layer, we optimize the anchor point at the first editing layer, and then propagate it forward to obtain accurate and mutually compatible target hidden-states for all subsequent editing layers. This approach achieves the same computational complexity as existing methods while producing more accurate layer-wise targets. Our method is simple, without interfering with either the computation of the initial target hidden state or any other components of the subsequent editing pipeline, and thus constituting a benefit for a wide range of LLM parameter editing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的LLM参数编辑方法，用前向传播替代传统的反向传播，通过在第一层优化锚点并向前传播来获得更准确的层间目标状态，具有相同计算复杂度但精度更高。
AI.motivation: 传统的LLM参数编辑方法依赖反向传播技术，但其底层原理缺乏系统研究，存在能力边界不清、实际考虑不足和潜在失败模式等问题，需要更深入的分析和改进。
AI.method: 首先系统研究了传统反向传播方法的基础，明确了其能力边界和潜在问题。然后提出前向传播替代方案：在第一编辑层优化锚点，通过前向传播为所有后续编辑层生成准确且相互兼容的目标隐藏状态。
AI.result: 新方法在保持与现有方法相同计算复杂度的同时，产生了更精确的层间目标。方法简单优雅，不干扰其他编辑组件，可广泛应用于各种LLM参数编辑方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统研究传统方法的基础并创新性地采用前向传播机制，本方法为LLM参数编辑提供了更可靠、更高效的解决方案，具有重要的理论意义和实用价值。

title: Scaling Video Understanding via Compact Latent Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) advance vision language understanding but face inherent limitations in long-video tasks due to bounded perception context budgets. Existing agentic methods mitigate this via rule-based preprocessing, yet often suffer from information loss, high cost, and reliance on textual intermediates. We propose MACF, an end-to-end Multi-Agent Collaboration Framework that decouples per-agent perception budgets from global video complexity, enabling scalable video understanding while preserving visual fidelity. MACF partitions videos into segments for locally budgeted agents and enables holistic reasoning via an agent-native latent communication protocol. Each agent encodes partial observations into compact, task-sufficient tokens in a shared embedding space, allowing efficient and information-preserving collaboration by a central coordinator. We introduce a curriculum training strategy that progressively enforces semantic alignment, evidence summarization, and cross-agent coordination. Extensive experiments on diverse video understanding benchmarks show that MACF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art MLLMs and multi-agent systems under identical budget constraints, demonstrating the effectiveness of our latent collaboration for scalable video understanding.

AI.tldr: MACF是一个端到端的多智能体协作框架，通过本地预算智能体分割视频并使用隐式通信协议，实现了可扩展的长视频理解。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在长视频任务中面临感知上下文预算受限的问题，而现有的智能体方法通过基于规则的预处理往往会造成信息损失、成本高昂且依赖文本中介。
AI.method: 提出MACF框架，将视频分割给本地预算智能体，通过智能体原生的隐式通信协议实现整体推理。每个智能体将部分观察编码为紧凑的任务充分token，中央协调器通过共享嵌入空间实现高效且信息保留的协作。引入课程训练策略逐步强化语义对齐、证据总结和跨智能体协调。
AI.result: 在多个视频理解基准测试中，MACF在相同预算约束下始终优于最先进的MLLMs和多智能体系统，证明了隐式协作在可扩展视频理解中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MACF通过解耦单个智能体的感知预算与全局视频复杂度，在保持视觉保真度的同时实现了可扩展的视频理解，为长视频理解任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: Unlearning What Matters: Token-Level Attribution for Precise Language Model Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning has emerged as a critical capability for addressing privacy, safety, and regulatory concerns in large language models (LLMs). Existing methods operate at the sequence level, applying uniform updates across all tokens despite only a subset encoding the knowledge targeted for removal. This introduces gradient noise, degrades utility, and leads to suboptimal forgetting. We propose TokenUnlearn, a token-level attribution framework that identifies and selectively targets critical tokens. Our approach combines knowledge-aware signals via masking, and entropy-aware signals to yield importance scores for precise token selection. We develop two complementary strategies: hard selection, applying unlearning only to high-importance tokens, and soft weighting, modulating gradient contributions based on importance scores. Both extend existing methods to token-level variants. Theoretical analysis shows token-level selection improves gradient signal-to-noise ratio. Experiments on TOFU and WMDP benchmarks across three model architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over sequence-level baselines in both forgetting effectiveness and utility preservation.

AI.tldr: TokenUnlearn 是一种标记级别的机器反学习框架，通过精确识别和定位关键标记来改进大型语言模型的反学习效果，在保持模型效用的同时显著提升 forgetting 性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的机器反学习方法在序列级别操作，对所有标记统一更新，但实际只有部分标记编码了需要删除的知识，这种方法引入梯度噪声、降低模型效用，导致反学习效果次优。
AI.method: 提出标记级别的归因框架 TokenUnlearn，结合知识感知（通过掩码）和熵感知信号计算标记重要性分数，并开发两种策略：硬选择（仅对高重要性标记反学习）和软权重（根据重要性分数调节梯度贡献）。
AI.result: 在 TOFU 和 WMDP 基准测试上，三种模型架构的实验表明，TokenUnlearn 在遗忘效果和效用保持方面均优于序列级别的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 标记级别的选择能够改善梯度信噪比，理论分析和实验结果证明了 TokenUnlearn 框架的有效性，为隐私、安全和监管需求下的 LLM 反学习提供了更精确的解决方案。

title: Learning from Compressed CT: Feature Attention Style Transfer and Structured Factorized Projections for Resource-Efficient Medical Image Analysis
summary: The deployment of artificial intelligence in medical imaging is hindered by high computational complexity and resource-intensive processing of volumetric data. Although chest computed tomography (CT) volumes offer richer diagnostic information than projection radiography, their use in AI-based diagnosis remains limited due to the computational burden of processing uncompressed volumetric images (typically stored in NIfTI or DICOM format). Addressing the growing need for low-resource deployment and efficient electronic data transfer, we investigate the utilization of JPEG-compressed chest CT volumes for thoracic abnormality detection. We propose Feature Attention Style Transfer (FAST), a novel distillation framework that transfers both activation patterns and structural relationships from high-fidelity CT representations to a spatiotemporal visual encoder operating on compressed inputs. By combining Gram-matrix-based attention style preservation with dual-attention feature alignment, FAST enables robust feature extraction from degraded volumes. Furthermore, we introduce Structured Factorized Projection (SFP), leveraging Block Tensor Train decomposition as a parameter-efficient alternative to dense projection layers, reducing projection-head parameters by almost half. Our contrastive learning pipeline, CT-Lite, integrates these components with a SigLIP-based multimodal alignment objective. Experiments on CT-RATE, NIDCH, and Rad-ChestCT demonstrate that CT-Lite achieves AUROC within 5-7\% of the uncompressed-input baseline across all three datasets, despite operating on compressed inputs with significantly fewer parameters, paving the way for AI-based clinical evaluation under resource constraints.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了CT-Lite框架，通过FAST和SFP技术，在处理JPEG压缩的胸部CT数据时实现了接近未压缩数据5-7%AUROC内的异常检测性能，同时大幅减少了计算资源需求。
AI.motivation: 人工智能在医学影像中的应用受到高计算复杂度和体积数据资源密集处理的阻碍。胸部CT虽然提供更丰富的诊断信息，但由于处理未压缩体积数据的计算负担，其在AI诊断中的应用仍然有限。
AI.method: 提出了特征注意力风格转移(FAST)框架，将激活模式和结构关系从高保真CT表示转移到压缩输入的时空视觉编码器；引入结构化因子投影(SFP)，利用块张量列车分解作为密集投影层的参数高效替代；构建基于SigLIP的多模态对比学习管道CT-Lite。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，CT-Lite在压缩输入下实现了与未压缩基线相比5-7%AUROC内的性能，同时使用了显著更少的参数。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为在资源约束条件下实现基于AI的临床评估铺平了道路，通过使用压缩的CT数据和高效的算法架构，成功平衡了计算效率与诊断准确性。

title: Language-free Experience at Expo 2025 Osaka
summary: In line with the Global Communication Plan 2025, we have pursued the development of multilingual translation technologies to realize a language-barrier-free experience at Expo 2025 Osaka. Our work includes the advancement of simultaneous interpretation systems emphasizing high translation quality and low latency. Key achievements include chunk-based input segmentation, context-aware translation, and multi-engine machine translation technologies. Through demonstration deployments and collaboration with private companies, our technologies have led to real-world applications, with several services and systems showcased at Expo 2025 Osaka.

AI.tldr: 本研究为2025年大阪世博会开发了多语言翻译技术，实现了高质量、低延迟的同声传译系统，并在实际场景中得到应用部署。
AI.motivation: 为了配合《全球交流计划2025》，消除2025年大阪世博会的语言障碍，为来自世界各地的参观者提供无缝的交流体验。
AI.method: 开发了基于分块的输入分割技术、上下文感知翻译技术和多引擎机器翻译技术，构建了高质量、低延迟的同声传译系统。
AI.result: 通过演示部署和与私营企业的合作，相关技术已成功应用于实际场景，多个服务和系统在2025年大阪世博会上得到展示。
AI.conclusion: 研究成功实现了世博会环境下的无语言障碍交流体验，证明了多语言翻译技术在国际大型活动中的实用价值和推广前景。

title: From Local to Global to Mechanistic: An iERF-Centered Unified Framework for Interpreting Vision Models
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2026
summary: Modern vision models achieve remarkable accuracy, but explaining where evidence arises, what the model encodes, and how internal computations assemble that evidence remains fragmented. We introduce an iERF-centric framework that unifies local, global, and mechanistic interpretability around a single analysis unit: the pointwise feature vector (PFV) paired with its instance-specific Effective Receptive Field (iERF). On the local side, Sharing Ratio Decomposition (SRD) expresses each PFV as a mixture of upstream PFVs via sharing ratios and propagates iERFs to construct class-discriminative saliency maps. SRD yields high-resolution, activation-faithful explanations, is robust to targeted manipulation and noise, and remains activation-agnostic across common nonlinearities. For the global view, we introduce Concept-Anchored Feature Explanation (CAFE), which utilizes the iERF as a semantic label, grounding abstract latent vectors in verifiable pixel-level evidence. With CAFE, we address the challenge of non-localized sparse autoencoder latents--especially in Transformers, where early self-attention mixes distant context. To answer how representations are composed through depth, we propose the Interlayer Concept Graph with Interlayer Concept Attribution (ICAT), which quantifies concept-to-concept influence while isolating layer pairs; an interlayer insertion, deletion protocol identifies Integrated Gradients as the most faithful instantiation. Empirically, across ResNet50, VGG16, and ViTs, our framework outperforms baselines in both fidelity and robustness, successfully interprets dispersed SAE features, and exposes dominant concept routes in correct, misclassified, and adversarial cases. Grounded in iERFs, our approach provides a coherent, evidence-backed map from pixels to concepts to decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个以iERF为中心的统一框架，通过点状特征向量(PFV)和实例特定有效感受野(iERF)作为基本分析单元，整合了局部、全局和机制性可解释性方法。
AI.motivation: 现代视觉模型虽然准确率很高，但在解释证据来源、模型编码内容以及内部计算机制方面仍然缺乏统一的框架，各种可解释性方法相互独立且碎片化。
AI.method: 框架包含三个主要组件：1) 用于局部解释的共享比率分解(SRD)，通过iERF传播构建类别区分性显著图；2) 用于全局解释的概念锚定特征解释(CAFE)，利用iERF作为语义标签验证抽象特征；3) 用于机制性解释的层间概念图(ICAT)，量化概念间影响并识别集成梯度作为最忠实的实例化方法。
AI.result: 在ResNet50、VGG16和ViTs上的实验表明，该框架在保真度和鲁棒性方面均优于基线方法，能够成功解释分散的SAE特征，并揭示了正确分类、错误分类和对抗样本中的主导概念路径。
AI.conclusion: 基于iERF的方法提供了一个从像素到概念再到决策的连贯、有证据支持的解释映射框架，实现了对不同深度和架构的统一可解释性分析。

title: Agentic AI for Substance Use Education: Integrating Regulatory and Scientific Knowledge Sources
summary: The delivery of traditional substance education has remained problematic due to challenges in scalability, personalization, and the currency of information in a rapidly evolving substance use landscape. While artificial intelligence (AI) offers a promising frontier for enhancing educational delivery, its application in providing real-time, authoritative substance use education remains largely underexplored. We built an agentic-based AI web application that combined Drug Enforcement Administration records with peer-reviewed literature in real-time to provide transparent context-sensitive substance use education. The system uses retrieval-augmented generation with a carefully filtered corpus of 102 documents and dynamic PubMed queries. Document storage was semantically chunked and placed in a vector representation in order to be easily retrieved. We conducted an expert evaluation study in which a panel of five subject matter experts generated 30 domain-specific questions, and two independent raters assessed 90 system interactions (30 primary questions plus two contextual follow-ups each) using a five-point Likert scale across four criteria: factual accuracy, citation quality, contextual coherence, and regulatory appropriateness. Mean ratings ranged from 4.18 to 4.35 across the four criteria (overall category range: 4.05-4.52), with substantial inter-rater agreement (Cohen's kappa = 0.78). These findings suggest that agentic AI architectures integrating authoritative regulatory sources with real-time scientific literature represent a promising direction for scalable, accurate, and verifiable health education delivery, warranting further evaluation through longitudinal user studies.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了一个基于智能代理的AI网络应用，通过整合缉毒局记录和实时文献检索，提供透明的情境化药物使用教育，专家评估显示系统在准确性、引用质量等方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统物质教育面临可扩展性、个性化和信息时效性等挑战，而AI在提供实时、权威的物质使用教育方面的应用尚未充分探索，需要开发新的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发了基于检索增强生成的AI代理系统，整合102篇经过筛选的文献和动态PubMed查询，采用语义分块和向量存储技术，通过专家评估研究验证系统效果。
AI.result: 专家评估显示系统在四个评价标准上的平均评分均在4.18-4.35之间，评价员间一致性程度高(Cohen's kappa = 0.78)，表明系统表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 基于智能代理的AI架构整合权威监管源和实时科学文献是医疗教育的一个有前景方向，值得通过更多的纵向用户研究进一步评估。

title: Leveraging Vision-Language Models as Weak Annotators in Active Learning
summary: Active learning aims to reduce annotation cost by selectively querying informative samples for supervision under a limited labeling budget. In this work, we investigate how vision-language models (VLMs) can be leveraged to further reduce the reliance on costly human annotation within the active learning paradigm. To this end, we find that the reliability of VLMs varies significantly with label granularity in fine-grained recognition tasks: they perform poorly on fine-grained labels but can provide accurate coarse-grained labels. Leveraging this property, we propose an active learning framework that combines fine-grained human annotations with coarse-grained VLM-generated weak labels through instance-wise label assignment. We further model the systematic noise in VLM-generated labels using a small set of trusted full labels. Experiments on CUB200 and FGVC-Aircraft show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing active learning methods under the same annotation budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉语言模型(VLMs)的主动学习框架，利用VLMs在粗粒度标签上的准确性来补充人工细粒度标注，通过实例级标签分配显著降低了标注成本。
AI.motivation: 主动学习旨在通过选择信息量大的样本进行标注来降低标注成本，但传统方法完全依赖昂贵的人工标注。研究者发现VLMs在不同粒度标签上表现差异显著：细粒度标签表现差，但粗粒度标签准确，这为利用VLMs减少人工标注依赖提供了机会。
AI.method: 提出一个主动学习框架，将细粒度人工标注与粗粒度VLM生成的弱标签通过实例级标签分配相结合。使用小量可信的全标签来建模VLM生成标签中的系统性噪声，提高标签质量。
AI.result: 在CUB200和FGVC-Aircraft数据集上的实验表明，在相同标注预算下，所提框架持续优于现有主动学习方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过巧妙结合人工细粒度标注和VLM粗粒度标签的优势，能够有效利用有限的标注资源，为细粒度识别任务提供了一种高效的标注策略。

title: Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
summary: A multi-agent pipeline with N agents typically issues N LLM calls per run. Merging agents into fewer calls (compound execution) promises token savings, but naively merged calls silently degrade quality through tool loss and prompt compression. We present Agent Capsules, an adaptive execution runtime that treats multi-agent pipeline execution as an optimization problem with empirical quality constraints. The runtime instruments coordination overhead per group, scores composition opportunity, selects among three compound execution strategies, and gates every mode switch on rolling-mean output quality. A controlled negative result confirms that injecting more context into a merged call worsens compression rather than relieving it, so the framework's escalation ladder (standard, then two-phase, then sequential) recovers quality by moving toward per-agent dispatch rather than by rewriting merged prompts. On LLM-judged quality, the controller matches a hand-tuned oracle on every measured (model, group, mode) cell: routing compound whenever the oracle would, and reverting to fine whenever quality would fail the floor, without per-model configuration. Against a hand-crafted LangGraph implementation of a 14-agent competitive intelligence pipeline, Agent Capsules uses 51% fewer fine-mode input tokens and 42% fewer compound-mode input tokens, at +0.020 and +0.017 quality respectively. Against a DSPy implementation of a 5-agent due diligence pipeline, the framework uses 19% fewer tokens than uncompiled DSPy at quality parity, and 68% fewer tokens than MIPROv2 at +0.052 quality. Even before compound mode fires, the runtime delivers efficiency through automatic policy resolution, cache-aligned prompts, and topology-aware context injection, matching both hand-tuned and compile-time baselines without training data or per-pipeline engineering.

AI.tldr: Agent Capsules是一种自适应执行运行时，通过优化多智能体管道的执行策略，实现显著的token节省，同时保持或提升输出质量。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体管道每个智能体需要单独进行LLM调用，成本高昂。将多个智能体合并调用虽可节省token，但会因工具丢失和提示压缩导致质量下降，需要智能的解决方案来平衡效率与质量。
AI.method: 提出Agent Capsules框架，将多智能体管道执行视为带质量约束的优化问题。运行时测量每个组的协调开销，评估组合机会，在三种复合执行策略间选择，并通过滚动平均输出质量控制模式切换。采用渐进式升级策略：标准→两阶段→顺序执行。
AI.result: 在14个智能体的竞争情报管道上减少51%的细粒度模式输入token和42%的复合模式输入token，质量分别提升0.020和0.017。在5个智能体的尽职调查管道上比未编译的DSPy节省19% token，质量相当；比MIPROv2节省68% token，质量提升0.052。
AI.conclusion: Agent Capsicles通过自适应执行控制和策略选择，实现了多智能体系统的token效率优化，无需训练数据或按管道工程即可匹配手工调优和编译时基线的性能。其渐进式质量控制机制确保了在追求token节省的同时不会牺牲输出质量。

title: High-Speed Vision Improves Zero-Shot Semantic Understanding of Human Actions
summary:
Understanding human actions from visual observations is essential for human--robot interaction, particularly when semantic interpretation of unfamiliar or hard-to-annotate actions is required. In scenarios such as rapid and less common activities, collecting sufficient labeled data for supervised learning is challenging, making zero-shot approaches a practical alternative for semantic understanding without task-specific training. While recent advances in large-scale pretrained models enable such zero-shot reasoning, the impact of temporal resolution, especially for rapid and fine-grained motions, remains underexplored.
  In this study, we investigate how temporal resolution affects zero-shot semantic understanding of high-speed human actions. Using kendo as a representative case of rapid and subtle motion patterns, we propose a training-free pipeline that combines a pre-trained video-language model for semantic representation with large language model-based reasoning for pairwise action comparison. Through controlled experiments across multiple frame rates (120 Hz, 60 Hz, and 30 Hz), we show that higher temporal resolution significantly improves semantic separability in zero-shot settings. We further analyze the role of tracking-based human joint information under both full and partial observation scenarios. Quantitative evaluation using a nearest-class prototype strategy demonstrates that high-speed video provides more stable and interpretable semantic representations for fast actions. These findings highlight the importance of temporal resolution in training-free action recognition and suggest that high-speed perception can enhance semantic understanding capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过剑道动作案例，探讨了时间分辨率对零样本快速动作语义理解的影响，证明了高帧率视频能显著提升无监督语义识别的稳定性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 在人机交互中，对快速且难以标注的动作进行语义理解具有重要意义。由于收集足够标注数据困难，零样本方法成为实用的替代方案，但时间分辨率对快速动作识别的影响尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出了一个无训练流程，结合预训练视频-语言模型获取语义表示，并使用大语言模型进行成对动作比较。在120Hz、60Hz和30Hz三种帧率下进行对照实验，并分析了基于跟踪的人体关节信息在完整和部分观测场景中的作用。
AI.result: 实验表明，更高的时间分辨率在零样本设置下显著改善了语义可分性。使用最近类原型策略的定量评估证明，高速视频为快速动作提供了更稳定和可解释的语义表示。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了时间分辨率在无训练动作识别中的重要性，表明高速感知能够增强语义理解能力，为快速人机交互应用提供了重要见解。

title: RadLite: Multi-Task LoRA Fine-Tuning of Small Language Models for CPU-Deployable Radiology AI
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in radiology but their deployment is limited by computational requirements that preclude use in resource-constrained clinical environments. We investigate whether small language models (SLMs) of 3-4 billion parameters can achieve strong multi-task radiology performance through LoRA fine-tuning, enabling deployment on consumer-grade CPUs. We train Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B on 162K samples spanning 9 radiology tasks - RADS classification across 10 systems, impression generation, temporal comparison, radiology NLI, NER, abnormality detection, N/M staging, and radiology Q&A - compiled from 12 public datasets. Both models are evaluated on up to 500 held-out test samples per task with standardized metrics. Our key findings are: (1) LoRA fine-tuning dramatically improves performance over zero-shot baselines (RADS accuracy +53%, NLI +60%, N-staging +89%); (2) the two models exhibit complementary strengths - Qwen2.5 excels at structured generation tasks while Qwen3 dominates extractive tasks; (3) a task-outed oracle ensemble combining both models achieves the best performance across all tasks; (4) few-shot prompting with fine-tuned models hurts performance, demonstrating that LoRA adaptation is more effective than in-context learning for specialized domains; and (5) models can be quantized to GGUF format (~1.8-2.4GB) for CPU deployment at 4-8 tokens/second on consumer hardware. Our work demonstrates that small, efficiently fine-tuned models - which we collectively call RadLite - can serve as practical multi-task radiology AI assistants deployable entirely on consumer hardware without GPU requirements.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，通过LoRA微调的小型语言模型（Qwen2.5-3B和Qwen3-4B）可以在消费级CPU上实现高性能的多任务放射学AI助手功能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在放射学领域表现出色，但计算需求过高限制了其在资源受限的临床环境中的部署应用。
AI.method: 使用LoRA微调技术训练Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Qwen3-4B模型，基于12个公共数据集构建的162K样本，涵盖9个放射学任务，并在每个任务的500个测试样本上评估性能。
AI.result: LoRA微调显著提升性能（RADS准确率+53%，NLI+60%，N分期+89%），两模型各具优势，集成模型达到最佳效果，量化后可在消费级硬件上以4-8tokens/秒速度运行。
AI.conclusion: 名为RadLite的小型高效微调模型可以作为实用的多任务放射学AI助手，完全部署在消费级硬件上，无需GPU支持。

title: GOR-IS: 3D Gaussian Object Removal in the Intrinsic Space
summary: Recent advances in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have made it standard practice to reconstruct 3D scenes from multi-view images. Removing objects from such 3D representations is a fundamental editing task that requires complete and seamless inpainting of occluded regions, ensuring consistency in geometry and appearance. Although existing methods have made notable progress in improving inpainting consistency, they often neglect global lighting effects, leading to physically implausible results. Moreover, these methods struggle with view-dependent non-Lambertian surfaces, where appearance varies across viewpoints, leading to unreliable inpainting. In this paper, we present 3D Gaussian Object Removal in the Intrinsic Space (GOR-IS), a novel framework for physically consistent and visually coherent 3D object removal. Our approach decomposes the scene into intrinsic components and explicitly models light transport to maintain global lighting effects consistency. Furthermore, we introduce an intrinsic-space inpainting module that operates directly in the material and lighting domains, effectively addressing the challenges posed by non-Lambertian surfaces. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework substantially improves the physical consistency and visual coherence of object removal, outperforming existing methods by 13% in perceptual similarity (LPIPS) and 2dB in peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR). Code is publicly available at https://applezyh.github.io/GOR-IS-project-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOR-IS框架，通过在内在空间分解场景成分并显式建模光线传输，实现了物理一致且视觉连贯的3D物体移除，在非朗伯表面处理和全局光照效果保持方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D场景物体移除方法忽略了全局光照效果，在处理视角依赖的非朗伯表面时效果不可靠，导致物理不一致的结果。亟需一种能同时保证光照一致性和非朗伯表面处理的解决方案。
AI.method: 该框架将场景分解为内在成分，显式建模光线传输以保持全局光照一致性，并引入在材质和光照领域直接操作的内在空间修复模块，有效应对非朗伯表面挑战。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在物体移除的物理一致性方面显著提升，LPIPS指标改善13%，PSNR提升2dB，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GOR-IS框架通过内在空间分解和光照建模，成功解决了3D物体移除中的光照一致性和非朗伯表面处理难题，为3D场景编辑提供了更物理合理的解决方案。

title: Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation
summary: Mode collapse is a persistent challenge in generative modeling and appears in autoregressive text generation as behaviors ranging from explicit looping to gradual loss of diversity and premature trajectory convergence. We take a dynamical-systems view and reinterpret mode collapse as reduced state-space accessibility caused by *geometric collapse*: during generation, the model's internal trajectory becomes confined to a low-dimensional region of its representation space. This implies mode collapse is not purely a token-level phenomenon and cannot be reliably solved by symbolic constraints or probability-only decoding heuristics. Guided by this perspective, we propose *Reinforced Mode Regulation* (RMR), a lightweight, online state-space intervention that regulates dominant self-reinforcing directions in the Transformer value cache (implemented as low-rank damping). Across multiple large language models, RMR substantially reduces mode collapse and enables stable, high-quality generation at extremely low entropy rates (down to 0.8 nats/step), whereas standard decoding typically collapses near 2.0 nats/step.

AI.tldr: 本文将文本生成中的模式崩溃问题重新解释为几何崩溃现象，并提出了强化模式调节(RMR)方法来解决这个问题。
AI.motivation: 模式崩溃是生成建模中的持续挑战，在自回归文本生成中表现为从显式循环到逐渐失去多样性和过早轨迹收敛等行为。现有的符号约束或纯概率解码启发式方法无法可靠解决这一问题。
AI.method: 作者从动力学系统角度出发，将模式崩溃重新解释为几何崩溃——模型内部轨迹在其表示空间中被限制在低维区域。基于这个观点，提出了强化模式调节(RMR)，这是一种轻量级的在线状态空间干预方法，通过在Transformer值缓存中调节主导自增强方向（实现为低秩阻尼）来防止几何崩溃。
AI.result: 在多个大型语言模型上，RMR显著减少了模式崩溃，能够在极低熵率（低至0.8 nats/步）下实现稳定、高质量的生成，而标准解码通常在2.0 nats/步附近崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明模式崩溃不仅仅是符号层面的现象，而是几何结构问题，RMR方法为解决这一问题提供了有效的新思路，能够在保持高质量的同时实现更稳定的文本生成。

title: End-to-End Autoregressive Image Generation with 1D Semantic Tokenizer
summary: Autoregressive image modeling relies on visual tokenizers to compress images into compact latent representations. We design an end-to-end training pipeline that jointly optimizes reconstruction and generation, enabling direct supervision from generation results to the tokenizer. This contrasts with prior two-stage approaches that train tokenizers and generative models separately. We further investigate leveraging vision foundation models to improve 1D tokenizers for autoregressive modeling. Our autoregressive generative model achieves strong empirical results, including a state-of-the-art FID score of 1.48 without guidance on ImageNet 256x256 generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端训练管道，将视觉分词器和自回归生成模型联合优化，在ImageNet 256x256生成任务上达到了1.48的FID分数，创下了无指导条件下的最新state-of-the-art。
AI.motivation: 传统的自回归图像建模采用两阶段方法，先训练分词器再训练生成模型，缺乏端到端的优化。研究者希望设计一个联合优化框架，让生成结果能直接监督分词器的训练过程。
AI.method: 设计端到端训练管道，将重构损失和生成损失联合优化，实现从生成结果到分词器的直接监督。同时探索利用视觉基础模型来改进1D分词器，提升自回归建模效果。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256x256图像生成任务上，自回归模型达到了1.48的FID分数，这是无指导条件下的最佳性能表现，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 端到端的联合训练策略显著提升了自回归图像生成质量，证明了生成结果直接监督分词器的重要性，为视觉分词器的设计和优化提供了新的思路。

title: Impact of Task Phrasing on Presumptions in Large Language Models
summary: Concerns with the safety and reliability of applying large-language models (LLMs) in unpredictable real-world applications motivate this study, which examines how task phrasing can lead to presumptions in LLMs, making it difficult for them to adapt when the task deviates from these assumptions. We investigated the impact of these presumptions on the performance of LLMs using the iterated prisoner's dilemma as a case study. Our experiments reveal that LLMs are susceptible to presumptions when making decisions even with reasoning steps. However, when the task phrasing was neutral, the models demonstrated logical reasoning without much presumptions. These findings highlight the importance of proper task phrasing to reduce the risk of presumptions in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文通过囚徒困境实验发现，LLMs对任务表述方式敏感，不当表述会导致模型产生预设偏见，而中性表述能促进逻辑推理。
AI.motivation: 出于对大型语言模型在不可预测的真实世界应用中的安全性和可靠性的担忧，研究任务表述如何导致LLMs产生预设偏见并影响其适应性。
AI.method: 以迭代囚徒困境为案例研究，通过实验对比不同任务表述方式下LLMs的决策表现，包括有推理步骤和无推理步骤的情况。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使有推理步骤，LLMs在决策时仍容易受到表述方式的影响而产生预设偏见；当使用中性任务表述时，模型能够进行较少偏见的逻辑推理。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现强调了恰当地表述任务对于降低LLMs中预设偏见风险的重要性，为提升模型安全性和可靠性提供了指导。

title: PhysiGen: Integrating Collision-Aware Physical Constraints for High-Fidelity Human-Human Interaction Generation
summary: Despite substantial progress in text-driven 3D human motion synthesis, generating realistic multi-person interaction sequences remains challenging. Notably, body inter-penetration is a pervasive issue from both data acquisition to the generated results, which significantly undermines the realism and usability. Previous generative models either ignored this issue or introduced computationally expensive mesh-level loss functions to alleviate inter-body collisions. In this paper, we propose a general-purpose and computationally efficient optimization strategy named PhysiGen to explicitly integrate collision-aware physical constraints for human-human interaction generation. Specifically, we simplify the high-resolution human body mesh into geometric primitives to greatly reduce the cost of inter-person collision detection. Moreover, we identify the collision regions as the guidance of the optimization directions. PhysiGen is plug-and-play and can be readily integrated into existing human interaction generation models. Extensive cross-dataset and cross-model experiments show that our method can effectively reduce interpenetration and significantly improve visual coherence and physical plausibility compared to the state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: PhysiGen是一种通用的、计算高效的优化策略，通过简化人体网格为几何原语并识别碰撞区域来指导优化方向，有效解决了3D多人交互生成中普遍存在的身体相互穿透问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本驱动3D人体运动合成方法在生成多人交互序列时存在严重的身体相互穿透问题，这极大地影响了真实性和可用性。传统方法要么忽略此问题，要么引入计算昂贵的网格级损失函数。
AI.method: 提出PhysiGen优化策略：1）将高分辨率人体网格简化为几何原语以降低人际碰撞检测成本；2）识别碰撞区域作为优化方向的指导；3）通过即插即用方式集成到现有的人体交互生成模型中。
AI.result: 跨数据集和跨模型的大量实验表明，与最先进方法相比，PhysiGen能有效减少相互穿透，显著提高视觉连贯性和物理合理性。
AI.conclusion: PhysiGen为3D多人交互生成提供了一种高效、通用的物理约束解决方案，通过简化的几何表示和碰撞引导优化机制，在实际应用中展现出良好的效果和兼容性。

title: ReLay: Personalized LLM-Generated Plain-Language Summaries for Better Understanding, but at What Cost?
summary: Plain Language Summaries (PLS) aim to make research accessible to lay readers, but they are typically written in a one-size-fits-all style that ignores differences in readers' information needs and comprehension. In health contexts, this limitation is particularly important because misunderstanding scientific information can affect real-world decisions. Large language models (LLMs) offer new opportunities for personalizing PLS, but it remains unclear whether personalization helps, which strategies are most effective, and how to balance personalization with safety. We introduce ReLay, a dataset of 300 participant--PLS pairs from 50 lay participants in both static (expert-written) and interactive (LLM-personalized) settings. ReLay includes user characteristics, health information needs, information-seeking behavior, comprehension outcomes, interaction logs, and quality ratings. We use ReLay to evaluate five LLMs across two personalization methods. Personalization improves comprehension and perceived quality, but it also raises the risk of reinforcing user biases and introducing hallucinations, revealing a trade-off between personalization and safety. These findings highlight the need for personalization methods that are both effective and trustworthy for diverse lay audiences.

AI.tldr: 该研究创建了一个包含300个参与者-PLS(通俗语言摘要)对的ReLay数据集，用于研究LLM个性化摘要的效果，发现个性化能提高理解度和质量感知，但也存在强化偏见和安全风险。
AI.motivation: 传统PLS采用一刀切的写作风格，忽略了读者的信息需求和理解能力差异，在健康领域这种局限性尤其重要，因为误解科学信息可能影响现实世界的决策。
AI.method: 构建ReLay数据集，包含50名外行参与者在静态(专家撰写)和交互式(LLM个性化)设置中的300个参与者-PLS对，收集用户特征、健康信息需求、搜索行为、理解结果、交互日志和质量评级，并评估5个LLM在两种个性化方法上的表现。
AI.result: 个性化和确实提高了理解度和感知质量，但同时也存在强化用户偏见和产生幻觉的风险，揭示了个性化与安全性之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了需要开发既有效又可信的个性化方法，以服务于多样化的外行受众，平衡个性化效果与安全性的考量。

title: IdentiFace: Multi-Modal Iterative Diffusion Framework for Identifiable Suspect Face Generation in Crime Investigations
summary: Suspect face generation remains a technical challenge in crime investigations. Traditional sketch-drawing workflows suffer from low efficiency and quality, while diffusion-based approaches still face intrinsic limitations on conditional ambiguity for text-to-image models and sampling variance for one-shot generation. We proposed IdentiFace, a novel diffusion-based framework for identifiable suspect face generation, which addressed these issues through (1) multi-modal input design to strengthen conditional control, and (2) an iterative generation pipeline enabling identifiable feature adjustment. We additionally contributed a facial identity loss and two task-specific datasets. Comprehensive experiments on synthetic datasets and in real-world scenarios indicate that IdentiFace achieves superior performance over existing methods, especially in terms of identity retrieval, and shows strong potential for practical applications.

AI.tldr: IdentiFace是一个新颖的扩散模型框架，通过多模态输入和迭代生成管道实现了可识别的嫌疑人面部生成，在身份检索方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 嫌疑人面部生成在刑事侦查中仍面临技术挑战。传统的素描绘制工作流程效率低、质量差，而基于扩散模型的方法面临文本到图像模型的条件模糊性和一次性生成的采样方差等固有局限性。
AI.method: 提出了IdentiFace框架，通过(1)多模态输入设计来增强条件控制，(2)迭代生成管道实现可识别特征调整。此外贡献了面部身份损失函数和两个任务特定的数据集。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实场景进行的综合实验表明，IdentiFace相比现有方法实现了更优异的性能，特别是在身份检索方面，并在实际应用中展现出强大潜力。
AI.conclusion: IdentiFace通过创新的扩散模型框架有效解决了嫌疑人面部生成中的关键问题，为刑事侦查工具提供了重要的技术进步和实用价值。

title: Surprisal Minimisation over Goal-directed Alternatives Predicts Production Choice in Dialogue
comment: 9 pages, to appear at ACL 2026 (Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics)
summary: We model utterance production as probabilistic cost-sensitive choice over contextual alternatives, using information-theoretic notions of cost. We distinguish between goal-directed alternatives that realise a fixed communicative intent and goal-agnostic alternatives defined only by contextual plausibility, allowing us to derive speaker- and listener-oriented interpretations of different cost measures. We present a procedure to generate both types of alternative sets using language models. Analysing production choices in open-ended dialogue under both deterministic and probabilistic cost minimisation, we find that surprisal minimisation relative to goal-directed alternatives provides the strongest predictive account under both analyses. By contrast, uniform information density and length-based costs exhibit weaker and less consistent predictive power across conditions. More broadly, our study suggests that alternative-conditioned optimisation with LM-generated alternatives provides a principled framework for studying speaker and listener pressures in naturalistic language production.

AI.tldr: 该研究将话语产生建模为基于信息论成本的情境替代选择概率模型，发现相对于目标导向替代的选择惊奇最小化能最有效地预测自然对话中的语言产生。
AI.motivation: 传统语言产生研究往往难以区分说话者和听话者的不同压力约束。本研究旨在建立一个统一框架，通过区分目标导向和目标无关的替代选项，来更好地理解和量化语言产生中不同因素的作用。
AI.method: 提出基于信息论的成本敏感选择模型，使用语言模型生成两种类型（目标导向和目标无关）的替代选项集合，在开放式对话中分析确定性和概率性成本最小化下的产生选择。
AI.result: 实验发现，相对于目标导向替代的惊奇最小化在两种分析下都具有最强的预测能力，而统一信息密度和基于长度的成本在不同条件下表现出较弱且不一致的预测力。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基于语言模型生成替代选项的条件优化框架为研究自然语言产生中的说话者和听话者压力提供了原则性方法，惊奇最小化是解释话语选择的关键机制。

title: Vesselpose: Vessel Graph Reconstruction from Learned Voxel-wise Direction Vectors in 3D Vascular Images
summary: Blood vessel segmentation and -tracing are essential tasks in many medical imaging applications. Although numerous methods exist, the prevailing segment-then-fix paradigm is fundamentally limited regarding its suitability for modeling the task of complete and topologically accurate vascular network reconstruction. Here, we propose an approach to extract topologically more accurate vascular graphs from 3D image data, building upon highly successful ideas from the related biomedical tasks of cell segmentation and -tracking. Our approach first predicts voxel-wise vessel direction vectors joint with standard vessel segmentation masks. Second, to extract the vascular graph from these predictions, we introduce a direction-vector-guided extension of the TEASAR algorithm. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three benchmark datasets, spanning both synthetic and real imagery. We further demonstrate the applicability of our approach to challenging 3D micro-CT scans of rat heart vasculature. Finally, we propose meaningful and interpretable measures of topological error, namely false splits and false merges for graphs. Overall, our approach substantially improves the topological accuracy of reconstructed vascular graphs, being able to separate closely apposed vessel segments and handle multiple vascular trees within a single volume.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于体素级血管方向向量预测和改进TEASAR算法的方法，显著提高了3D血管网络重建的拓扑准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的'先分割后修复'范式在完整且拓扑准确的血管网络重建任务上存在根本性限制，无法有效处理血管网络的复杂拓扑结构和血管树分离问题。
AI.method: 该方法首先联合预测标准血管分割掩码和体素级血管方向向量，然后引入方向向量引导的TEASAR算法扩展版本从预测中提取血管图。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，成功应用于具有挑战性的大鼠心脏血管3D微CT扫描，能够分离紧密相邻的血管段并处理单一体积内的多个血管树。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提高了重建血管图的拓扑准确性，提出了可解释的拓扑误差度量指标（错误分割和错误合并），为血管网络重建提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: ControBench: An Interaction-Aware Benchmark for Controversial Discourse Analysis on Social Networks
summary: Understanding how people argue across ideological divides online is important for studying political polarization, misinformation, and content moderation. Existing datasets capture only part of this problem: some preserve text but ignore interaction structure, some model structure without rich semantics, and others represent conversations without stable user-level ideological identity. We introduce ControBench, a benchmark for controversial discourse analysis that combines heterogeneous social interaction graphs with rich textual semantics. Built from Reddit discussions on three topics, Trump, abortion, and religion, ControBench contains 7,370 users, 1,783 posts, and 26,525 interactions. The graph contains user and post nodes connected by semantically enriched edges; in particular, user-comment-user edges encode both a reply and the parent comment that it responds to, preserving local argumentative context. User labels are derived from self-declared Reddit flairs, providing a scalable proxy for ideological identity without manual annotation. The resulting datasets exhibit low or negative adjusted homophily (Trump: -0.77, Abortion: 0.06, Religion: 0.04), reflecting the cross-cutting structure of real-world debate. We evaluate graph neural networks, pretrained language models, and large language models on ControBench and observe distinct performance patterns across topics and model families, especially when ideological boundaries are ambiguous. These results position ControBench as a challenging and realistic benchmark for controversial discourse analysis.

AI.tldr: ControBench是一个结合了异质社交交互图和丰富文本语义的争议性话语分析基准，包含Reddit三大争议话题的用户互动数据。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在分析跨意识形态网络争论时存在不足：有的只保留文本但忽略交互结构，有的建模结构但缺乏丰富语义，有的对话表示缺少稳定的用户级意识形态身份。
AI.method: 从Reddit关于特朗普、堕胎和宗教的讨论中构建数据集，包含7,370个用户、1,783个帖子和26,525次交互。图中包含用户和帖子节点，边富含语义信息，特别是用户-评论-用户边编码了回复和被回复的父评论。用户标签来源于自声明的Reddit风格，提供意识形态身份的可扩展代理。
AI.result: 数据集表现出低或负的调整同配性（特朗普：-0.77，堕胎：0.06，宗教：0.04），反映了现实世界争论的交叉结构。不同模型在ControBench上表现出不同的性能模式，特别是在意识形态边界模糊时。
AI.conclusion: ControBench为争议性话语分析提供了一个具有挑战性和现实性的基准，能够有效评估各种模型在跨意识形态话语分析中的表现。

title: Colorful-Noise: Training-Free Low-Frequency Noise Manipulation for Color-Based Conditional Image Generation
comment: SIGGRAPH 2026 Conference Paper. Project Page at: https://nadavc220.github.io/colorful-noise/
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models generate images by gradually converting white Gaussian noise into a natural image. White Gaussian noise is well suited for producing diverse outputs from a single text prompt due to its absence of structure. However, this very property limits control over, and predictability of, specific visual attributes, as the noise is not human-interpretable. In this work, we investigate the characteristics of the input noise in diffusion models. We show that, although all frequencies in white Gaussian noise have comparable statistical energy, low-frequency components primarily determine the images global structure and color composition, while high-frequency components control finer details. Building on this observation, we demonstrate that simple manipulations of the low-frequency noise using low-frequency image priors can effectively condition the generation process to reconstruct these low-frequency visual cues. This allows us to define a simple, training-free method with minimal overhead that steers overall image structure and color, while letting high-frequency components freely emerge as fine details, enabling variability across generated outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文发现扩散模型的输入噪声中，低频分量主要控制图像的整体结构和色彩，通过简单操控低频噪声即可有效引导生成过程，提出了一种无需训练的图像生成控制方法。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型使用白高斯噪声作为输入，虽然能产生多样化的输出，但缺乏对视觉属性的可控性和可预测性，因为噪声本身无法被人理解。
AI.method: 研究分析了扩散模型输入噪声的特性，发现低频分量决定图像全局结构和色彩组成，高频分量控制细节。基于此观察，使用低频图像先验对低频噪声进行简单操控来 conditioning 生成过程。
AI.result: 提出了一种简单、无需训练、开销极小的方法，能够有效控制图像的整体结构和颜色，同时保持高频细节的多样性和可变性。
AI.conclusion: 通过操控扩散模型输入噪声的低频分量，可以在不重新训练模型的情况下实现对生成图像特征的有效控制，为图像生成提供了新的可解释性控制手段。

title: AGoQ: Activation and Gradient Quantization for Memory-Efficient Distributed Training of LLMs
summary: Quantization is a key method for reducing the GPU memory requirement of training large language models (LLMs). Yet, current approaches are ineffective for 4-bit activations and 8-bit gradients, which would easily cause slow convergence or accuracy loss. To address this, we introduce AGoQ, incorporating two new techniques: 1) a layer-aware activation quantization algorithm that allocates appropriate bit-widths for activations of various layers based on their types and pipeline stages to achieve near 4-bit activation storage, and 2) a gradient quantization algorithm that reduces memory usage and shortens communication time by employing 8-bit gradient storage and precision-preserving 8-bit All-Reduce communication. We conduct extensive experiments using different sizes of LLMs on two GPU clusters (up to 64 GPUs), and the experimental results show that our AGoQ reduces the memory by up to 52\% and achieves up to 1.34$\times$ improvement of training speed compared to state-of-the-art training systems Megatron-LM (w/ or w/o ZeRO), COAT and DeepSpeed with 8B to 32B LLaMA models, while achieving convergence loss on pretraining and comparable accuracy on downstream tasks with LLaMA architectures.

AI.tldr: AGoQ是一种通过层感知激活量化和8-bit梯度量化技术，显著降低大语言模型训练内存需求并提升训练速度的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的量化方法在处理4-bit激活和8-bit梯度时效果不佳，容易导致收敛缓慢或精度损失，无法有效满足大语言模型训练对GPU内存的优化需求。
AI.method: 提出AGoQ框架，包含两项核心技术：1）层感知激活量化算法，根据层类型和流水线阶段为不同层分配适当比特宽度的激活值；2）梯度量化算法，采用8-bit梯度存储和精度保持的8-bit All-Reduce通信来减少内存使用并缩短通信时间。
AI.result: 在两个GPU集群（最多64个GPU）上对不同规模LLM的实验表明，与Megatron-LM、COAT和DeepSpeed等先进训练系统相比，AGoQ可将内存使用减少高达52%，训练速度提升1.34倍，同时在预训练收敛损失和下游任务精度上保持与LLaMA架构相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: AGoQ通过创新的激活和梯度量化策略，有效解决了现有量化方法在4-bit激活和8-bit梯度场景下的局限性，为大语言模型的高效内存优化和加速训练提供了新的解决方案。

title: Depth-Guided Privacy-Preserving Visual Localization Using 3D Sphere Clouds
summary: The emergence of deep neural networks capable of revealing high-fidelity scene details from sparse 3D point clouds has raised significant privacy concerns in visual localization involving private maps. Lifting map points to randomly oriented 3D lines is a well-known approach for obstructing undesired recovery of the scene images, but these lines are vulnerable to a density-based attack that can recover the point cloud geometry by observing the neighborhood statistics of lines. With the aim of nullifying this attack, we present a new privacy-preserving scene representation called \emph{sphere cloud}, which is constructed by lifting all points to 3D lines crossing the centroid of the map, resembling points on the unit sphere. Since lines are most dense at the map centroid, the sphere cloud mislead the density-based attack algorithm to incorrectly yield points at the centroid, effectively neutralizing the attack. Nevertheless, this advantage comes at the cost of i) a new type of attack that may directly recover images from this cloud representation and ii) unresolved translation scale for camera pose estimation. To address these issues, we introduce a simple yet effective cloud construction strategy to thwart new attack and propose an efficient localization framework to guide the translation scale by utilizing absolute depth maps acquired from on-device time-of-flight (ToF) sensors. Experimental results on public RGB-D datasets demonstrate sphere cloud achieves competitive privacy-preserving ability and localization runtime while not excessively compensating the pose estimation accuracy compared to other depth-guided localization methods.

AI.tldr: 针对基于稀疏3D点云的视觉定位中的隐私泄露问题，本文提出了一种名为sphere cloud的隐私保护场景表示方法，通过将地图点提升为经过地图质心的3D线来抵御密度攻击，并结合ToF传感器深度图实现定位。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络能够从稀疏3D点云中恢复高保真场景细节，这给涉及私有地图的视觉定位带来了严重的隐私担忧。传统的随机定向3D线方法容易受到密度攻击的威胁，需要更安全的隐私保护方案。
AI.method: 提出sphere cloud表示方法，将所有点提升为经过地图质心的3D线，形成类似单位球面上的点分布；设计简单的云构建策略抵御新型攻击；利用设备ToF传感器获取的绝对深度图来引导平移尺度估计。
AI.result: 在公开RGB-D数据集上的实验表明，sphere cloud在隐私保护能力和定位运行时间方面具有竞争力，且在位姿估计精度上与其他深度引导定位方法相比不会过度补偿。
AI.conclusion: sphere cloud通过巧妙的线密度分布有效中和了密度攻击，结合云构建策略和ToF深度图引导解决了新攻击和平移尺度问题，为隐私保护视觉定位提供了实用有效的解决方案。

title: A11y-Compressor: A Framework for Enhancing the Efficiency of GUI Agent Observations through Visual Context Reconstruction and Redundancy Reduction
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted to ACL SRW 2026. Project page: https://iyatomilab.github.io/a11y-compressor/
summary: AI agents that interact with graphical user interfaces (GUIs) require effective observation representations for reliable grounding. The accessibility tree is a commonly used text-based format that encodes UI element attributes, but it suffers from redundancy and lacks structural information such as spatial relationships among elements. We propose A11y-Compressor, a framework that transforms linearized accessibility trees into compact and structured representations. Our implementation, Compressed-a11y, applies a lightweight and structured transformation pipeline with modal detection, redundancy reduction, and semantic structuring. Experiments on the OSWorld benchmark show that Compressed-a11y reduces input tokens to 22% of the original while improving task success rates by 5.1 percentage points on average.

AI.tldr: A11y-Compressor框架将线性的可访问性树压缩为结构化表示，在减少78%输入token的同时将任务成功率提升5.1%。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理 GUI交互中使用的可访问性树存在冗余信息和缺乏结构化信息的缺陷，如元素间的空间关系，这影响了交互的有效性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出A11y-Compressor框架，实现Compressed-a11y工具，通过轻量级结构化处理管道进行模态检测、冗余减少和语义结构化来转换线性化可访问性树。
AI.result: 在OSWorld基准测试中，Compressed-a11y成功将输入tokens减少至原数据的22%，平均任务成功率提升5.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明了结构化和压缩的可访问性表示能够有效提升AI GUI代理的观察质量和交互性能，为GUI自动化任务提供了更高效的解决方案。

title: 2D-SuGaR: Surface-Aware Gaussian Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Mesh Reconstruction
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a powerful technique for generating photorealistic renderings of a scene in real-time. However, the volumetric nature of 3DGS limits its ability to accurately capture surface geometry. To address this, 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) was proposed to enable view-consistent and geometrically accurate surface reconstruction from multi-view images. However, 2DGS can be sensitive to the initialization of the Gaussian primitives. Reliance on Structure-from-Motion (SfM) initializations, which can produce poor estimates on challenging image sets, may lead to subpar results. In this work, we enhance 2DGS by incorporating monocular depth and normal priors to improve both geometric accuracy and robustness. We propose a depth-guided initialization strategy for Gaussians and introduce a clustering-based technique for pruning degenerate Gaussians. We evaluate our method on the DTU dataset, where it achieves state-of-the-art results in mesh reconstruction while preserving high-quality novel view synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文通过融合单目深度和法线先验来改进2D高斯溅射技术，解决了其对SfM初始化敏感的问题，在DTU数据集上实现了最先进的网格重建效果
AI.motivation: 2D高斯溅射技术虽然在表面重建方面优于3DGS，但严重依赖SfM初始化，在挑战性图像集上容易产生较差的估计结果，影响重建质量
AI.method: 提出深度引导的高斯初始化策略，引入基于聚类的技术来剪枝退化高斯，并融入单目深度和法线先验信息来提高几何精度和鲁棒性
AI.result: 在DTU数据集评估中，该方法在保持高质量新视角合成的同时，实现了最先进的网格重建性能
AI.conclusion: 通过结合单目先验信息和改进的初始化/剪枝策略，有效提升了2DGS的几何准确性和鲁棒性，为实时高质量表面重建提供了更可靠的解决方案

title: Structure Liberates: How Constrained Sensemaking Produces More Novel Research Output
summary: Scientific discovery is an extended process of ideation--surveying prior work, forming hypotheses, and refining reasoning--yet existing approaches treat this phase as a brief preamble despite its central role in research. We introduce SCISENSE, a sensemaking-grounded framework that operationalizes ideation as a structured sequence of eight cognitive stages (Pirolli \& Card, 2005). We construct SCISENSE-Traj, a 100K-scale dataset of citation-conditioned research trajectories in two modes: Target, where an LLM reconstructs the ideation path leading to a known paper from its cited works, and Infer, where the LLM proposes novel directions from the same citations. We distill these into SCISENSE-LM, a family of sensemaking LLMs spanning 3B to 70B parameters. Contrary to the assumption that looser supervision promotes greater exploration, Target-trained models achieve a 2.0\% improvement in trajectory quality over Infer-trained models while also producing more novel and diverse outputs. This advantage propagates downstream: coding agents conditioned on Target trajectories produce research artifacts with higher executability and quality than those conditioned on Infer trajectories. This suggests that targeted ideation reduces cognitive burden on downstream agents, freeing them to explore more creatively. SCISENSE offers both a practical tool for augmenting LLM-driven research workflows and a principled testbed for studying how planning shapes scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: SCISENSE是一个基于认知科学的IDEATION框架，通过构建10万级研究轨迹数据集训练了不同规模的语言模型，发现目标导向训练比推断训练能产生更高质量、新颖和多样化的研究轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将科学发现中的构思阶段视为简短的前言，但这一阶段实际上在研究中处于核心地位。需要将IDEATION过程结构化并开发相应的工具来增强AI驱动的研究工作流。
AI.method: 基于Pirolli & Card的认知阶段理论构建SCISENSE框架；创建了SCISENSE-Traj数据集，包含目标重建和推断创新两种模式的10万级研究轨迹；训练了从3B到70B的SCISENSE-LM模型系列。
AI.result: 目标导向训练的模型在轨迹质量上比推断训练提高2.0%，且产出更具新颖性和多样性；下游编程代理使用目标轨迹产生的产出具有更高的可执行性和质量。
AI.conclusion: 目标导向的IDEATION能够减少下游代理的认知负担，释放其探索创造力；SCISENSE既为增强AI研究工作流提供了实用工具，也为研究规划如何影响科学发现提供了原则性平台。

title: Federated Distillation for Whole Slide Image via Gaussian-Mixture Feature Alignment and Curriculum Integration
summary: Federated learning (FL) offers a promising framework for collaborative digital pathology by enabling model training across institutions. However, real-world deployments face heterogeneity arising from diverse multiple instance learning (MIL) architectures and heterogeneous feature extractors across institutions. We propose FedHD, a novel FL framework that performs local Gaussian-mixture feature alignment tailored for WSI analysis. Instead of exchanging model parameters, each client independently distills semantically rich synthetic feature representations aligned with the distribution of real WSIs. To preserve diagnostic diversity, FedHD adopts a one-to-one distillation strategy, generating a synthetic counterpart for each real slide to avoid over-compression. During federation, a curriculum-based integration strategy progressively incorporates cross-site synthetic features into local training once performance plateaus. Furthermore, an optional interpretation module reconstructs pseudo-patches from synthetic embeddings, enhancing transparency. FedHD is architecture-agnostic, privacy-preserving, and supports personalized yet collaborative training across diverse institutions. Experiments on TCGA-IDH, CAMELYON16, and CAMELYON17 show that FedHD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art federated and distillation baselines.

AI.tldr: FedHD是一种新型的联邦学习框架，通过局部高斯混合特征对齐生成合成特征表示，实现了跨机构的病理切片分析协作训练，在多个基准数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的联邦学习在数字病理学领域面临挑战，主要问题在于不同机构使用多样化的多实例学习架构和特征提取器，导致系统异构性，难以有效进行协同训练。
AI.method: FedHD框架采用局部高斯混合特征对齐技术，每个客户端独立生成与真实WSI分布对齐的合成特征表示；采用一对一蒸馏策略保持诊断多样性；基于课程学习的集成策略逐步整合跨站点合成特征；可选的推理模块从合成嵌入中重建伪补丁。
AI.result: 在TCGA-IDH、CAMELYON16和CAMELYON17数据集上的实验表明，FedHD在性能上始终优于最先进的联邦学习和蒸馏基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FedHD提供了一个架构无关、隐私保护且支持个性化协作训练的解决方案，为跨机构的数字病理学协作研究提供了有效框架。

title: Beyond Decodability: Reconstructing Language Model Representations with an Encoding Probe
summary: Probing is widely used to study which features can be decoded from language model representations. However, the common decoding probe approach has two limitations that we aim to solve with our new encoding probe approach: contributions of different features to model representations cannot be directly compared, and feature correlations can affect probing results. We present an Encoding Probe that reverses this direction and reconstructs internal representations of models using interpretable features. We evaluate this method on text and speech transformer models, using feature sets spanning acoustics, phonetics, syntax, lexicon, and speaker identity. Our results suggest that speaker-related effects vary strongly across different training objectives and datasets, while syntactic and lexical features contribute independently to reconstruction. These results show that the Encoding Probe provides a complementary perspective on interpreting model representations beyond decodability.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新的编码探针方法，通过可解释特征重构模型内部表示，解决了传统解码探针无法直接比较特征贡献和特征相关性影响的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的解码探针方法存在两个主要限制：无法直接比较不同特征对模型表示的贡献，以及特征之间的相关性会影响探测结果的准确性。
AI.method: 提出了编码探针方法，逆转了传统解码方向，使用可解释特征集来重构模型的内部表示，并在文本和语音Transformer模型上进行了评估，涵盖声学、语音学、语法、词汇和说话人身份等特征。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，说话人相关效应在不同的训练目标和数据集之间存在强烈变化，而语法和词汇特征对重构的贡献是相互独立的。
AI.conclusion: 编码探针为解释模型表示提供了可解码性之外的补充视角，为理解语言模型内部机制提供了新的方法论。

title: Jailbreaking Vision-Language Models Through the Visual Modality
summary: The visual modality of vision-language models (VLMs) is an underexplored attack surface for bypassing safety alignment. We introduce four jailbreak attacks exploiting the vision component: (1) encoding harmful instructions as visual symbol sequences with a decoding legend, (2) replacing harmful objects with benign substitutes (e.g., bomb -> banana) then prompting for harmful actions using the substitute term, (3) replacing harmful text in images (e.g., on book covers) with benign words while visual context preserves the original meaning, and (4) visual analogy puzzles whose solution requires inferring a prohibited concept. Evaluating across six frontier VLMs, our visual attacks bypass safety alignment and expose a cross-modality alignment gap: text-based safety training does not automatically generalize to harmful intent conveyed visually. For example, our visual cipher achieves 40.9% attack success on Claude-Haiku-4.5 versus 10.7% for an equivalent textual cipher. To further our insight into the attack mechanism, we present preliminary interpretability and mitigation results. These findings highlight that robust VLM alignment requires treating vision as a first-class target for safety post-training.

AI.tldr: 研究发现视觉语言模型(VLMs)的视觉模态存在安全漏洞，通过四种视觉攻击方法可绕过安全对齐，揭示跨模态对齐缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型的视觉模态尚未被充分研究作为攻击面，现有基于文本的安全训练无法自动泛化到视觉传达的恶意意图。
AI.method: 提出四种利用视觉组件的越狱攻击：视觉符号序列编码、有害物体替换、图像中恶意文字替换、视觉类比谜题，并在六个前沿VLMs上进行评估。
AI.result: 视觉攻击成功绕过安全对齐，如视觉密码攻击对Claude-Haiku-4.5的成功率达40.9%，远高于等效文本密码的10.7%，证实存在跨模态对齐差距。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了视觉应是VLM安全对齐的一等目标，需在安全后训练中同等重视视觉模态的安全防护。

title: Is Textual Similarity Invariant under Machine Translation? Evidence Based on the Political Manifesto Corpus
summary: We investigate the extent to which cosine similarity between paragraph embeddings is invariant under machine translation, using the Manifesto Corpus of over 2,800 political party platforms in 28 languages translated to English via the EU eTranslation service. Rather than measuring translation-induced semantic shift directly we measure the stability of pairwise similarity relationships across embedding models, and use inter-model disagreement on original-language text as a calibrated invariance threshold. This yields a per-language non-inferiority test for four hypotheses about how translation interacts with embedding choice, with verdicts that distinguish languages where translation demonstrably preserves semantic structure from those where it demonstrably degrades it and from those where the available evidence does not resolve the question. The framework is corpus- and pipeline-agnostic and extends naturally to downstream tasks. Applied to our data, it identifies ten languages with translation invariance and four with detectable distortion.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发了评估机器翻译对段落嵌入余弦相似度不变性的框架，通过分析28种语言政治宣言语料，发现10种语言翻译后语义结构得以保持，4种语言出现可检测的语义扭曲。
AI.motivation: 随着机器翻译技术的广泛应用，需要评估翻译过程对文本嵌入表示语义结构的影响，特别是在跨语言信息检索、文本分析等应用中，确保翻译不会破坏原文的语义关系至关重要。
AI.method: 研究人员设计了一个非劣效性测试框架，通过比较原始语言和翻译后文本的嵌入模型相似度关系稳定性，使用模型间分歧度作为校准阈值，来评估翻译对语义结构的影响。
AI.result: 在包含2,800多个政党宣言的多语言语料上，该框架成功识别出10种语言表现出翻译不变性，4种语言存在可检测的语义扭曲，其余语言的证据不足以做出判断。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为评估机器翻译对语义结构保持的影响提供了系统化方法，具有语料库和处理流水线无关性，可自然扩展到下游任务，为翻译质量评估和新工具开发提供了重要参考。

title: Intrinsic Gradient Suppression for Label-Noise Prompt Tuning in Vision-Language Models
summary: Contrastive vision-language models like CLIP exhibit remarkable zero-shot generalization. However, prompt tuning remains highly sensitive to label noise, as mislabeled samples generate disproportionately large gradients that can overwhelm pre-trained priors. We argue that because CLIP already provides a near-optimal initialization, adaptation should be inherently conservative, particularly against the extreme gradient updates common in noisy settings. To this end, we propose Double-Softmax Prompt Tuning (DSPT), a hyperparameter-free method for intrinsic gradient suppression. By applying a sequential probabilistic normalization, DSPT induces a self-adaptive saturation zone that suppresses gradients from high-error noisy samples while maintaining informative updates. We also provide both theoretical analysis and empirical evidence about how this mechanism achieves adaptive suppression. This design transforms ``gradient vanishing'', traditionally a training bottleneck, into a principled noise-filtering shield for label-noise prompt tuning. Extensive experiments confirm that this simple, drop-in design achieves state-of-the-art robustness across various noisy benchmarks, outperforming methods with complex architectures and handcrafted hyperparameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSPT方法，通过双softmax实现梯度自适应抑制，显著提升了CLIP在标签噪声下的提示调优鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: CLIP等对比视觉-语言模型具有出色的零样本泛化能力，但在标签噪声环境下，提示调优对噪声样本产生的过大梯度极其敏感，这些梯度会覆盖预训练先验知识，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出双softmax提示调优(DSPT)方法，通过顺序概率归一化创造自适应饱和区域，无需超参数即可实现梯度抑制。该方法将高误差噪声样本的梯度信息滤波，同时保持有效样本的更新。
AI.result: 在多个噪声基准测试中，DSPT达到了最先进的鲁棒性性能，超越了需要复杂架构和手工调整超参数的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该设计将传统的'梯度消失'缺陷转变为面向噪声提示调优的噪声过滤屏障，验证了保守适配策略在噪声环境中的有效性。

title: SC-Taxo: Hierarchical Taxonomy Generation under Semantic Consistency Constraints using Large Language Models
summary: Scientific literature is expanding at an unprecedented pace, making it increasingly challenging to efficiently organize and access domain knowledge. A high-quality scientific taxonomy offers a structured and hierarchical representation of a research field, facilitating literature exploration and topic navigation, as well as enabling downstream applications such as trend analysis, idea generation, and information retrieval. However, existing taxonomy generation approaches often suffer from structural inconsistencies and semantic misalignment across hierarchical levels. Through empirical analysis, we find that these issues largely stem from inadequate modeling of hierarchical semantic consistency. To address this limitation, we propose a semantic-consistent taxonomy generation (SC-Taxo) framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) with hierarchy-aware refinement stages to ensure semantic consistency. Specifically, SC-Taxo introduces a bidirectional heading generation mechanism that jointly performs bottom-up abstraction and top-down semantic constraint, while further capturing peer-level semantic dependencies to enhance horizontal consistency. Experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in hierarchy alignment and heading quality, and additional evaluation on Chinese scientific literature validates its robust cross-lingual generalization.

AI.tldr: 提出SC-Taxo框架，利用大语言模型通过层次感知的精炼阶段生成语义一致的科学分类法，解决了现有方法在结构一致性和语义对齐方面的问题。
AI.motivation: 科学文献激增使得领域知识的组织访问面临挑战，现有分类法生成方法存在结构不一致和层次间语义错位问题，主要源于未能充分建模层次语义一致性。
AI.method: SC-Taxo框架引入双向标题生成机制，同时执行自下而上的抽象和自上而下的语义约束，并捕捉同级语义依赖以增强水平一致性，确保生成的分类法语义一致。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在层次对齐和标题质量方面取得一致改进，中文科学文献的额外评估验证了其强大的跨语言泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效建模层次语义一致性，SC-Taxo框架能够生成高质量的科学分类法，为文献探索、主题导航及下游应用提供更好的支持。

title: Robust Fusion of Object-Level V2X for Learned 3D Object Detection
summary: Perception for automated driving is largely based on onboard environmental sensors, such as cameras and radar, which are cost-effective but limited by line-of-sight and field-of-view constraints. These inherent limitations may cause onboard perception to fail under occlusions or poor visibility conditions. In parallel, cooperative awareness via vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication is becoming increasingly available, enabling vehicles and infrastructure to share their own state as object-level information that complements onboard perception. In this work, we study how such V2X information can be integrated into 3D object detection and how robust the resulting system is to realistic V2X imperfections. Using the nuScenes dataset, we emulate object-level cooperative awareness messages from ground truth, injecting controlled noise and object dropout to mimic real-world conditions such as latency, localization errors, and low V2X penetration rates. We convert these messages into a dedicated bird's-eye view (BEV) input and fuse them into a BEVFusion-style detector. Our results demonstrate that while object-level cooperative information can substantially improve detection performance, achieving an NDS of 0.80 under favorable conditions, models trained on idealized data become fragile and over-reliant on V2X. Conversely, our proposed noise-aware training strategy, coupled with explicit confidence encoding, enhances robustness, maintaining performance gains even under severe noise and reduced V2X penetration.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过将V2X通信信息集成到3D目标检测中，显著提高了自动驾驶系统的感知性能，并提出了抗噪声训练策略来应对现实V2X系统的不完善性。
AI.motivation: 基于车载传感器的自动驾驶感知存在视距和视野限制，在遮挡或能见度差的情况下容易失效。V2X通信可以作为车载感知的补充，但需要研究如何有效集成并应对现实世界中的噪声、延迟和低渗透率等问题。
AI.method: 使用nuScenes数据集模拟V2X协同感知消息，注入控制噪声和物体丢失来模拟真实条件。将消息转换为鸟瞰图输入并融合到BEVFusion风格检测器中，提出了噪声感知训练策略和显式置信度编码方法。
AI.result: 理想条件下NDS达到0.80，但传统模型在噪声下表现脆弱。提出的噪声感知训练方法在严重噪声和低V2X渗透率下仍能保持性能提升，显著增强了系统鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: V2X协同信息可以大幅提升3D目标检测性能，但必须考虑现实系统的不完善性。噪声感知训练和置信度编码是构建鲁棒V2X感知系统的关键技术，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: H-RAG at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Hierarchical Parent-Child Retrieval for Multi-Turn RAG Conversations
summary: We present H-RAG, our submission to SemEval-2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), addressing both Task A (Retrieval) and Task C (Generation with Retrieved Passages). Task A evaluates standalone retrieval quality, while Task C assesses end-to-end retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in multi-turn conversational settings, requiring both accurate answer generation and faithful grounding in retrieved evidence. Our approach implements a hierarchical parent-child RAG pipeline that separates fine-grained child-level retrieval from parent-level context reconstruction during generation. Documents are segmented into overlapping sentence-based child chunks, while full documents are preserved as parent units to provide coherent context. Retrieval combines hybrid dense-sparse search, tunable weighting, and embedding-based similarity rescoring over child chunks. Retrieved evidence is aggregated at the parent level and supplied to an instruction-tuned language model for response generation. H-RAG achieves an nDCG@5 score of 0.4271 on Task A and a harmonic mean score of 0.3241 on Task C (RB_agg: 0.2488, RL_F: 0.2703, RB_llm: 0.6508), underscoring the importance of retrieval configuration and parent-level aggregation in multi-turn RAG performance.

AI.tldr: H-RAG是一个用于多轮对话检索增强生成的分层父-子RAG方法，通过细粒度子块检索和父级上下文重建，在SemEval-2026任务中取得了良好效果。
AI.motivation: 解决多轮对话环境中的检索增强生成问题，需要在保持检索准确性的同时，确保生成的答案既准确又忠实于检索到的证据。
AI.method: 实现了分层父子RAG管线：将文档分割为重叠的句子级子块进行细粒度检索，同时保留完整文档作为父级单元提供连贯上下文；采用混合稠密-稀疏搜索、可调权重和基于嵌入的相似度重排序；在父级聚合检索证据并输入指令调优语言模型生成响应。
AI.result: 在任务A上获得0.4271的nDCG@5分数，在任务C上获得0.3241的调和平均分数（RB_agg: 0.2488, RL_F: 0.2703, RB_llm: 0.6508），验证了检索配置和父级聚合在多轮RAG性能中的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 分层检索方法有效平衡了检索准确性和上下文连贯性，为多轮对话RAG系统提供了有价值的解决方案。

title: Faithful Extreme Image Rescaling with Learnable Reversible Transformation and Semantic Priors
summary: Most recent extreme rescaling methods struggle to preserve semantically consistent structures and produce realistic details, due to the severely ill-posed nature of low- to high-resolution mapping under scaling factors of $16\times$ or higher. To alleviate the above problems, we propose FaithEIR, a diffusion-based framework for extreme image rescaling. Inspired by singular value decomposition, we develop learnable reversible transformation that enables invertible downscaling and upscaling in the latent space. To compensate for information loss due to quantization, we propose an adaptive detail prior, a high-frequency dictionary that captures the empirical average of commonly occurring structures in the training data. Finally, we design a lightweight pixel semantic embedder to provide semantic conditioning for the pretrained diffusion model. We present extensive experimental results demonstrating that our FaithEIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior reconstruction fidelity and perceptual quality. Our code, model weights, and detailed results are released at https://github.com/cshw2021/FaithEIR.

AI.tldr: FaithEIR是一个基于扩散模型的极端图像缩放框架，通过可逆变换和自适应细节先验解决了16倍以上极端缩放中的信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的极端图像缩放方法在16倍及以上的缩放因子下，难以保持语义一致的结构并产生逼真的细节，因为低分辨率到高分辨率的映射本质上是严重不适定的。
AI.method: 受奇异值分解启发，开发了可学习的可逆变换实现潜在空间的可逆缩放；提出自适应细节先验作为高频词典补偿量化信息损失；设计轻量级像素语义嵌入器为预训练扩散模型提供语义条件。
AI.result: 大量实验结果表明，FaithEIR在重建保真度和感知质量方面持续超越现有最先进方法，实现了更优越的性能。
AI.conclusion: FaithEIR通过创新的扩散模型框架和关键技术设计，有效解决了极端图像缩放的核心挑战，为相关领域提供了一个强大的解决方案。

title: Beyond Benchmarks: MathArena as an Evaluation Platform for Mathematics with LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are becoming increasingly capable mathematical collaborators, but static benchmarks are no longer sufficient for evaluating progress: they are often narrow in scope, quickly saturated, and rarely updated. This makes it hard to compare models reliably and track progress over time. Instead, we need evaluation platforms: continuously maintained systems that run, aggregate, and analyze evaluations across many benchmarks to give a comprehensive picture of model performance within a broad domain. In this work, we build on the original MathArena benchmark by substantially broadening its scope from final-answer olympiad problems to a continuously maintained evaluation platform for mathematical reasoning with LLMs. MathArena now covers a much wider range of tasks, including proof-based competitions, research-level arXiv problems, and formal proof generation in Lean. Additionally, we maintain a clear evaluation protocol for all models and regularly design new benchmarks as model capabilities improve to ensure that MathArena remains challenging. Notably, the strongest model, GPT-5.5, now reaches 98% on the 2026 USA Math Olympiad and 74% on research-level questions, showing that frontier models can now comfortably solve extremely challenging mathematical problems. This highlights the importance of continuously maintained evaluation platforms like MathArena to track the rapid progress of LLMs in mathematical reasoning.

AI.tldr: MathArena从静态基准测试扩展为持续维护的数学推理评估平台，覆盖范围更广，显示LLMs在数学领域已达到极高水平。
AI.motivation: 传统的静态数学基准测试已经无法有效评估LLMs的快速进展，因为它们范围狭窄、容易被突破且很少更新，导致难以可靠地比较模型和追踪发展。
AI.method: 大幅扩展MathArena平台，从仅限奥赛最终答案问题扩展到包括基于证明的竞赛、研究级arXiv问题、Lean形式化证明生成等更广泛的数学任务，并建立统一的评估协议，定期设计新基准。
AI.result: 最强模型GPT-5.5在2026年美国数学奥赛中达到98%准确率，在研究级问题上达到74%，表明前沿模型已能解决极其困难的数学问题。
AI.conclusion: 像MathArena这样的持续维护评估平台对于追踪LLMs在数学推理方面的快速进展至关重要，传统的静态基准测试已经不再适用。

title: CMTA: Leveraging Cross-Modal Temporal Artifacts for Generalizable AI-Generated Video Detection
summary: The proliferation of advanced AI video synthesis techniques poses an unprecedented challenge to digital video authenticity. Existing AI-generated video (AIGV) detection methods primarily focus on uni-modal or spatiotemporal artifacts, but they overlook the rich cues within the visual-textual cross-modal space, especially the temporal stability of semantic alignment. In this work, we identify a distinctive fingerprint in AIGVs, termed cross-modal temporal artifact (CMTA). Unlike real videos that exhibit natural temporal fluctuations in cross-modal alignment due to semantic variations, AIGVs display unnaturally stable semantic trajectories governed by given input prompts. To bridge this gap, we propose the CMTA framework, a cross-modal detection approach that captures these unique temporal artifacts through joint cross-modal embedding and multi-grained temporal modeling. Specifically, CMTA leverages BLIP to generate frame-level image captions and utilizes CLIP to extract corresponding visual-textual representations. A coarse-grained temporal modeling branch is then designed to characterize temporal fluctuations in cross-modal alignment with a GRU. In parallel, a fine-grained branch is constructed to capture intricate inter-frame variations from integrated visual-textual features with a Transformer encoder.
