Extensive experiments on 40 subsets across four large-scale datasets, including GenVideo, EvalCrafter, VideoPhy, and VidProM, validate that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art while exhibiting superior cross-generator generalization. Code and models of CMTA will be released at https://github.com/hwang-cs-ime/CMTA

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CMTA的跨模态检测方法，通过分析AI生成视频中语义对齐的时间稳定性特征来鉴别视频真实性，该方法在多个大数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的AI生成视频检测方法主要关注单模态或时空伪影，忽视了视觉-文本跨模态空间中丰富的线索，特别是语义对齐的时间稳定性特征，导致检测效果有限。
AI.method: CMTA框架利用BLIP生成帧级图像描述，使用CLIP提取视觉-文本表示，并通过粗粒度GRU分支和细粒度Transformer编码器分支分别建模跨模态对齐的时间波动和帧间变化，捕捉AI生成视频独特的跨模态时间伪影。
AI.result: 在GenVideo、EvalCrafter、VideoPhy和VidProM四个大型数据集的40个子集上的广泛实验表明，CMTA方法达到了新的最先进水平，并展现出优越的跨生成器泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次识别并利用AI生成视频中跨模态时间伪影这一独特指纹进行检测，提出的方法充分利用了跨模态语义轨迹的时间稳定性特征，为AI生成视频检测提供了新的思路和有效解决方案。

title: ML-Bench&Guard: Policy-Grounded Multilingual Safety Benchmark and Guardrail for Large Language Models
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in cross-linguistic contexts, ensuring safety in diverse regulatory and cultural environments has become a critical challenge. However, existing multilingual benchmarks largely rely on general risk taxonomies and machine translation, which confines guardrail models to these predefined categories and hinders their ability to align with region-specific regulations and cultural nuances. To bridge these gaps, we introduce ML-Bench, a policy-grounded multilingual safety benchmark covering 14 languages. ML-Bench is constructed directly from regional regulations, where risk categories and fine-grained rules derived from jurisdiction-specific legal texts are directly used to guide the generation of multilingual safety data, enabling culturally and legally aligned evaluation across languages. Building on ML-Bench, we develop ML-Guard, a Diffusion Large Language Model (dLLM)-based guardrail model that supports multilingual safety judgment and policy-conditioned compliance assessment. ML-Guard has two variants, one 1.5B lightweight model for fast `safe/unsafe' checking and a more capable 7B model for customized compliance checking with detailed explanations. We conduct extensive experiments against 11 strong guardrail baselines across 6 existing multilingual safety benchmarks and our ML-Bench, and show that ML-Guard consistently outperforms prior methods. We hope that ML-Bench and ML-Guard can help advance the development of regulation-aware and culturally aligned multilingual guardrail systems.

AI.tldr: 提出了ML-Bench多语言安全基准和ML-Guard防护模型，基于各地区法规构建，支持14种语言的安全评估和合规性检查。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在跨语言环境中的部署，确保安全成为关键挑战。现有的多语言基准主要依赖通用风险分类和机器翻译，限制了防护模型适应特定地区法规和文化差异的能力。
AI.method: 1) 基于地区法规构建ML-Bench基准，涵盖了14种语言；2) 开发基于扩散大语言模型的ML-Guard防护模型，提供1.5B轻量级和7B增强版两个变体；3) 支持快速安全检查和自定义合规性评估。
AI.result: 在6个现有多语言安全基准和ML-Bench上，ML-Guard相比11个强基线方法表现优异，证明了其有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: ML-Bench和ML-Guard有助于推动法规感知和文化对齐的多语言防护系统发展，为构建更安全的多语言AI应用提供了重要工具。

title: BlenderRAG: High-Fidelity 3D Object Generation via Retrieval-Augmented Code Synthesis
summary: Automatic generation of executable Blender code from natural language remains challenging, with state-of-the-art LLMs producing frequent syntactic errors and geometrically inconsistent objects. We present BlenderRAG, a retrieval-augmented generation system that operates on a curated multimodal dataset of 500 expert-validated examples (text, code, image) across 50 object categories. By retrieving semantically similar examples during generation, BlenderRAG improves compilation success rates from 40.8% to 70.0% and semantic normalized alignment from 0.41 to 0.77 (CLIP similarity) across four state-of-the-art LLMs, without requiring fine-tuning or specialized hardware, making it immediately accessible for deployment. The dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/MaxRondelli/BlenderRAG.

AI.tldr: BlenderRAG是一个基于检索增强生成的系统，通过利用500个专家验证的多模态示例，将LLM生成Blender代码的编译成功率从40.8%提升到70.0%。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的LLM在从自然语言生成可执行的Blender代码时存在频繁的语法错误和几何不一致性问题，限制了自动化3D建模的发展。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含500个专家验证示例的多模态数据集（文本、代码、图像），覆盖50个对象类别，系统在生成过程中检索语义相似的示例来辅助代码生成。
AI.result: 在四个最先进的LLM上，编译成功率从40.8%提升到70.0%，语义标准化对齐度（CLIP相似度）从0.41提升到0.77，且无需微调或专用硬件。
AI.conclusion: BlenderRAG提供了一种即时可部署的有效解决方案，显著改善了自然语言到Blender代码的生成质量，为自动化3D内容创作提供了实用工具。

title: Learning How and What to Memorize: Cognition-Inspired Two-Stage Optimization for Evolving Memory
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents require long-term user memory for consistent personalization, but limited context windows hinder tracking evolving preferences over long interactions. Existing memory systems mainly rely on static, hand-crafted update rules; although reinforcement learning (RL)-based agents learn memory updates, sparse outcome rewards provide weak supervision, resulting in unstable long-horizon optimization. Drawing on memory schema theory and the functional division between prefrontal regions and hippocampus regions, we introduce MemCoE, a cognition-inspired two-stage optimization framework that learns how memory should be organized and what information to update. In the first stage, we propose Memory Guideline Induction to optimize a global guideline via contrastive feedback interpreted as textual gradients; in the second stage, Guideline-Aligned Memory Policy Optimization uses the induced guideline to define structured process rewards and performs multi-turn RL to learn a guideline-following memory evolution policy. We evaluate on three personalization memory benchmarks, covering explicit/implicit preference and different sizes and noise, and observe consistent improvements over strong baselines with favorable robustness, transferability, and efficiency.

AI.tldr: MemCoE是一个认知启发的两阶段优化框架，通过记忆指导归纳和指导对齐的策略优化，解决LLM代理在长期个性化交互中的记忆管理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型代理因上下文窗口限制而难以长期跟踪用户偏好的演变，传统的静态记忆更新规则效果有限，而基于强化学习的方法由于稀疏奖励监督弱导致长时程优化不稳定。
AI.method: 提出MemCoE两阶段框架：第一阶段通过对比反馈优化全局记忆指导原则并解释为文本梯度；第二阶段使用诱导的指导原则定义结构化过程奖励，进行多轮强化学习学习遵循指导的记忆演化策略。
AI.result: 在三个个性化记忆基准测试上，包括显式/隐式偏好以及不同规模和噪声的数据，均观察到相比强基线方法的持续改进，具有良好的鲁棒性、可迁移性和效率。
AI.conclusion: MemCoE框架成功地将认知科学中的记忆图式理论应用于LLM代理的记忆管理，通过两阶段优化实现了更稳定有效的长期个性化记忆系统。

title: UniVidX: A Unified Multimodal Framework for Versatile Video Generation via Diffusion Priors
comment: Project page: https://houyuanchen111.github.io/UniVidX.github.io/ Accepted to ACM Transactions on Graphics (Proceedings of SIGGRAPH 2026)
summary: Recent progress has shown that video diffusion models (VDMs) can be repurposed for diverse multimodal graphics tasks. However, existing methods often train separate models for each problem setting, which fixes the input-output mapping and limits the modeling of correlations across modalities. We present UniVidX, a unified multimodal framework that leverages VDM priors for versatile video generation. UniVidX formulates pixel-aligned tasks as conditional generation in a shared multimodal space, adapts to modality-specific distributions while preserving the backbone's native priors, and promotes cross-modal consistency during synthesis. It is built on three key designs. Stochastic Condition Masking (SCM) randomly partitions modalities into clean conditions and noisy targets during training, enabling omni-directional conditional generation instead of fixed mappings. Decoupled Gated LoRA (DGL) introduces per-modality LoRAs that are activated when a modality serves as the generation target, preserving the strong priors of the VDM. Cross-Modal Self-Attention (CMSA) shares keys and values across modalities while keeping modality-specific queries, facilitating information exchange and inter-modal alignment. We instantiate UniVidX in two domains: UniVid-Intrinsic, for RGB videos and intrinsic maps including albedo, irradiance, and normal; and UniVid-Alpha, for blended RGB videos and their constituent RGBA layers. Experiments show that both models achieve performance competitive with state-of-the-art methods across distinct tasks and generalize robustly to in-the-wild scenarios, even when trained on fewer than 1,000 videos. Project page: https://houyuanchen111.github.io/UniVidX.github.io/

AI.tldr: UniVidX是一个统一的多模态视频生成框架，通过随机条件掩码、解耦门控LoRA和跨模态自注意力三个关键设计，实现了一个模型处理多种视频相关任务，在少样本训练下达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型针对每个问题任务训练独立模型，固定了输入输出映射关系，限制了跨模态相关性的建模能力。需要构建统一的框架来处理多样化的多模态图形任务。
AI.method: UniVidX基于三个核心设计：1) 随机条件掩码(SCM)随机划分模态为条件与目标，实现全向条件生成；2) 解耦门控LoRA(DGL)为每个模态引入专用LoRA，保持VDM主干网络强先验；3) 跨模态自注意力(CMSA)共享键值但保留模态特定查询，促进模态间信息交换。
AI.result: 在UniVid-Intrinsic(RGB视频与内蕴图)和UniVid-Alpha(混合RGB视频与RGBA层)两个领域实例化，实验表明即使训练数据少于1000个视频，也能在多个不同任务上达到与SOTA方法竞争的性能，并对野外场景表现良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: UniVidX成功实现了统一的视频多模态生成框架，通过创新的技术设计在保持模型泛化能力的同时大幅提升了任务适应性，为视频领域的多模态处理提供了有效解决方案。

title: FinSafetyBench: Evaluating LLM Safety in Real-World Financial Scenarios
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied in financial scenarios. However, they may produce harmful outputs, including facilitating illegal activities or unethical behavior, posing serious compliance risks. To systematically evaluate LLM safety in finance, we propose FinSafetyBench, a bilingual (English-Chinese) red-teaming benchmark designed to test an LLM's refusal of requests that violate financial compliance. Grounded in real-world financial crime cases and ethics standards, the benchmark comprises 14 subcategories spanning financial crimes and ethical violations. Through extensive experiments on general-purpose and finance-specialized LLMs under three representative attack settings, we identify critical vulnerabilities that allow adversarial prompts to bypass compliance safeguards. Further analysis reveals stronger susceptibility in Chinese contexts and highlights the limitations of prompt-level defenses against sophisticated or implicit manipulation strategies.

AI.tldr: FinSafetyBench是一个用于评估金融领域大语言模型安全的双语基准测试，揭示了现有模型在金融合规方面的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在金融场景应用日益增多，但可能产生有害输出，如协助非法活动或不道德行为，存在严重的合规风险。需要系统评估金融领域LLM的安全性。
AI.method: 提出了FinSafetyBench，一个基于真实金融犯罪案例和道德标准的英汉双语红队测试基准，包含14个金融犯罪和道德违规子类别。在通用和金融专业LLM上进行了三种代表性攻击设置的广泛实验。
AI.result: 发现了关键漏洞，使对抗性提示能够绕过合规保护措施。分析表明中文环境下的模型更易受损，并且提示级防御策略在应对复杂或隐式操纵策略时存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 金融领域的大语言模型面临严重的安全挑战，需要更强的防护机制。特别是在中文环境下，模型更容易受到攻击，现有的提示级防御策略不足以应对复杂的威胁。

title: InpaintSLat: Inpainting Structured 3D Latents via Initial Noise Optimization
summary: We present a training-free approach for controllable 3D inpainting based on initial noise optimization. In the structured 3D latent diffusion framework, we observe that the underlying geometric structure is established during the early stages of the diffusion process and exhibits high sensitivity to the initial noise. Such characteristics compromise stability in tasks like inpainting and editing, where the model must ensure strict alignment with the existing context while synthesizing a new structure. In this paper, we introduce a strategy to optimize the initial noise within the structured 3D latent diffusion framework, ensuring high-fidelity 3D inpainting. Specifically, we update the initial noise by leveraging a backpropagation approximation grounded in the rectified flow model, with the spectral parameterization specially designed for robust and efficient structured 3D latent optimization. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements in contextual consistency and prompt alignment over representative training-free inpainting baselines, establishing initial noise control as an independent dimension for 3D inpainting, orthogonal to conventional sampling trajectory manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于初始噪声优化的免训练可控3D修复方法，通过优化初始噪声实现高保真度的3D修复效果。
AI.motivation: 在结构化3D潜在扩散框架中，底层几何结构在扩散过程早期建立且对初始噪声高度敏感，这种特性影响了修复和编辑任务的稳定性，需要保证合成的新结构与现有内容严格对齐。
AI.method: 在结构化3D潜在扩散框架内优化初始噪声，基于整流流模型通过反向传播近似更新初始噪声，并采用专门设计的谱参数化实现鲁棒和高效的结构化3D潜在优化。
AI.result: 实验证明，该方法在上下文一致性和提示对齐方面相比代表性免训练修复基线方法有持续改进，确立了初始噪声控制作为3D修复的独立维度。
AI.conclusion: 初始噪声优化为3D修复提供了一种独立于传统采样轨迹操控的新型控制维度，有效提升了修复质量和稳定性。

title: Characterizing the Expressivity of Local Attention in Transformers
summary: The transformer is the most popular neural architecture for language modeling. The cornerstone of the transformer is its global attention mechanism, which lets the model aggregate information from all preceding tokens before generating the next token. One common variant of attention is called local attention, which restricts each token to aggregating information from a bounded window of predecessors, reducing the quadratic cost of global attention to linear. Although this restriction is usually motivated by efficiency, it has also been found to improve model quality, a phenomenon that has so far lacked a satisfactory explanation. We provide a formal account of this phenomenon in terms of recognizer expressivity. It has been shown that fixed-precision transformers with global attention correspond to a fragment of linear temporal logic containing a single past operator. We additionally prove that adding local attention introduces a second temporal operator, strictly enlarging the class of recognizable regular languages. Moreover, global and local attention are expressively complementary: neither subsumes the other, and combining them yields the richest fragment. Experiments on formal language recognition and natural language modeling corroborate the theory, showing that hybrid global--local transformers outperform their global-only counterparts.

AI.tldr: 本文通过形式化分析揭示了Transformer局部注意力机制为何能提升模型质量——它增加了识别器的表达能力，使得模型能识别更丰富的正则语言类别。
AI.motivation: Transformer的全局注意力机制虽然有效但计算成本高。实践中发现局部注意力不仅提高了效率，还能改善模型质量，但这一现象缺乏理论解释。
AI.method: 通过形式化语言理论分析，证明全局注意力对应包含单个过去算子的线性时序逻辑片段，而局部注意力引入了第二个时序算子，严格扩展了可识别正则语言的类别。
AI.result: 证明了全局和局部注意力在表达能力上是互补的，两者结合能识别最丰富的语言片段。实验验证了混合全局-局部Transformer在形式语言识别和自然语言建模上优于仅使用全局注意力的模型。
AI.conclusion: 局部注意力机制的优越性源于其增强了模型的表达能力，为Transformer架构的设计提供了理论基础，支持了混合注意力策略的合理性。

title: Prediction of Alzheimer's Disease Risk Factors from Retinal Images via Deep Learning: Development and Validation of Biologically Relevant Morphological Associations in the UK Biobank
comment: Accepted to the "Journal of Alzheimer's Disease" for publication
summary: The systemic, metabolic, lifestyle factors have established associations with Alzheimer's Disease (AD) through epidemiologic and AD-specific biomarker studies. Whether colored fundus photography (CFP) contains retinal structural signatures corresponding to these AD-related risk domains remains unclear. To determine whether deep learning (DL) models can predict 12 AD-related risk factors from CFP and to characterize the retinal structures underlying these predictions, thereby assessing whether CFP reflects pathways to AD vulnerability. Using UK Biobank CFPs, DL models were trained using 62,876 images from 44,501 unique participants to predict 12 factors linked to AD incidence: 6 categorical (sex, smoking, sleeplessness, economic status, alcohol use, depression) and 6 continuous (age, age at completing education, BMI, systolic, diastolic blood pressure, HbA1c). Model performance, model saliency, and saliency-derived scores (CAM-Score) were evaluated and compared to retinal morphometry. The scores were also compared between incident-AD cases (average 8.55 years before onset) and matched controls. Performance of DL ranged from AUROC= 0.5654-0.9480 for categorical and R2=-0.0291-0.7620 for continuous factors, outperforming most of the morphometry-machine learning models. Saliency-based score consistently highlighted biologically meaningful regions, particularly the optic nerve head and retinal vasculature. It also aligned with present morphometric variations. Several saliency-based scores differed significantly between incident AD and matched controls, suggesting potential overlap between retinal correlates of risk factors and preclinical AD-associated changes. CFP encodes retinal signatures linked to AD risk factors. Although not diagnostic, DL-derived retinal representations may uncover biologically meaningful risk-related structural changes mirroring the potential AD vulnerability.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用深度学习模型从彩色眼底照片中预测12种阿尔茨海默病相关风险因素，并识别出这些预测背后的视网膜结构特征，发现眼底的神经头和视网膜血管区域与AD易感性相关。
AI.motivation: 系统性、代谢性和生活方式因素已被证实与AD相关，但彩色眼底照片(CFP)是否包含与这些AD风险领域相对应的视网膜结构特征尚不明确。需要评估CFP是否能反映AD易感性的路径。
AI.method: 使用UK Biobank的62,876张CFP图像训练深度学习模型，预测12种AD相关因素（6个分类变量和6个连续变量），评估模型性能、模型显著性及显著性衍生得分，并与视网膜形态测量学进行比较。
AI.result: DL模型性能优异，分类因素AUROC为0.5654-0.9480，连续因素R²为-0.0291-0.7620，显著优于多数形态测量-机器学习模型。显著性分析聚焦于具有生物学意义的区域，特别是神经头和视网膜血管。
AI.conclusion: CFP编码了与AD风险因素相关的视网膜特征。虽然不具备诊断价值，但DL衍生的视网膜表征可能揭示具有生物学意义的风险相关结构变化，反映潜在的AD易感性。

title: Directed Social Regard: Surfacing Targeted Advocacy, Opposition, Aid, Harms, and Victimization in Online Media
summary: The language in online platforms, influence operations, and political rhetoric frequently directs a mix of pro-social sentiment (e.g., advocacy, helpfulness, compassion) and anti-social sentiment (e.g., threats, opposition, blame) at different topics, all in the same message. While many natural language processing (NLP) tools classify or score a text's overall sentiment as positive, neutral, or negative, these tools cannot report that positive and negative sentiments coexist, and they cannot report the target of those sentiments. This paper presents the Directed Social Regard (DSR) approach to multi-dimensional, multi-valence sentiment analysis, comprised of a pair of transformer-based models that (1) detects span-level targets of sentiment in a message and then (2) scores all spans within the message context along three (-1, 1) axes of regard that are motivated by social science theories of moral disengagement and moral framing. We present a data collection and annotation strategy for DSR dataset construction, a transformer-based architecture for span-level scoring, and a validation study with promising results. We apply the validated DSR model on six third-party datasets of online media and report meaningful correlations between DSR outputs and the labels and topics in these pre-existing social science datasets.

AI.tldr: DSR方法通过基于transformer的模型对识别文本中情感目标并沿社会情感维度进行多维度评分，解决了传统情感分析无法处理情感共存的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有NLP情感分析工具只能将文本整体划分为积极、中性或消极，无法识别同一消息中针对不同话题同时存在的亲社会与反社会情感，也无法确定情感的具体目标。
AI.method: 提出DSR（Directed Social Regard）方法，包含两个transformer模型：首先检测消息中span级情感目标，然后在消息语境中沿三个(-1,1)关注维度对所有span进行评分，基于道德脱离和道德框架的社会科学理论构建数据集和架构。
AI.result: 在六个第三方在线媒体数据集上验证了DSR模型，其输出与社会科学数据集的标签和主题之间存在显著相关性，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DSR成功实现了文本中情感目标识别和多维度情感评分，为分析在线平台、影响行动和政治言论中复杂的情感表达提供了新的技术手段。

title: DMDSC: A Dynamic-Margin Deep Simplex Classifier for Open-Set Recognition on Medical Image Datasets
summary:
Medical imaging datasets are often characterized by extreme class imbalances, where rare pathologies are significantly underrepresented compared to common conditions. This imbalance poses a dual challenge for Open-Set Recognition (OSR): models must maintain high classification accuracy on known classes while reliably rejecting unknown samples unseen during training in the clinical settings. While recently proposed Deep Simplex Classifier (DSC)~\cite{cevikalp2024reaching} and UnCertainty-aware Deep Simplex Classifier (UCDSC)~\cite{Aditya_2026_WACV} successfully leverage Neural Collapse to ensure maximal inter-class separation, they rely on a uniform margin that does not account for the varying densities of medical classes.
  In this paper, we propose DMDSC an enhanced framework featuring a dynamic margin approach. Our approach automatically adapts class-specific margins based on label frequency, enforcing a higher penalty and tighter feature clustering for rare pathologies to counteract the effects of data imbalance. Extensive experiments conducted on diverse medical benchmarks on BloodMNIST\cite{medmnistv2}, OCTMNIST\cite{medmnistv2}, DermaMNIST\cite{medmnistv2}, and BreaKHis~\cite{spanhol2015dataset} datasets, demonstrate that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMDSC框架，通过动态边界机制解决医学影像数据集中的类别不平衡和开放集识别问题，在多个医学数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据集存在极端的类别不平衡问题，罕见病理样本显著少于常见病症，这对开放集识别(OSR)构成双重挑战：模型既要保持对已知类别的分类准确性，又要可靠地拒绝训练中未见过的样本。现有的DSC和UCDSC方法使用统一边界，未能考虑医学类别的不同密度分布。
AI.method: 提出DMDSC增强框架，采用动态边界方法，根据标签频率自动调整类别特定边界。对罕见病理设定更高的惩罚和更紧密的特征聚类，以抵消数据不平衡的影响。
AI.result: 在BloodMNIST、OCTMNIST、DermaMNIST和BreaKHis等多个医学基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该框架在性能上超越了最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: DMDSC通过自适应动态边界机制有效解决了医学影像中的类别不平衡和开放集识别问题，为医学图像分析提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: When LLMs Stop Following Steps: A Diagnostic Study of Procedural Execution in Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often achieve strong performance on reasoning benchmarks, but final-answer accuracy alone does not show whether they faithfully execute the procedure specified in a prompt. We study this question through a controlled diagnostic benchmark for procedural execution, where models are given a step-wise arithmetic algorithm and two numeric inputs, and must return the final computed value. The benchmark uses simple arithmetic operations but increases complexity through algorithm length and look-back dependencies over intermediate variables. Across 14 models and 55 datasets, average first-answer accuracy drops from 61% on 5-step procedures to 20% on 95-step procedures. Generation-level analysis shows that failures often involve missing answers, premature answers, self-correction after an initial error, under-executed traces, and hallucinated extra steps. These findings suggest that apparent reasoning ability can mask substantial weaknesses in faithful instruction execution.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型在执行分步算法时，随着步骤增加，准确率从61%骤降至20%，暴露了程序执行的根本缺陷。
AI.motivation: 仅凭最终答案准确率无法评估LLM是否真正按照指定程序执行推理过程，需要专门诊断模型对程序性指令的忠实执行能力。
AI.method: 构建了一个程序执行诊断基准，使用简单算术操作，但通过增加算法长度和中间变量的回溯依赖来提升复杂性，测试14个模型在55个数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 模型在5步骤程序上平均准确率61%，但在95步骤程序上降至20%；分析发现失败原因包括缺失答案、过早回答、错误后自我纠正、执行轨迹不完整和幻觉额外步骤。
AI.conclusion: 表面的推理能力可能掩盖了对指令忠实执行的严重不足，LLM在程序化推理执行方面存在根本性缺陷。

title: Foundation AI Models for Aerosol Optical Depth Estimation from PACE Satellite Data
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, to appear in 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium
summary: Aerosol Optical Depth (AOD) retrieval is essential for Earth observation, supporting applications from air quality monitoring to climate studies. Conventional physics-based AOD retrieval methods formulate the problem as a pixel-wise inversion, relying on radiative transfer modeling, memory-intensive look-up tables, and auxiliary meteorological data. While recent data-driven approaches have shown promise, many fail to exploit the spatial-spectral coherence of hyperspectral imagery, leading to spatially inconsistent and noise-sensitive retrievals. We present the first study exploring Foundation AI models for AOD retrieval and propose ViTCG, a Vision Transformer with Channel-wise Grouping-based spatial regression framework that reduces retrieval bias and error. ViTCG uses hyperspectral top-of-atmosphere radiance as input and jointly models spatial context and spectral information. Validation with PACE radiance observations demonstrates a 62% reduction in mean squared error compared to state-of-the-art foundation models, including Prithvi, and produces spatially coherent AOD fields.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ViTCG模型，首个基于基础AI模型的气溶胶光学厚度(AOD)反演方法，通过视觉Transformer和通道分组的回归框架，实现了高精度且空间上一致的AOD反演。
AI.motivation: 传统的AOD反演方法依赖复杂的辐射传输建模和查找表，计算密集且需要辅助气象数据；现有数据驱动方法未能充分利用高光谱图像的空间-光谱相干性，导致反演结果空间不一致且对噪声敏感。
AI.method: 提出ViTCG框架，使用Vision Transformer架构结合通道分组策略，以高光谱大气层顶辐射率作为输入，联合建模空间上下文和光谱信息，通过空间回归减少反演偏差和误差。
AI.result: 在PACE辐射观测数据上的验证表明，ViTCG相比现有的最先进基础模型(包括Prithvi)均方误差减少62%，并生成了空间上一致的AOD场。
AI.conclusion: ViTCG成功将基础AI模型引入AOD反演领域，为高光谱遥感的大气参数反演提供了新思路，在精度和空间一致性方面均有显著提升。

title: Static and Dynamic Graph Alignment Network for Temporal Video Grounding
summary: Temporal Video Grounding (TVG) aims to localize temporal moments in an untrimmed video that semantically correspond to given natural language queries. Recently, Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) have been widely adopted in TVG to model temporal relations among video clips and enhance contextual reasoning by constructing clip-level graphs. Despite their effectiveness, existing GCN-based TVG methods encounter three critical bottlenecks: 1) Most methods construct graph nodes using either static or dynamic features alone, resulting in incomplete visual representation and overlooking complementary semantics, 2) Most methods construct temporal graphs in a query-agnostic manner, leading to inefficient feature interaction within the temporal graph representation, and 3) Most methods often suffer from a single-granularity semantic matching, while direct training on complex temporal localization task may lead to slow convergence and suboptimal precision. To address these challenges, we propose Static and Dynamic Graph Alignment Network (SDGAN). First, SDGAN jointly exploits static and dynamic visual features to construct two complementary temporal graphs and performs Position-wise Nodes Alignment, enabling more expressive and robust visual representation. Second, SDGAN introduces Query-Clip Contrastive Learning and Adaptive Graph Modeling to explicitly align visual clips with their corresponding textual queries, yielding query-aware visual representations. Third, SDGAN incorporates multi-granularity temporal proposals within Progressive Easy-to-Hard Training Strategy, effectively bridging coarse-grained semantic localization and fine-grained temporal boundary refinement. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that SDGAN achieves superior performance across complex TVG scenarios. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/ZhanJieHu/SDGAN.

AI.tldr: SDGAN是一种新型时序视频定位方法，通过静态-动态图对齐、查询感知建模和渐进式训练策略显著提升了TVG性能。
AI.motivation: 现有时序视频定位方法存在三个关键瓶颈：视觉表示不完整、图构建与查询无关、单粒度语义匹配效率低下，这些问题限制了TVG的准确性和效率。
AI.method: SDGAN采用三重创新策略：1) 静态-动态双图构建与位置节点对齐获得更强的视觉表示；2) 查询-片段对比学习和自适应图建模实现查询感知；3) 多粒度时序建议配合渐进式从易到难训练策略优化定位精度。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，SDGAN在复杂TVG场景中实现了优越性能，代码和数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: 该研究有效解决了GCN-based TVG方法的关键限制，为时序视频定位任务提供了更完整、更精确的解决方案，展现了在复杂场景下的强大性能。

title: PhysEdit: Physically-Consistent Region-Aware Image Editing via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Reasoning
summary: Image editing instructions are heterogeneous: a color swap, an object insertion, and a physical-action edit all demand different spatial coverage and different reasoning depth, yet existing reasoning-based editors apply a single fixed inference recipe to every instruction. We argue that adaptivity along both the spatial and temporal axes is the missing degree of freedom, and we present PhysEdit, an editing framework built around this principle. PhysEdit introduces two inference-time modules that compose without retraining the backbone. At its core, (1) Complexity-Adaptive Reasoning Depth (CARD) predicts edit complexity directly from the instruction and reference image and allocates the reasoning step count N_r and reasoning-token length r per sample -- turning a previously fixed inference schedule into a conditional-computation problem. CARD is supported by (2) a Spatial Reasoning Mask (SRM) that extracts an instruction-conditioned spatial prior from cross-attention to confine reasoning to regions that semantically require it. On the full 737-case ImgEdit Basic-Edit Suite, PhysEdit delivers a 1.18x wall-clock speedup (64.3s vs. 76.1s per sample) over a strong reasoning baseline while slightly improving instruction adherence (CLIP-T 0.2283 vs. 0.2266, +0.7%) and matching identity preservation within noise (CLIP-I 0.8246 vs. 0.8280). The speedup is category-dependent and reaches 1.52x on appearance-level edits, validating CARD's adaptive allocation as the principal source of efficiency gain. A 30-sample pilot with full ablations isolates the contribution of each module.

AI.tldr: PhysEdit是一个适应性图像编辑框架，通过动态调整推理深度和空间范围，在保持编辑质量的同时实现了1.18倍的速度提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于推理的图像编辑方法对所有类型的编辑指令使用固定的推理模式，但不同编辑任务（如颜色交换、物体插入、物理动作编辑）需要不同的空间覆盖范围和推理深度，缺乏自适应性导致效率低下。
AI.method: PhysEdit引入两个推理时模块：1) CARD（复杂度自适应推理深度）根据指令和参考图像预测编辑复杂度，动态分配推理步数N_r和推理令牌长度r；2) SRM（空间推理掩码）通过交叉注意力提取指令条件化的空间先验，将推理限制在语义相关区域。这两个模块无需重新训练主干网络即可组合使用。
AI.result: 在737个样例的ImgEdit基础编辑套件上，PhysEdit相比强力基线实现了1.18倍加速（每样本64.3秒 vs 76.1秒），同时略微提升指令遵循性（CLIP-T 0.2283 vs 0.2266，+0.7%），在身份保持方面达到相近水平（CLIP-I 0.8246 vs 0.8280）。在外观级编辑上加速效果更明显，达到1.52倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过在空间和时间维度引入自适应性，PhysEdit成功将固定推理模式转换为条件计算问题，证明了动态资源分配是图像编辑效率提升的关键因素，为推理型编辑器的设计提供了新的研究方向。

title: Learning Coarse-to-Fine Osteoarthritis Representations under Noisy Hierarchical Labels
summary: Knee osteoarthritis (OA) assessment involves a natural but often underused label hierarchy: a coarse binary OA decision and a fine-grained Kellgren--Lawrence (KL) severity grade. Existing deep learning studies commonly treat these targets as separate classification problems, either reducing OA assessment to disease presence or directly optimizing noisy ordinal KL labels. In this work, we ask whether this clinical hierarchy can serve as a representation-level supervisory prior. Rather than introducing a complex architecture, we use a deliberately simple dual-head model with a shared encoder and two task-specific heads as a probe of hierarchical supervision. We compare single-OA, single-KL, and dual-head training across multiple 3D backbones under the same test protocol. Beyond standard classification metrics, we perform paired statistical comparisons, analyze latent severity-axis geometry, and examine saliency overlap with cartilage regions. The results show that dual-head supervision produces backbone-dependent gains, with clear improvements in KL-related metrics for selected backbones. More importantly, the gains are accompanied by a more ordered coarse-to-fine latent organization and, for responsive backbones, stronger anatomical alignment of saliency with cartilage. These findings suggest that even simple hierarchical dual-head supervision can reshape disease representations under noisy coarse/fine labels, providing a useful inductive bias for OA diagnosis and severity grading.

AI.tldr: 本文通过简单的双头模型探索膝关节OA评估中的层级监督先验，发现二分OA决策和KL分级联合训练能改善疾病表征，提升KL相关指标并增强与软骨的解剖学对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有的膝骨关节炎(AOA)评估深度学习方法通常将二分OA决策和细粒度KL分级视为独立的分类问题，未能充分利用临床自然的标签层级结构作为表示级别的监督先验。
AI.method: 采用简单的双头模型结构，包含共享编码器和两个任务特定头部，分别用于OA二分类和KL分级。在相同的测试协议下，比较单OA、单KL和双头训练在多个3D骨干网络上的性能表现。
AI.result: 双头监督产生骨干网络相关的增益，特别在KL相关指标上有明显改进。同时带来更有序的从粗到细的潜在组织结构，对某些骨干网络还能增强显著图与软骨区域的解剖学对齐。
AI.conclusion: 即使简单的层级双头监督也能在噪声粗/细标签下重塑疾病表征，为OA诊断和严重程度分级提供有用的归纳偏置。

title: Unpaired Image Deraining Using Reward-Guided Self-Reinforcement Strategy
summary: Unsupervised deraining has attracted attention for its ability to learn the real-world distribution of rain without paired supervision. However, the lack of strong constraints makes it difficult for the network to converge, especially with the complex diversity of rain degradation. A key motivation is that high-quality deraining results occasionally emerge during training, which can be leveraged to guide the optimization process. To overcome these challenges, we introduce RGSUD (Reward-Guided Self-Reinforcement Unsupervised Image Deraining), comprising two key stages: reward recycling and self-reinforcement (SR) training. For the former stage, we propose an Image Quality Assessment (IQA)-based dynamic reward recycling mechanism that selects optimal derained outputs during training and continuously collects high-quality deraining images. In latter stage, we incorporate these rewards into the model's optimization process, constraining the optimization space and improving alignment between derained outputs and clean images. By leveraging IQA-based self-reinforced loss and dynamically updated rewards, we enhance the quality of synthesized pseudo-paired data and stabilize the optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA performance across multiple datasets, including paired synthetic, paired real, and unpaired real images, outperforming existing unsupervised deraining approaches in both subjective and objective IQA metrics. Additionally, we show that the self-reinforcement strategy is adaptable to other unsupervised deraining methods and our deraining framework demonstrates strong generalization across existing supervised deraining networks.

AI.tldr: RGSUD是一种基于奖励引导自增强的无监督图像去雨方法，通过动态回收高质量去雨结果并引导模型优化，在多种数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督去雨方法因缺乏强约束而难以收敛。研究发现训练过程中偶尔会出现高质量去雨结果，可以利用这些结果来指导优化过程。
AI.method: RGSUD包含两个关键阶段：1）基于图像质量评估的动态奖励回收机制，选择训练过程中的最优去雨输出；2）自增强训练，将回收的高质量结果纳入模型优化过程，约束优化空间并提高对齐度。
AI.result: 在多种数据集（包括配对合成、配对真实和非配对真实图像）上实现了SOTA性能，在主观和客观指标上均超越现有无监督去雨方法。
AI.conclusion: 自增强策略可适配其他无监督去雨方法，且该框架展现出对现有监督去雨网络的强泛化能力，证明了方法的普适性和有效性。

title: Exploring the Limits of End-to-End Feature-Affinity Propagation for Single-Point Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection
summary:
Single-point supervised infrared small target detection (IRSTD) drastically reduces dense annotation costs. Current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods achieve high precision by recovering mask supervision through explicit, offline pseudo-label construction, such as multi-stage active learning and physics-driven mask generation. In this paper, we study a minimalist alternative: generating point-to-mask supervision online through in-batch, point-anchored feature-affinity propagation. We instantiate this paradigm as GSACP, an end-to-end testbed that directly supervises the detector using hard-margin feature affinity gated by local image priors, entirely eliminating external label-evolution loops.
  This compact design, however, exposes an optimization bottleneck. Because the affinity target is generated from the same feature representation being optimized, training forms a self-referential loop. We theoretically formalize this as \emph{Self-Referential Propagation Drift}, a representation-supervision entanglement that can sharpen true boundaries or distort the feature space to satisfy its own targets. To systematically isolate these failure modes, we apply a protocolized single-variable ablation procedure spanning local EMA teacher decoupling, hard-background contrastive separation, and adaptive support geometry.
  On the SIRST3 dataset, GSACP-Final establishes a new ultra-low false-alarm operating regime, achieving a highly competitive $0.6674$ mIoU while demonstrating a $38\% relative reduction in false-positive artifacts ($\mathrm{Fa}$) compared with PAL. By systematically deconstructing the end-to-end paradigm, we map its performance boundaries and show that in-batch feature propagation provides a compact alternative for deployment scenarios where false-alarm suppression is paramount.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GSACP的单点监督红外小目标检测方法，通过在线特征亲和传播生成伪标签，实现了端到端训练，在保持较高准确率的同时显著降低了虚警率。
AI.motivation: 现有的单点监督红外小目标检测方法依赖显式、离线的伪标签构建过程，流程复杂且计算开销大。作者寻求一种更简洁的替代方案，能够在线生成点对掩码的监督信息，避免外部标签演化循环。
AI.method: GSACP通过批内特征亲和传播在线生成监督信号，直接使用硬边际特征亲和度监督检测器。为解决自参考传播漂移问题，系统性地引入了局部EMA教师解耦、硬背景对比分离和自适应支持几何等优化策略。
AI.result: 在SIRST3数据集上，GSACP-Final实现了0.6674的mIoU，相比PAL方法相对减少了38%的虚检率，建立了新的超低虚警运行状态。
AI.conclusion: 批内特征传播为虚警抑制至关重要的部署场景提供了一种紧凑的替代方案。通过对端到端范式的系统性解构，该方法证明了简化的设计仍能实现具有竞争力的性能。

title: Quantum Gradient-Based Approach for Edge and Corner Detection Using Sobel Kernels
summary: Edge detection refers to identifying points in a digital image where intensity changes sharply, indicating object boundaries or structural features. Corners are locations where gray-level intensity changes abruptly in multiple directions and are widely used in feature extraction, object tracking, and 3D modeling. In this study, we present a quantum implementation of Sobel-based edge detection and Harris-style corner detection. Two quantum image encoding methods - Flexible Representation of Quantum Images (FRQI) and Quantum Probability Image Encoding (QPIE) - are used to encode the input data and are comparatively analyzed. The proposed approach introduces a quantum gradient computation scheme based on lag-2 differences, enabling the evaluation of gradient-like features in superposition. To improve detection quality and reduce false positives, a classical post-processing step is applied to candidate corner points identified by the quantum circuit. Results show that the proposed quantum circuits produce outputs consistent with classical Sobel and Harris operators. Furthermore, the QPIE-based configuration yields more stable and coherent results than FRQI, especially under limited measurement shots. While gradient computation can be performed efficiently at the circuit level, the overall cost remains dominated by state preparation, measurement, and classical post-processing. All experiments are conducted under noiseless simulation, and performance on NISQ hardware may be affected by noise and measurement limitations. Therefore, this work demonstrates a functional and scalable quantum realization of classical edge and corner detection methods rather than an end-to-end speedup.

AI.tldr: 本研究实现了基于Sobel算子的边缘检测和Harris角点检测的量子版本，使用FRQI和QPIE两种量子图像编码方法，并通过经典后处理提高检测质量，证明了量子方法与经典方法的一致性。
AI.motivation: 随着量子计算的发展，探索经典计算机视觉算法的量子实现具有重要意义。边缘和角点检测是计算机视觉的基础任务，其量子加速实现可能为未来量子视觉系统奠定基础，同时展示量子计算在图像处理领域的潜力。
AI.method: 采用FRQI和QPIE两种量子图像编码方法，提出基于lag-2差分的量子梯度计算方案，实现量子梯度特征的叠加态计算。对量子电路识别的候选角点添加经典后处理步骤以提高检测质量并减少误报。
AI.result: 量子电路的输出与经典Sobel和Harris算子结果一致；QPIE方案在有限测量次数下比FRQI方案表现更稳定；梯度计算在电路层面可高效执行，但总体成本仍受量子态制备、测量和经典后处理主导。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了经典边缘和角点检测方法的量子实现具有功能性和可扩展性，虽然不是端到端的加速方案，但为量子计算机视觉算法的研究提供了重要参考，未来的NISQ硬件实现需要考虑噪声和测量限制的影响。

title: Modeling Subjective Urban Perception with Human Gaze
summary: Urban perception describes how people subjectively evaluate urban environments, shaping how cities are experienced and understood. Existing computational approaches primarily model urban perception directly from street view images, but largely ignore the human perceptual process through which such judgments are formed. In this paper, we introduce Place Pulse-Gaze, an urban perception dataset that augments street view images with synchronized eye-tracking recordings and individual perception labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework to study how gaze behavior contributes to the modeling of subjective urban perception. The framework systematically investigates three complementary settings: gaze-only modeling, gaze fusion with explicit semantic scene representations, and gaze fusion with implicit richer visual representations. Experiments show that gaze alone already carries useful predictive signals for subjective urban perception, and that integrating gaze with scene representations further improves prediction under both semantic and richer visual representations. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of incorporating human perceptual processes into urban scene understanding and open a direction for gaze-guided multimodal urban computing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Place Pulse-Gaze数据集和凝视引导的城市感知框架，研究表明将人类眼动行为（凝视）与场景表示相结合能够更准确地建模主观城市感知。
AI.motivation: 现有的城市感知计算方法主要直接从街景图像建模，但忽略了形成这些判断的人类感知过程。为了更好地理解人们如何主观评价城市环境，需要将人类的感知过程（特别是眼动行为）纳入计算模型。
AI.method: 构建了Place Pulse-Gaze数据集，包含街景图像、同步的眼动记录记录和个体感知标签。提出了凝视引导的城市感知框架，系统研究了三种互补设置：仅凝视建模、凝视与显式语义场景表示融合、凝视与隐式更丰富视觉表示融合。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅凝视就包含了对主观城市感知有用的预测信号，而将凝视与场景表示融合无论是在语义还是更丰富的视觉表示下都能进一步提高预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果突出了将人类感知过程纳入城市场景理解的重要性，为凝视引导的多模态城市计算开辟了新方向，强调了眼动行为在城市感知建模中的价值。

title: Map2World: Segment Map Conditioned Text to 3D World Generation
summary: 3D world generation is essential for applications such as immersive content creation or autonomous driving simulation. Recent advances in 3D world generation have shown promising results; however, these methods are constrained by grid layouts and suffer from inconsistencies in object scale throughout the entire world. In this work, we introduce a novel framework, Map2World, that first enables 3D world generation conditioned on user-defined segment maps of arbitrary shapes and scales, ensuring global-scale consistency and flexibility across expansive environments. To further enhance the quality, we propose a detail enhancer network that generates fine details of the world. The detail enhancer enables the addition of fine-grained details without compromising overall scene coherence by incorporating global structure information. We design the entire pipeline to leverage strong priors from asset generators, achieving robust generalization across diverse domains, even under limited training data for scene generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches in user-controllability, scale consistency, and content coherence, enabling users to generate 3D worlds under more complex conditions.

AI.tldr: Map2World是一个3D世界生成框架，它允许用户基于任意形状和尺度的分段图生成全局尺度一致的3D世界，并通过细节增强网络添加高质量细节。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D世界生成方法受限于网格布局，且在整个世界中存在物体尺度不一致的问题，无法满足复杂环境下的灵活生成需求。
AI.method: 提出Map2World框架，首先根据用户定义的任意形状和尺度的分段图生成3D世界，确保全局尺度和环境灵活性；然后设计细节增强网络，通过融入全局结构信息生成精细细节，同时保持场景连贯性；整个流程利用资产生成器的强先验知识。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在用户可控性、尺度一致性和内容连贯性方面显著优于现有方法，能够在更复杂的条件下生成高质量的3D世界。
AI.conclusion: Map2World框架成功解决了以往方法的网格布局限制和尺度不一致问题，通过分段图条件生成和细节增强，实现了灵活可控的大规模3D世界生成，并在有限训练数据下展现了强大的泛化能力。

title: Make Your LVLM KV Cache More Lightweight
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2026
summary: Key-Value (KV) cache has become a de facto component of modern Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) for inference. While it enhances decoding efficiency in Large Language Models (LLMs), its direct adoption in LVLMs introduces substantial GPU memory overhead due to the large number of vision tokens processed during the prefill stage. To tackle this problem, we propose LightKV, a novel approach that reduces KV cache size by exploiting the redundancy among vision-token embeddings. Guided by text prompts, LightKV employs cross-modality message passing to aggregate informative messages across vision tokens and progressively compress them during prefill. This prompt-aware guidance distinguishes our method from prior vision-only compression strategies. We evaluate LightKV on eight open-source LVLMs across eight public benchmark datasets, e.g., MME and SeedBench. Experimental results demonstrate that with only 55% of the original vision tokens, LightKV (a) halves the vision-token KV cache size, (b) reduces computation by up to 40%, and (c) preserves general-purpose performance while significantly outperforming existing baselines.

AI.tldr: LightKV是一种通过跨模态信息传递压缩视觉token嵌入的方法，将LVLMs的KV缓存减半，计算量减少40%，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 直接在大型视觉语言模型中应用KV缓存会导致GPU内存开销过大，因为预填充阶段需要处理大量视觉token，现有方法无法有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: LightKV利用视觉token嵌入之间的冗余性，在文本提示引导下采用跨模态信息传递，在预填充阶段逐步聚合和压缩视觉token信息，实现提示感知的缓存压缩。
AI.result: 在8个开源LVLMs和8个公开数据集上的实验表明，仅使用55%的原始视觉token，LightKV可将视觉token KV缓存大小减半，计算量最多减少40%，并在保持通用性能的同时显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: LightKV有效解决了LVLMs中KV缓存的内存开销问题，其提示感知的压缩策略为视觉语言模型的高效推理提供了新思路。

title: GMGaze: MoE-Based Context-Aware Gaze Estimation with CLIP and Multiscale Transformer
summary: Gaze estimation methods commonly use facial appearances to predict the direction of a person gaze. However, previous studies show three major challenges with convolutional neural network (CNN)-based, transformer-based, and contrastive language-image pre-training (CLIP)-based methods, including late fusion of image features, lack of factor-aware conditioning, and impractical capacity scaling. To address these challenges, we propose Globally-conditioned Multi-scale Gaze estimation (GMGaze), which leverages a multi-scale transformer architecture. Specifically, the model first introduces semantic prototype conditioning, which modulates the CLIP global image embedding using four learned prototype banks (i.e., illumination, background, head pose and appearance) to generate two complementary context-biased global tokens. These tokens, along with the CLIP patch and CNN tokens, are fused at the first layer. This early unified fusion prevents information loss common in late-stage merging. Finally, each token passes through sparse Mixture-of-Experts modules, providing conditional computational capacity without uniformly increasing dense parameters. For cross-domain adaptation, we incorporate an adversarial domain adaptation technique with a feature separation loss that encourages the two global tokens to remain de-correlated. Experiments using four public benchmarks (MPIIFaceGaze, EYEDIAP, Gaze360, and ETH-XGaze) show that GMGaze achieves mean angular errors of 2.49$^\circ$, 3.22$^\circ$, 10.16$^\circ$, and 1.44$^\circ$, respectively, outperforming previous baselines in all within-domain settings. In cross-domain evaluations, it provides state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on two standard transfer routes.

AI.tldr: GMGaze是一种基于多尺度transformer架构的凝视估计方法，通过语义原型调节、早期融合和稀疏专家混合模块，在四个公共数据集上实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN、transformer和CLIP基础的凝视估计方法存在图像特征晚期融合、缺乏因子感知条件化以及容量扩展不切实际三大挑战。
AI.method: GMGaze首先通过四个学习的原型库调节CLIP全局图像嵌入，生成两个互补的上下文偏置全局token；然后在第一层与CLIP patch和CNN token进行早期统一融合；最后通过稀疏混合专家模块提供条件化计算容量，并采用对抗域适应技术促进跨域适应。
AI.result: 在MPIIFaceGaze、EYEDIAP、Gaze360和ETH-XGaze四个基准测试上，平均角度误差分别为2.49°、3.22°、10.16°和1.44°，在所有域内设置上超越先前基线，在跨域评估中提供SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: GMGaze通过创新的语义原型调节、早期融合策略和条件化计算能力有效解决了现有凝视估计方法的关键缺陷，在域内和跨域设置中均实现了最先进的性能表现。

title: Let ViT Speak: Generative Language-Image Pre-training
summary: In this paper, we present \textbf{Gen}erative \textbf{L}anguage-\textbf{I}mage \textbf{P}re-training (GenLIP), a minimalist generative pretraining framework for Vision Transformers (ViTs) designed for multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To better align vision encoders with the autoregressive nature of LLMs, GenLIP trains a ViT to predict language tokens directly from visual tokens using a standard language modeling objective, without contrastive batch construction or an additional text decoder. This design offers three key advantages: (1) \textbf{Simplicity}: a single transformer jointly models visual and textual tokens; (2) \textbf{Scalability}: it scales effectively with both data and model size; and (3) \textbf{Performance}: it achieves competitive or superior results across diverse multimodal benchmarks. Trained on 8B samples from Recap-DataComp-1B, GenLIP matches or surpasses strong baselines despite using substantially less pretraining data. After continued pretraining on multi-resolution images at native aspect ratios, GenLIP further improves on detail-sensitive tasks such as OCR and chart understanding, making it a strong foundation for vision encoders in MLLMs.

AI.tldr: GenLIP是一个极简的生成式预训练框架，通过直接使用语言建模目标训练ViT预测语言标记，实现了视觉编码器与LLM自回归特性的更好对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统的视觉-语言预训练方法依赖对比学习或额外的文本解码器，与LLM的自回归特性不匹配。GenLIP旨在通过更简单有效的方式对齐视觉编码器和语言模型。
AI.method: GenLIP使用单一Transformer模型联合建模视觉和文本标记，直接从视觉标记预测语言标记，采用标准语言建模目标，无需对比批处理构建或额外文本解码器。
AI.result: 在8B样本上训练的GenLIP，使用更少预训练数据就能达到或超越强基线模型。通过多分辨率图像持续预训练，在OCR和图表理解等细节敏感任务上进一步改进。
AI.conclusion: GenLIP以其简洁性、可扩展性和优异性能，成为MLLM中视觉编码器的强大基础，为多模态大语言模型提供了新的预训练范式。

title: Persistent Visual Memory: Sustaining Perception for Deep Generation in LVLMs
summary: While autoregressive Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable proficiency in multimodal tasks, they face a "Visual Signal Dilution" phenomenon, where the accumulation of textual history expands the attention partition function, causing visual attention to decay inversely with generated sequence length. To counteract this, we propose Persistent Visual Memory (PVM), a lightweight learnable module designed to ensure sustained, on-demand visual perception. Integrated as a parallel branch alongside the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) in LVLMs, PVM establishes a distance-agnostic retrieval pathway that directly provides visual embeddings for precise visual perception, thereby structurally mitigating the signal suppression inherent to deep generation. Extensive experiments on Qwen3-VL models demonstrate that PVM brings notable improvements with negligible parameter overhead, delivering consistent average accuracy gains across both 4B and 8B scales, particularly in complex reasoning tasks that demand persistent visual perception. Furthermore, in-depth analysis reveals that PVM can resist length-induced signal decay and accelerate internal prediction convergence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出持久视觉记忆(PVM)模块，通过在大型视觉语言模型中建立独立的视觉检索路径，有效解决了自回归生成过程中的视觉信号稀释问题。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型(LVLMs)在生成长文本时，由于注意力分配函数随文本历史积累而扩大，导致视觉注意力与生成长度成反比衰减，出现'视觉信号稀释'现象，影响视觉感知的持续性。
AI.method: 提出持久视觉记忆(PVM)，作为轻量级可学习模块，与LVLMs中的前馈网络(FFN)并行集成。PVM建立距离无关的检索路径，直接提供视觉嵌入，确保持续按需的视觉感知，从结构上缓解深度生成固有的信号抑制。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-VL模型上的大量实验表明，PVM以可忽略的参数开销带来显著改进，在4B和8B规模模型上均实现一致的准确率提升，尤其在需要持久视觉感知的复杂推理任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 深入分析表明，PVM能有效抵抗生成长度引发的信号衰减，加速内部预测收敛，为解决LVLMs在长序列生成中的视觉感知衰减问题提供了有效方案。

title: Posterior Augmented Flow Matching
summary: Flow matching (FM) trains a time-dependent vector field that transports samples from a simple prior to a complex data distribution. However, for high-dimensional images, each training sample supervises only a single trajectory and intermediate point, yielding an extremely sparse and high-variance training signal. This under-constrained supervision can cause flow collapse, where the learned dynamics memorize specific source-target pairings, mapping diverse inputs to overly similar outputs, failing to generalize. We introduce Posterior-Augmented Flow Matching (PAFM), a theoretically grounded generalization of FM that replaces single-target supervision with an expectation over an approximate posterior of valid target completions for a given intermediate state and condition. PAFM factorizes this intractable posterior into (i) the likelihood of the intermediate under a hypothesized endpoint and (ii) the prior probability of that endpoint under the condition, and uses an importance sampling scheme to construct a mixture over multiple candidate targets. We prove that PAFM yields an unbiased estimator of the original FM objective while substantially reducing gradient variance during training by aggregating information from many plausible continuation trajectories per intermediate. Finally, we show that PAFM improves over FM by up to 3.4 FID50K across different model scales (SiT-B/2 and SiT-XL/2), different architectures (SiT and MMDiT), and in both class and text conditioned benchmarks (ImageNet and CC12M), with a negligible increase in the compute overhead. Code: https://github.com/gstoica27/PAFM.git.

AI.tldr: PAFM是一种改进的流匹配方法，通过对每个中间状态使用多个候选目标的期望来替代单一监督，有效解决了训练信号稀疏性和流坍塌问题，显著提升了图像生成的质量。
AI.motivation: 高维图像的流匹配训练中，每个样本仅监督单一路径的一个中间点，导致训练信号极其稀疏且方差过大，容易引发流坍塌现象，使得模型记忆特定的源-目标配对，无法泛化。
AI.method: 提出后验增强流匹配(PAFM)，将单一目标监督替换为对给定中间状态和条件的有效目标完成后验分布的期望。该方法将难处理的后验分解为中间状态在假设端点下的似然和该端点在条件下的先验概率，并使用重要性采样构建多个候选目标的混合。
AI.result: PAFM在不同模型尺度(SiT-B/2和SiT-XL/2)、不同架构(SiT和MMDiT)以及类别和文本条件基准测试(ImageNet和CC12M)上，相比原始FM提升多达3.4 FID50K，计算开销增加可忽略。
AI.conclusion: PAFM为流匹配提供了一种理论完备且实用的改进方案，通过对多个合理延续轨迹的信息聚合，既保持了原始目标的无偏估计，又显著降低了训练梯度方差，有效避免了流坍塌问题。
